title: Large Language Models for Multilingual Code Intelligence: A Survey
summary: Large language models have transformed AI-assisted software engineering, but current research remains biased toward high-resource languages such as Python, with weaker performance in languages like Rust and OCaml. Since real-world systems are inherently polyglot, robust multilingual code intelligence is crucial. This survey focuses on two key tasks: multilingual code generation from shared natural-language requirements, and multilingual code translation that preserves semantics across languages. It reviews representative methods, benchmarks, and evaluation metrics, and highlights challenges and opportunities for trustworthy cross-language generalization.

AI.tldr: 该综述论文指出大型语言模型在软件工程中偏向Python等高级语言，对Rust、OCaml等语言支持较弱，重点研究了多语言代码生成和代码翻译两个任务，并评述了现有方法、基准和评估指标，最后讨论了可信跨语言泛化的挑战与机遇。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM辅助软件工程研究过度偏向Python等高级语言，对Rust、OCaml等语言支持不足，而真实系统本质上是多语言混合的，因此需要更鲁棒的多语言代码智能能力。
AI.method: 该论文采用综述方法，聚焦两项核心任务：(1) 从共享自然语言需求生成多语言代码；(2) 保持语义一致性的跨语言代码翻译。系统梳理了代表性方法、基准数据集和评估指标。
AI.result: 揭示了当前多语言代码智能研究中语言间性能差距显著，高资源语言表现强而低资源语言表现弱；现有基准和评估方法尚不足以充分衡量跨语言泛化的可信度。
AI.conclusion: 强调了实现可信跨语言泛化面临的挑战（如语义保真度、低资源语言覆盖不足）以及未来研究机遇，呼吁社区关注多语言代码智能的公平性和鲁棒性。

title: SWE-Edit: Rethinking Code Editing for Efficient SWE-Agent
summary: Large language model agents have achieved remarkable progress on software engineering tasks, yet current approaches suffer from a fundamental context coupling problem: the standard code editing interface conflates code inspection, modification planning, and edit execution within a single context window, forcing agents to interleave exploratory viewing with strictly formatted edit generation. This causes irrelevant information to accumulate and degrades agent performance. To address this, we propose SWE-Edit, which decomposes code editing into two specialized subagents: a Viewer that extracts task-relevant code on demand, and an Editor that executes modifications from high-level plans--allowing the main agent to focus on reasoning while delegating context-intensive operations to clean context windows. We further investigate what makes an effective editing model: observing that the prevalent find-and-replace format is error-prone, we train Qwen3-8B with GRPO to adaptively select editing modes, yielding improved editing efficiency over single-format baselines. On SWE-bench Verified, SWE-Edit improves resolved rate by 2.1% while reducing inference cost by 17.9%. We additionally propose a code editing benchmark that reliably predicts downstream agentic performance, providing practical guidance for editing model selection. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/microsoft/SWE-Edit.

AI.tldr: SWE-Edit 将代码编辑分解为 Viewer 和 Editor 两个子智能体，解决上下文耦合问题；结合 GRPO 训练 Qwen3-8B 自适应选择编辑模式，在 SWE-bench Verified 上提升 2.1% 解决率，同时降低 17.9% 推理成本。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型智能体在软件工程任务中面临上下文耦合问题：标准代码编辑界面将代码检查、修改规划和编辑执行混杂在同一上下文窗口中，导致无关信息累积，损害智能体性能。
AI.method: 将代码编辑分解为 Viewer（按需提取任务相关代码）和 Editor（从高层计划执行修改）两个专业子智能体；使用 GRPO 训练 Qwen3-8B 自适应选择编辑模式，替代易出错的查找替换格式。
AI.result: 在 SWE-bench Verified 上解决率提升 2.1%，推理成本降低 17.9%；还提出一个能可靠预测下游智能体性能的代码编辑基准。
AI.conclusion: 解耦代码编辑流程、代理上下文密集型操作到干净的上下文窗口，以及训练模型自适应选择编辑模式，能有效提升代码编辑智能体的性能和效率。

title: LLM-Guided Issue Generation from Uncovered Code Segments
summary: Developers are increasingly overwhelmed by AI-generated issue reports that lack actionability and reproducibility, eroding trust in automated bug detection tools. In this paper, we present IssueSpecter, an automated tool that finds bugs in uncovered code segments and automatically generates prioritized, actionable issue reports. IssueSpecter combines coverage analysis with LLM-based defect identification, producing structured reports complete with severity ratings, reproduction steps, and suggested fixes. We evaluate IssueSpecter on 13 actively maintained Python projects, generating 10,467 issue reports. Manual annotation of the top-130 ranked issues by IssueSpecter confirms that 84.6% of the LLM-generated issues are valid or warrant further investigation, with only 15.4% false positives. LLM-based ranking outperforms rule-based ranking by 50% at P@3 and 41% in MRR. The identified bugs cover a wide variety of types, from logic and boundary errors to security vulnerabilities and state consistency bugs. By ranking issues by priority, IssueSpecter aims to help developers focus their attention on the most impactful bugs first. Finally, we validate IssueSpecter through case studies reproducing real bugs surfaced from its generated issue reports, demonstrating its practical value for automatic bug discovery in open-source Python projects. Compared against CoverUp, a state-of-the-art coverage-driven test generation tool, IssueSpecter achieves a higher bug validity rate (81.0% vs. 76.2%) under identical evaluation conditions, using the same model and the same number of evaluated artifacts per project, while additionally providing structured issue reports with reproduction steps and candidate fixes that are immediately actionable without requiring developers to interpret generated test intent.

AI.tldr: IssueSpecter是一个自动化工具，结合覆盖率分析与LLM，检测未覆盖代码中的缺陷并生成带有严重性评级、复现步骤和修复建议的优先级排序问题报告。在13个Python项目上评估，84.6%的LLM生成问题有效，排名性能优于规则基准方法50%（P@3），有效性率高于CoverUp（81.0% vs 76.2%）。
AI.motivation: 开发者日益被缺乏可操作性和可复现性的AI生成问题报告所淹没，这削弱了对自动化缺陷检测工具的信任。现有工具无法提供优先级排序和可直接使用的问题报告。
AI.method: IssueSpecter将覆盖率分析与基于LLM的缺陷识别相结合，自动检测未覆盖代码段中的缺陷，生成包含严重性评级、复现步骤和修复建议的结构化问题报告，并对问题按优先级排序。
AI.result: 在13个Python项目上生成10,467份问题报告。手动标注显示84.6%的问题有效。LLM排名在P@3上优于规则排名50%，在MRR上优于41%。有效性率81.0%高于CoverUp的76.2%。
AI.conclusion: IssueSpecter通过提供结构化、可操作的问题报告，有效帮助开发者优先处理最关键的错误，提升了自动化缺陷检测的可信度和实用性。

title: Fast Core Identification
summary: This paper examines the computational complexity of the \emph{Core Identification Problem} (CIP) in one-sided matching markets governed by the Top Trading Cycles (TTC) algorithm. The central contribution is a formal complexity separation: this paper proves that identifying which agents receive a core allocation is strictly easier than computing the full TTC allocation. Specifically, we show that CIP can be solved in $\bigO{Ln}$ time, where $L$ is the maximum number of preferences reported per agent, by computing the leading eigenvector of a preference-derived Markov transition matrix via randomized SVD\@. For sparse preference profiles ($L = \bigO{1}$, as in the NYC school choice where $L = 12$), this yields an algorithm $\bigO{n}$. This result strictly improves on the $\bigO{n \log n}$ complexity of the full TTC allocation (\cite{SabanSethuraman2013}) and matches the $\Omg{n}$ information-theoretic lower bound, establishing asymptotic optimality. The method inherits all properties of TTC: Pareto efficiency, individual rationality, and strategy-proofness, and is robust to preference noise for sufficiently large~$n$.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了单边匹配市场中的核心识别问题(CIP)比计算完整TTC分配更简单，提出了一种基于随机SVD的O(Ln)算法，在稀疏偏好下达到O(n)，匹配信息论下界，实现了渐近最优性。
AI.motivation: 在TTC算法主导的单边匹配市场中，核心分配识别是否比完整TTC计算更容易？本文旨在建立形式化的复杂性分离。
AI.method: 构建偏好导出的马尔可夫转移矩阵，通过随机SVD计算其主导特征向量，从而以O(Ln)复杂度识别核心分配。
AI.result: CIP可在O(Ln)时间内求解，稀疏偏好下(L=O(1))达到O(n)，严格优于完整TTC的O(n log n)，且匹配Ω(n)信息论下界。
AI.conclusion: 核心识别问题在计算上严格比完整TTC分配更简单，算法具有渐近最优性，并继承了TTC的帕累托效率、个体理性、防策略性等性质，对偏好噪声具有鲁棒性。

title: ImproBR: Bug Report Improver Using LLMs
summary: Bug tracking systems play a crucial role in software maintenance, yet developers frequently struggle with low-quality user-submitted reports that omit essential details such as Steps to Reproduce (S2R), Observed Behavior (OB), and Expected Behavior (EB). We propose ImproBR, an LLM-based pipeline that automatically detects and improves bug reports by addressing missing, incomplete, and ambiguous S2R, OB, and EB sections. ImproBR employs a hybrid detector combining fine-tuned DistilBERT, heuristic analysis, and an LLM analyzer, guided by GPT-4o mini with section-specific few-shot prompts and a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipeline grounded in Minecraft Wiki domain knowledge. Evaluated on Mojira, ImproBR improved structural completeness from 7.9% to 96.4%, more than doubled the proportion of executable S2R from 28.8% to 67.6%, and raised fully reproducible bug reports from 1 to 13 across 139 challenging real-world reports.

AI.tldr: 提出ImproBR，一个基于LLM的自动化流水线，用于检测和改进Bug报告中缺失、不完整和模糊的步骤重现(S2R)、观察行为(OB)和预期行为(EB)，在Mojira数据集上将结构完整性从7.9%提升至96.4%，可执行的S2R比例从28.8%提升至67.6%。
AI.motivation: Bug跟踪系统对软件维护至关重要，但开发者经常面临用户提交的低质量报告，这些报告遗漏了S2R、OB和EB等关键细节，影响了Bug修复效率。
AI.method: 提出ImproBR流水线，包含混合检测器（微调DistilBERT、启发式分析、LLM分析器），由GPT-4o mini驱动，采用章节特定的少样本提示和基于Minecraft Wiki领域知识的检索增强生成(RAG)管道。
AI.result: 在Mojira数据集上，结构完整性从7.9%提升至96.4%，可执行S2R比例从28.8%提升至67.6%，完全可复现的Bug报告从1个增加到13个（共139个挑战性真实报告）。
AI.conclusion: ImproBR显著提高了Bug报告的质量和可复现性，证明了LLM结合领域知识在软件维护中的有效性。

title: MISES: Minimal Information Sufficiency for Effective Service
summary: Category-based coordination mechanisms allocate resources by mapping a declared service category to a fixed resource profile, without observing individual demand types. We establish three results for this class of mechanisms. First, the relative welfare gap Delta satisfies a tight two-sided bound in terms of the aggregate within-category allocation variance epsilon: (alpha/2W*)epsilon <= Delta <= (beta/2W*)epsilon. Second, the expected misreporting gain is bounded by the same epsilon without assumptions on agent strategy; demand-derived categories minimise both welfare loss and misreporting incentive simultaneously. Third, aggregate outcome metrics strictly dominate per-agent metrics for service-level detection under a homogeneity condition, for all parameter values, with a finite-sample power gap of O(1/m). At any fixed K, the demand-derived category label is the sufficient statistic for coordination: collecting per-agent data beyond the category label adds noise to the detection problem without reducing the welfare gap. However, welfare and detection impose structurally opposed demands on K: welfare improves with finer categories, detection worsens. The designer faces a feasibility band [Kmin, Kmax] and must choose K within it as a value judgement. We claim that any protocol achieving welfare gap Delta <= epsilon* and missed-detection rate <= beta* requires at least Hlb(epsilon*, beta*) bits of category entropy. We illustrate the mechanism on a synthetic population of 50,000 demand vectors and five weeks of production performance-management data from four anonymised operator networks (28,249 cells).

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于类别的协调机制，证明了福利差距与类别内分配方差之间的紧致双边界，以及需求衍生类别能同时最小化福利损失和误报激励。同时发现福利与检测对类别数量K有结构性冲突，并推导出实现给定福利和检测水平所需的最小类别熵。
AI.motivation: 现有协调机制按固定资源分配服务类别，但未观察个体需求类型，因此需要分析此类机制的理论性质，包括福利损失、误报激励和检测性能。
AI.method: 通过理论推导建立福利差距与类别内分配方差的双边界，分析误报激励的上界，并研究福利与检测在类别数量K上的结构性权衡，引入类别熵作为最小信息需求度量。
AI.result: 建立了福利差距的紧致双边界；证明需求衍生类别同时最小化福利损失和误报激励；发现福利与检测对K的要求存在结构性冲突；推导出实现给定性能所需的最小类别熵下界。
AI.conclusion: 类别协调机制存在内在的福利-检测权衡，设计者需在可行性区间内根据价值判断选择类别数量K，且任何协议都需要至少Hlb(ε*, β*)比特的类别熵。

title: FASH-iCNN: Making Editorial Fashion Identity Inspectable Through Multimodal CNN Probing
summary: Fashion AI systems routinely encode the aesthetic logic of specific houses, editors, and historical moments without disclosing it. We present FASH-iCNN, a multimodal system trained on 87,547 Vogue runway images across 15 fashion houses spanning 1991-2024 that makes this cultural logic inspectable. Given a photograph of a garment, the system recovers which house produced it, which era it belongs to, and which color tradition it reflects. A clothing-only model identifies the fashion house at 78.2% top-1 across 14 houses, the decade at 88.6% top-1, and the specific year at 58.3% top-1 across 34 years with a mean error of just 2.2 years. Probing which visual channels carry this signal reveals a sharp dissociation: removing color costs only 10.6pp of house identity accuracy, while removing texture costs 37.6pp, establishing texture and luminance as the primary carriers of editorial identity. FASH-iCNN treats editorial culture as the signal rather than background noise, identifying which houses, eras, and color traditions shaped each output so that users can see not just what the system predicts but which houses, editors, and historical moments are encoded in that prediction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FASH-iCNN系统，基于87,547张Vogue runway图像（15个时尚品牌，1991-2024年），能够从服装照片中识别品牌、年代和色彩传统，最高达78.2%的品牌识别准确率，并揭示纹理和亮度是编辑身份的主要视觉载体。
AI.motivation: 现有时尚AI系统隐含地编码特定品牌、编辑和历史时刻的美学逻辑，但未将其公开可查，导致用户无法理解预测背后的文化背景。
AI.method: 训练多模态FASH-iCNN系统，使用87,547张Vogue runway图像（15个品牌，1991-2024年），通过消融实验（去除颜色/纹理）分析视觉通道的重要性。
AI.result: 品牌识别78.2% top-1（14个品牌），年代识别88.6% top-1，年份识别58.3% top-1（34年，平均误差2.2年）。去除纹理导致准确率下降37.6pp，去除颜色仅下降10.6pp。
AI.conclusion: 纹理和亮度是编辑身份的主要载体，FASH-iCNN将编辑文化视为信号而非噪声，使系统预测背后的品牌、编辑和历史时刻可被检视。

title: Evolutionary feature selection for spiking neural network pattern classifiers
comment: Published at Portuguese Conference on Artificial Intelligence (EPIA 2005), eds. Bento et al., IEEE, pp. 24-32
summary: This paper presents an application of the biologically realistic JASTAP neural network model to classification tasks. The JASTAP neural network model is presented as an alternative to the basic multi-layer perceptron model. An evolutionary procedure previously applied to the simultaneous solution of feature selection and neural network training on standard multi-layer perceptrons is extended with JASTAP model. Preliminary results on IRIS standard data set give evidence that this extension allows the use of smaller neural networks that can handle noisier data without any degradation in classification accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于生物启发的JASTAP神经网络模型用于分类任务，通过进化算法同时优化特征选择和网络训练，在IRIS数据集上证明该模型能用更小网络处理噪声数据且保持分类精度。
AI.motivation: 探索生物启发的JASTAP模型作为传统多层感知机（MLP）的替代方案，解决分类任务中网络规模和噪声鲁棒性的平衡问题。
AI.method: 将先前用于MLP的进化特征选择与网络训练联合优化方法扩展到JASTAP模型上。
AI.result: 在IRIS标准数据集上的初步结果表明，JASTAP模型能使用更小的神经网络处理含噪数据，且分类精度不降级。
AI.conclusion: JASTAP模型在保持分类性能的同时，具备更优的噪声鲁棒性和网络小型化潜力。

title: Operating-Layer Controls for Onchain Language-Model Agents Under Real Capital
comment: 18 pages, 6 figures. Public onchain dashboard and supporting documentation linked in paper
summary: We study reliability in autonomous language-model agents that translate user mandates into validated tool actions under real capital. The setting is DX Terminal Pro, a 21-day deployment in which 3,505 user-funded agents traded real ETH in a bounded onchain market. Users configured vaults through structured controls and natural-language strategies, but only agents could choose normal buy/sell trades. The system produced 7.5M agent invocations, roughly 300K onchain actions, about $20M in volume, more than 5,000 ETH deployed, roughly 70B inference tokens, and 99.9% settlement success for policy-valid submitted transactions. Long-running agents accumulated thousands of sequential decisions, including 6,000+ prompt-state-action cycles for continuously active agents, yielding a large-scale trace from user mandate to rendered prompt, reasoning, validation, portfolio state, and settlement. Reliability did not come from the base model alone; it emerged from the operating layer around the model: prompt compilation, typed controls, policy validation, execution guards, memory design, and trace-level observability. Pre-launch testing exposed failures that text-only benchmarks rarely measure, including fabricated trading rules, fee paralysis, numeric anchoring, cadence trading, and misread tokenomics. Targeted harness changes reduced fabricated sell rules from 57% to 3%, reduced fee-led observations from 32.5% to below 10%, and increased capital deployment from 42.9% to 78.0% in an affected test population. We show that capital-managing agents should be evaluated across the full path from user mandate to prompt, validated action, and settlement.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个基于真实资本（ETH）运行21天的自主语言模型代理系统（DX Terminal Pro），展示了如何通过操作层（提示编译、策略验证、执行守卫等）而非仅依靠基础模型来确保可靠性，并报告了大规模部署数据（3505个代理、750万次调用、约2000万美元交易量、99.9%结算成功率）以及针对特定故障模式的改进成果。
AI.motivation: 研究自主语言模型代理在管理真实资本时的可靠性问题，因为此类代理需要将用户指令转化为经过验证的工具操作，而现有的文本基准测试难以衡量实际部署中出现的各种故障模式。
AI.method: 部署DX Terminal Pro系统21天，允许用户通过结构化控制和自然语言策略配置金库，代理执行买卖交易。通过操作层（提示编译、类型化控制、策略验证、执行守卫、内存设计、可观测性）而非仅依赖基础模型来提升可靠性。针对发现的故障设计目标性改进并评估效果。
AI.result: 系统产生750万次代理调用、约30万次链上操作、约2000万美元交易量、5000+ETH部署、约700亿推理token，结算成功率达99.9%。预发布测试发现传统基准难以衡量的故障（虚构交易规则、费用瘫痪、数值锚定等）。目标改进将虚构卖规则从57%降至3%，费用导向观察从32.5%降至10%以下，资本部署率从42.9%提升至78.0%。
AI.conclusion: 管理资本的代理应沿完整路径（从用户指令到提示、验证动作和结算）进行评估，可靠性源于操作层设计而非基础模型本身。

title: Hierarchical Long-Term Semantic Memory for LinkedIn's Hiring Agent
summary: Large Language Model (LLM) agents are increasingly used in real-world products, where personalized and context-aware user interactions are essential. A central enabler of such capabilities is the agent's long-term semantic memory system, which extracts implicit and explicit signals from noisy longitudinal behavioral data, stores them in a structured form, and supports low-latency retrieval. Building industrial-grade long-term memory for LLM agents raises five challenges: scalability, low-latency retrieval, privacy constraints, cross-domain generalizability, and observability. We introduce the Hierarchical Long-Term Semantic Memory (HLTM) framework, which organizes textual data into a schema-aligned memory tree that captures semantic knowledge at multiple levels of granularity, enabling scalable ingestion, privacy-aware storage, low-latency retrieval, and transparent provenance; HLTM further incorporates an adaptation mechanism to generalize across diverse use cases. Extensive evaluations on LinkedIn's Hiring Assistant show that HLTM improves answer correctness and retrieval F1 significantly by more than 10%, while significantly advancing the Pareto frontier between query and indexing latency. HLTM has been deployed in LinkedIn's Hiring Assistant to power core personalization features in production hiring workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了分层长期语义记忆（HLTM）框架，用于解决LLM代理在工业级应用中面临的长期记忆挑战，包括可扩展性、低延迟检索、隐私约束、跨领域泛化性和可观察性。HLTM通过构建模式对齐的记忆树来组织文本数据，支持多粒度语义知识存储，并在LinkedIn的Hiring Assistant中部署，使答案正确性和检索F1值提升超过10%。
AI.motivation: LLM代理在真实产品中需要个性化和上下文感知的用户交互，而现有长期语义记忆系统在工业级部署中面临可扩展性、低延迟检索、隐私约束、跨领域泛化性和可观察性这五大挑战，亟需一个全面有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出分层长期语义记忆（HLTM）框架，将文本数据组织成模式对齐的记忆树，在多个粒度级别捕获语义知识；支持可扩展的摄入、隐私感知存储、低延迟检索和透明的溯源；并包含适应机制以泛化到不同应用场景。
AI.result: 在LinkedIn的Hiring Assistant上进行的广泛评估表明，HLTM在答案正确性和检索F1值上均提升了超过10%，并显著推进了查询与索引延迟之间的帕累托前沿。
AI.conclusion: HLTM已在LinkedIn的Hiring Assistant中部署，用于驱动生产招聘流程中的核心个性化功能，证明了其在工业场景中的有效性和实用性。

title: Generalized Disguise Makeup Presentation Attack Detection Using an Attention-Guided Patch-Based Framework
summary: Despite significant advances in facial recognition systems, they remain vulnerable to face presentation attacks. Among them, disguise makeup attacks are particularly challenging, as they use advanced cosmetics, prosthetic components, and artificial materials to realistically alter facial appearance, often making detection difficult even for humans. Despite their importance, this problem remains underexplored, and publicly available datasets are limited. To address this, we propose a generalized disguise makeup presentation attack detection framework. The method adopts a two-phase design in which a style-invariant full-face model, trained with metric learning and enhanced by a whitening transformation, extracts region attention scores via Grad-CAM. These scores guide a patch-based phase that performs localized analysis using region-specific subnetworks trained with metric learning for fine-grained discrimination. We also construct a new, diverse dataset of live and disguise makeup faces collected under real-world conditions, covering variations in subjects, environments, and disguise materials. Experimental results demonstrate strong generalization across both the collected dataset and SIW-Mv2, achieving 8.97% ACER and 9.76% EER on the collected dataset, and 0% ACER on Obfuscation and Impersonation and 1.34% on Cosmetics attacks of SIW-Mv2. The proposed method consistently outperforms prior works while maintaining robust performance across other spoof types.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种两阶段的伪装化妆呈现攻击检测框架，结合全域风格不变模型（度量学习+白化变换+Grad-CAM区域注意力）和局部补丁分析子网络，并构建了真实场景下的多样化数据集。实验在自建数据集上达到8.97% ACER，在SIW-Mv2上对Obfuscation和Impersonation攻击达到0% ACER。
AI.motivation: 人脸识别系统易受呈现攻击，其中伪装化妆攻击（使用化妆品、假体等改变面部外观）极具挑战性且难以检测，但该问题研究不足，公开数据集有限。
AI.method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段是风格不变的全脸模型，使用度量学习训练并辅以白化变换，通过Grad-CAM提取区域注意力分数；第二阶段利用注意力分数引导进行局部补丁分析，使用区域特定的子网络结合度量学习进行细粒度判别。同时构建了包含真实场景下活体与伪装化妆面孔的新数据集。
AI.result: 自建数据集：ACER 8.97%，EER 9.76%；SIW-Mv2：Obfuscation和Impersonation攻击ACER 0%，Cosmetics攻击ACER 1.34%。一致优于先前方法，并在其他欺骗类型上保持稳健性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种泛化能力强的伪装化妆呈现攻击检测框架，通过全局-局部双阶段设计和度量学习实现了领先的检测性能，填补了该领域数据集和方法的空白。

title: A Multimodal and Explainable Machine Learning Approach to Diagnosing Multi-Class Ejection Fraction from Electrocardiograms
summary: Left ventricular ejection fraction (LVEF) assessment depends on echocardiography, limiting access in primary care and resource-constrained settings. We developed a multimodal machine-learning framework that combines engineered 12-lead ECG timeseries features with structured EHR variables to classify LVEF into four clinically used strata: normal (>50%), mildly reduced (40-50%), moderately reduced (30-40%), and severely reduced (<30%). To support model explainability, we identified the most influential ECG and EHR features via SHAP attributions. Using retrospective data from Hartford HealthCare, we trained XGBoost models on 36,784 ECG-echocardiogram pairs from 30,952 outpatients and evaluated temporal generalizability on 19,966 ECGs from a subsequent period. The multimodal model achieved one-vs-rest AUROCs of 0.95 (severe), 0.92 (moderate), 0.82 (mild), and 0.91 (normal), outperforming ECG-only and EHR-only baselines, and maintained performance under temporal validation. This work supports ECG-based, multimodal LVEF stratification as a practical screening and triage aid to prioritize confirmatory imaging where resources are limited.

AI.tldr: 本研究开发了一种结合12导联心电图时序特征与结构化电子健康记录变量的多模态机器学习框架，用于将左心室射血分数（LVEF）分为四个临床等级（正常＞50%、轻度降低40-50%、中度降低30-40%、重度降低＜30%）。基于Hartford HealthCare的回顾性数据，XGBoost模型在36,784对ECG-超声心动图数据上训练，并在19,966条后续ECG上验证。多模态模型在重度、中度、轻度和正常等级上的AUROC分别达到0.95、0.92、0.82和0.91，优于单一模态基线，且具有时间泛化能力。
AI.motivation: LVEF评估依赖于超声心动图，在初级医疗和资源受限环境中可及性有限，亟需一种更易获取的筛查手段。
AI.method: 提出一种多模态机器学习框架，融合12导联ECG时序工程特征与结构化EHR变量，使用XGBoost分类器对LVEF进行四级分层，并通过SHAP进行特征可解释性分析。
AI.result: 多模态模型在四个等级上分别达到0.95（重度）、0.92（中度）、0.82（轻度）和0.91（正常）的AUROC，优于单一ECG或EHR基线模型，并在时间验证中表现稳定。
AI.conclusion: 基于ECG的多模态LVEF分层可作为一种实用的筛查和分诊工具，在资源有限的情况下优先安排确认性影像学检查。

title: Analysing Lightweight Large Language Models for Biomedical Named Entity Recognition on Diverse Ouput Formats
comment: LREC 2026 - Language Resources and Evaluation Conference, May 2026, Palma De Majorque, Spain
summary: Despite their strong linguistic capabilities, Large Language Models (LLMs) are computationally demanding and require substantial resources for fine-tuning, which is unadapted to privacy and budget constraints of many healthcare settings. To address this, we present an experimental analysis focused on Biomedical Named Entity Recognition using lightweight LLMs, we evaluate the impact of different output formats on model performance. The results reveal that lightweight LLMs can achieve competitive performance compared to the larger models, highlighting their potential as lightweight yet effective alternatives for biomedical information extraction. Our analysis shows that instruction tuning over many distinct formats does not improve performance, but identifies several format consistently associated with better performance.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了轻量级大语言模型在生物医学命名实体识别中的应用，发现其在轻量化条件下能达到与大型模型相当的竞争力，并揭示了不同输出格式对性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型计算资源需求高、微调成本大，难以满足医疗场景中的隐私和预算限制，因此需要探索轻量级替代方案。
AI.method: 对轻量级LLM进行生物医学命名实体识别的实验分析，评估不同输出格式对模型性能的影响。
AI.result: 轻量级LLM可达到与大型模型相当的竞争性能；指令微调在多种不同格式上并未提升性能，但某些特定格式一致性地与更好性能相关。
AI.conclusion: 轻量级LLM可作为生物医学信息提取的有效替代方案，且输出格式的选择对性能有显著影响。

title: AI Observability for Large Language Model Systems: A Multi-Layer Analysis of Monitoring Approaches from Confidence Calibration to Infrastructure Tracing
summary: The deployment of large language models (LLMs) in production environments has created an urgent need for observability systems that span the full stack -- from model internals to GPU kernels. Yet existing monitoring approaches address isolated layers of this stack, and no comprehensive analysis has examined how these techniques relate, overlap, or complement each other. This paper presents a structured analysis of five recent research contributions (2025-2026) that collectively define the emerging landscape of AI observability: confidence calibration via reinforcement learning (MIT), internal state monitoring through propositional probes (UC Berkeley), chain-of-thought monitorability evaluation (OpenAI), autonomous cloud operations benchmarking (Microsoft Research, UC Berkeley, UIUC), and non-intrusive inference-level tracing (TRUFFLD). We organize these contributions into a five-layer observability taxonomy, synthesize their key findings into a unified comparison, and identify four critical gaps that remain unaddressed. We further contextualize these research directions against practical operational observability systems that translate infrastructure telemetry into actionable insights for site reliability teams. Our analysis reveals that while individual monitoring layers have matured rapidly, the integration challenge -- connecting model-level confidence signals with infrastructure-level anomalies into coherent operational intelligence -- remains the defining open problem for the field.

AI.tldr: 本文系统分析了2025-2026年间五项前沿研究，提出了AI可观测性的五层分类体系，指出现有方法虽在各层取得进展，但跨层整合（从模型内部置信度到基础设施异常的连贯运维智能）仍是该领域面临的核心开放问题。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在生产环境中的部署迫切需要覆盖全栈（从模型内部到GPU内核）的可观测性系统，但现有监控方法仅关注孤立层次，缺乏对它们如何关联、重叠或互补的系统性分析。
AI.method: 对五项近期研究贡献（2025-2026）进行结构化分析：MIT的强化学习置信度校准、UC Berkeley的内部状态命题探针、OpenAI的思维链可监控性评估、微软/UC Berkeley/UIUC的云端自主运维基准测试，以及TRUFFLD的非侵入式推理层追踪。将这些贡献组织为五层可观测性分类，进行统一比较，并识别出四个未被解决的关键缺口。
AI.result: 建立了五层可观测性分类体系；识别了四个关键缺口；发现各监控层已快速成熟，但跨层整合（即连接模型级置信度信号与基础设施级异常）仍未解决。
AI.conclusion: 各监控层发展迅猛，但如何将模型内部的置信度信号与基础设施层面的异常信息连接起来，形成连贯的运维智能，是当前最核心的未解决问题。

title: On the Learning Curves of Revenue Maximization
comment: To appear in the 58th ACM Symposium on Theory of Computing (STOC 2026)
summary:
Learning curves are a fundamental primitive in supervised learning, describing how an algorithm's performance improves with more data and providing a quantitative measure of its generalization ability. Formally, a learning curve plots the decay of an algorithm's error for a fixed underlying distribution as a function of the number of training samples. Prior work on revenue-maximizing learning algorithms, starting with the seminal work of Cole and Roughgarden [STOC, 2014], adopts a distribution-free perspective, which parallels the PAC learning framework in learning theory. This approach evaluates performance against the hardest possible sequence of valuation distributions, one for each sample size, effectively defining the upper envelope of learning curves over all possible distributions, thus leading to error bounds that do not capture the shape of the learning curves.
  In this work we initiate the study of learning curves for revenue maximization and provide a near-complete characterization of their rate of decay in the basic setting of a single item and a single buyer. In the absence of any restriction on the valuation distribution, we show that there exists a Bayes-consistent algorithm, meaning that its learning curve converges to zero for any arbitrary valuation distribution as the number of samples $n \to \infty$. However, this convergence must be arbitrarily slow, even if the optimal revenue is finite. In contrast, if the optimal revenue is achieved by a finite price, then the optimal rate of decay is roughly $1/\sqrt{n}$. Finally, for distributions supported on discrete sets of values, we show that learning curves decay almost exponentially fast, a rate unattainable under the PAC framework.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了收益最大化问题的学习曲线，首次刻画了在单物品单买家场景下学习曲线的衰减速率，发现无约束分布下收敛速度任意慢，有最优有限价格时速率约为1/√n，离散支持分布下可达指数级衰减。
AI.motivation: 现有收益最大化学习算法采用分布无关视角，仅考虑最坏情况下的误差上界，无法捕捉学习曲线的实际形状（即随样本量增加误差的衰减速率）。作者希望填补这一空白，系统研究收益最大化中学习曲线的衰减率。
AI.method: 理论分析与证明。针对单物品单买家场景，分别考虑了三种情形：无任何分布约束、最优收益由有限价格实现、以及估值分布为离散集支撑，分别推导了学习曲线衰减的最优速率上下界。
AI.result: 1) 存在贝叶斯一致的算法使学习曲线收敛到零，但收敛速度可以任意慢；2) 若最优收益由有限价格实现，最优衰减速率约为1/√n；3) 离散分布下学习曲线几乎呈指数级衰减，这是PAC框架无法达到的速率。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次刻画了收益最大化中学习曲线的衰减速率，表明分布结构对收敛速度有决定性影响，且在某些情形下学习曲线能提供比PAC框架更紧的刻画。

title: MesonGS++: Post-training Compression of 3D Gaussian Splatting with Hyperparameter Searching
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) achieves high-quality novel view synthesis with real-time rendering, but its storage cost remains prohibitive for practical deployment. Existing post-training compression methods still rely on many coupled hyperparameters across pruning, transformation, quantization, and entropy coding, making it difficult to control the final compressed size and fully exploit the rate-distortion trade-off. We propose MesonGS++, a size-aware post-training codec for 3D Gaussian compression. On the codec side, MesonGS++ combines joint importance-based pruning, octree geometry coding, attribute transformation, selective vector quantization for higher-degree spherical harmonics, and group-wise mixed-precision quantization with entropy coding. On the configuration side, it treats the reserve ratio and bit-width allocation as the dominant rate-distortion knobs and jointly optimizes them under a target storage budget via discrete sampling and 0--1 integer linear programming. We further propose a linear size estimator and a CUDA parallel quantization operator to accelerate the hyperparameter searching process. Extensive experiments show that MesonGS++ achieves over 34$\times$ compression while preserving rendering fidelity, outperforming state-of-the-art post-training methods and accurately meeting target size budgets. Remarkably, without any training, MesonGS++ can even surpass the PSNR of vanilla 3DGS at a 20$\times$ compression rate on the Stump scene. Our code is available at https://github.com/mmlab-sigs/mesongs_plus

AI.tldr: MesonGS++ 提出了一种面向存储预算的3D高斯后训练压缩编解码器，通过结合剪枝、八叉树编码、向量量化、混合精度量化和熵编码等组件，并利用离散采样和整数线性规划优化保留比例与位宽分配，在34倍压缩率下保持渲染质量，甚至能在20倍压缩时超越原始3DGS的PSNR。
AI.motivation: 3DGS虽能实现高质量实时新视角合成，但存储成本过高；现有后训练压缩方法依赖大量耦合超参数，难以精确控制最终压缩大小并充分权衡率失真性能。
AI.method: (1) 编解码端：联合基于重要性的剪枝、八叉树几何编码、属性变换、高阶球谐函数的选择性向量量化、分组混合精度量化与熵编码；(2) 配置端：将保留比例和位宽分配作为主导率失真旋钮，通过离散采样和0-1整数线性规划在目标存储预算下联合优化；(3) 提出线性尺寸估计器和CUDA并行量化算子加速超参数搜索。
AI.result: 实现34倍以上的压缩且保持渲染保真度，优于现有后训练方法，并能精确满足目标存储预算；在Stump场景20倍压缩率下，无需训练即可超越原始3DGS的PSNR。
AI.conclusion: MesonGS++ 是一种高效、可控的3DGS后训练压缩方案，在极低存储开销下仍能保持甚至提升渲染质量，且具备精确的尺寸预算控制能力，代码已开源。

title: Population Dynamics in ARIEL Robotics Systems Featuring Embodied Evolution via Spatial Mating Mechanisms
summary: We present a Spatially Embedded Evolutionary Algorithm where robot individuals exist in a physically simulated 2D environment, must navigate to encounter potential mates, and compete for survival under various spatially-aware selection pressures. Using HyperNEAT evolved neural controllers for ARIEL gecko-inspired quadrupeds in MuJoCo, we investigate how spatial structure fundamentally alters evolutionary dynamics. Our experiments show a modest 4.9% difference in peak fitness between proximity-based and random pairing possibly within stochastic variation while combining spatial parent selection with stochastic death selection produces unstable population dynamics. We discover a continuous phase transition in energy-based selection experiments, with critical zone count separating extinction-dominated and explosion-dominated regimes. Our density-dependent death selection mechanism achieves 97% completion rates but causes fitness decline, revealing a fundamental dilemma where decoupled mechanisms produce bistable dynamics, positively coupled mechanisms create counter-selection pressures, and only deterministic fitness-based selection maintains stability. These findings provide important constraints for future spatial EA design.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了空间嵌入进化算法（SEEA），通过在物理模拟2D环境中让机器人个体导航寻找配偶并竞争生存，研究了空间结构如何根本性地改变进化动力学。实验发现：近亲配对与随机配对峰值适应度仅差4.9%（可能属随机波动）；能量选择实验存在连续相变；密度依赖死亡选择虽达到97%完成率但导致适应度下降。揭示了不同耦合机制下的稳定性困境。
AI.motivation: 现有进化算法大多忽略空间结构对进化动力学的影响，而现实世界中的生物进化本质上是空间嵌入的。研究旨在理解空间因素（如距离、密度、能量约束）如何影响进化搜索过程及其稳定性。
AI.method: 使用HyperNEAT进化神经网络控制器，驱动ARIEL壁虎仿生四足机器人在MuJoCo物理模拟的2D环境中运动。设计了多种空间感知选择压力（基于距离配对、能量约束、密度依赖死亡等），比较不同机制下的进化动力学。
AI.result: 1) 近亲配对与随机配对仅差4.9%，可能属随机噪声；2) 结合空间父代选择与随机死亡选择导致种群动态不稳定；3) 能量选择实验发现连续相变（临界区域分隔灭绝主导与爆炸主导）；4) 密度依赖死亡选择完成率97%但适应度下降；5) 解耦机制产生双稳态，正耦合产生反选择压力，仅确定性适应度选择维持稳定。
AI.conclusion: 空间结构对进化算法有根本性影响，但不同选择机制的耦合方式决定了系统稳定性。未来空间进化算法设计需谨慎考虑机制间的相互作用，避免不稳定的动力学行为。

title: Distill-Belief: Closed-Loop Inverse Source Localization and Characterization in Physical Fields
summary: {Closed-loop inverse source localization and characterization (ISLC) requires a mobile agent to select measurements that localize sources and infer latent field parameters under strict time constraints.} {The core challenge lies in the belief-space objective: valid uncertainty estimation requires expensive Bayesian inference, whereas using fast learned belief model leads to reward hacking, in which the policy exploits approximation errors rather than actually reducing uncertainty.} {We propose \textbf{Distill-Belief}, a teacher--student framework that decouples correctness from efficiency. A Bayes-correct particle-filter teacher maintains the posterior and supplies a dense information-gain signal, while a compact student distills the posterior into belief statistics for control and an uncertainty certificate for stopping. At deployment, only the student is used, yielding constant per-step cost.} {Experiments on seven field modalities and two stress tests show that Distill-Belief consistently reduces sensing cost and improves success, posterior contraction, and estimation accuracy over baselines, while mitigating reward hacking.}

AI.tldr: 提出Distill-Belief师生框架，用贝叶斯粒子滤波教师提供精确信息增益信号，紧凑学生蒸馏后验用于控制和停止决策，在7种场模态中降低感知成本、提高估计精度并缓解奖励黑客问题。
AI.motivation: 闭环逆源定位与表征（ISLC）中，移动智能体需在严格时间约束下选择测量来定位源并推断潜在场参数。核心挑战在于信念空间目标函数：有效的不确定性估计需要昂贵的贝叶斯推理，而使用快速学习的信念模型会导致奖励黑客问题（策略利用近似误差而非真正降低不确定性）。
AI.method: 提出Distill-Belief教师-学生框架：1）贝叶斯正确的粒子滤波教师维护后验并提供密集的信息增益信号；2）紧凑的学生网络将后验蒸馏为用于控制的信念统计量和用于停止的不确定性证书；3）部署时仅使用学生模型，保持每步常数计算成本。
AI.result: 在7种场模态和2个压力测试中，Distill-Belief相比基线持续降低感知成本，提高成功率、后验收缩和估计精度，同时缓解奖励黑客问题。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦正确性和效率，教师-学生框架能有效解决信念空间目标函数中的准确性-效率权衡，实现既贝叶斯合理又计算高效的在线决策。

title: ProMax: Exploring the Potential of LLM-derived Profiles with Distribution Shaping for Recommender Systems
summary: The remarkable text understanding and generation capabilities of large language models (LLMs) have revitalized the field of general recommendation based on implicit user feedback. Rather than deploying LLMs directly as recommendation models, a more flexible paradigm leverages their ability to interpret users' historical interactions and semantic contexts to extract structured profiles that characterize user preferences. These profiles can be further transformed into actionable high-dimensional representations, serving as powerful signals to augment and strengthen recommendation models. However, the mechanism by which such profiles enhance recommendation performance within the feature space remains insufficiently understood. Moreover, existing studies predominantly rely on nonlinear alignment and fusion strategies to incorporate these profiles, which often lead to semantic loss and fail to fully exploit their potential. To address these limitations, we revisit profiles from a retrieval perspective and propose a simple yet effective recommendation framework built upon distribution shaping (ProMax) in this paper. We begin by employing dense retrieval to uncover the collaborative relationships between user and item profiles within the feature space. Based on this insight, we introduce a dual distribution-reshaping process, in which the profile distribution acts as a guiding signal to steer the recommendation model toward learning user preferences for unseen items beyond the scope of observed interactions. We apply ProMax to four classic recommendation methods on three public datasets. The results indicate that ProMax substantially improves base model performance and outperforms existing LLM-based recommendation approaches.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ProMax框架，从检索视角重新审视用户画像，通过双重分布重塑过程将画像分布作为引导信号，帮助推荐模型学习用户对未见过物品的偏好，在三个公共数据集上显著提升四种经典推荐方法的性能，并优于现有基于LLM的推荐方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的画像增强推荐方法存在两大问题：1）画像在特征空间中增强推荐性能的机制尚不清晰；2）现有非线性对齐与融合策略导致语义损失，未能充分利用画像潜力。
AI.method: 提出ProMax框架：1）采用稠密检索发现用户与物品画像在特征空间中的协同关系；2）引入双重分布重塑过程，将画像分布作为引导信号，使推荐模型学习用户对未见过物品的偏好。
AI.result: 在三个公共数据集上应用到四种经典推荐方法，ProMax显著提升基模型性能，并优于现有基于LLM的推荐方法。
AI.conclusion: 从检索视角重新审视画像作用，简单的分布重塑策略比复杂的非线性对齐融合更有效，为LLM增强推荐提供了新思路。

title: Report of the 5th PVUW Challenge: Towards More Diverse Modalities in Pixel-Level Understanding
comment: Official Report of the 5th PVUW Challenge on CVPR 2026
summary: This report summarizes the objectives, datasets, and top-performing methodologies of the 2026 Pixel-level Video Understanding in the Wild (PVUW) Challenge, hosted at CVPR 2026, which evaluates state-of-the-art models under highly unconstrained conditions. To provide a comprehensive assessment, the 2026 edition features three specialized tracks: the MOSE track for tracking objects within densely cluttered and severely occluded scenarios; the MeViS-Text track for localizing targets via motion-focused linguistic expressions; and the newly inaugurated MeViS-Audio track, which pioneers acoustic-driven object segmentation. By introducing previously unreleased challenging data and analyzing the cutting-edge, multimodal solutions submitted by participants, this report highlights the community's latest technical advancements and charts promising future directions for robust video scene comprehension.

AI.tldr: 本文总结了CVPR 2026举办的PVUW挑战赛，包含三个赛道：MOSE（密集遮挡场景下的目标跟踪）、MeViS-Text（运动聚焦语言表达的目标定位）和新增的MeViS-Audio（声学驱动目标分割），并分析了参赛者的多模态解决方案。
AI.motivation: 在高度无约束条件下评估视频理解模型的性能，推动鲁棒的视频场景理解技术发展。
AI.method: 设置三个专门赛道，引入未公开的挑战性数据，收集并分析参赛者提交的多模态前沿方案。
AI.result: 展示了社区在密集遮挡跟踪、运动语言定位和声学驱动分割等方面的最新技术进展。
AI.conclusion: 为视频场景理解指明了有前景的未来方向，强调了多模态融合的重要性。

title: A Randomized PDE Energy driven Iterative Framework for Efficient and Stable PDE Solutions
summary: Efficient and stable solution of partial differential equations (PDEs) is central to scientific and engineering applications, yet existing numerical solvers rely heavily on matrix based discretizations, while learning based methods require costly training and often suffer from limited generalization. In this work, we proposes a PDE energy driven framework that solves PDEs through physically constrained diffusion iterations, without relying on classical matrix based finite element assembly or data driven neural network training. The proposed method evolves arbitrary random initial fields through PDE energy driven implicit iterations combined with Gaussian smoothing, while strictly enforcing boundary conditions at each iteration. The proposed formulation is applied to representative one dimensional Poisson, Heat, and viscous Burgers equations, covering both steady state and transient problems. Numerical results demonstrate stable convergence to the unique physical solution from random initializations, with accurate resolution of sharp gradients and controlled Mean Squared Error (MSE) across a wide range of discretization parameters. Detailed comparisons with analytical solutions indicate that the framework achieves competitive accuracy and stability. Overall, the proposed framework provides a fast, flexible, and physically consistent alternative to traditional numerical solvers, offering a potential pathway for scalable PDE solutions in both research and engineering applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于PDE能量驱动的物理约束扩散迭代框架，无需传统矩阵组装或数据驱动训练，即可高效稳定地求解偏微分方程。在一维Poisson、Heat和Burgers方程上验证，从随机初始场稳定收敛到唯一物理解，精度和稳定性具有竞争力。
AI.motivation: 传统数值求解器依赖矩阵离散化，计算成本高；基于学习的方法需要大量训练且泛化能力有限。为解决这些局限，作者希望提出一种无需矩阵组装和训练数据的物理约束求解方法。
AI.method: 提出PDE能量驱动的隐式迭代框架，结合高斯平滑和严格的边界条件约束，从任意随机初始场演化求解PDE。核心包括：能量驱动迭代 + 高斯平滑 + 边界条件强制执行。
AI.result: 在一维Poisson、Heat和Burgers方程上验证，从随机初始场稳定收敛到唯一解，能准确解析尖锐梯度，MSE控制在较小范围，与解析解对比精度和稳定性具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 该框架提供了一种快速、灵活、物理一致的替代方案，无需矩阵组装和数据训练，为可扩展的PDE求解开辟了新途径。

title: One Word at a Time: Incremental Completion Decomposition Breaks LLM Safety
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are trained to refuse harmful requests, yet they remain vulnerable to jailbreak attacks that exploit weaknesses in conversational safety mechanisms. We introduce Incremental Completion Decomposition (ICD), a trajectory-based jailbreak strategy that elicits a sequence of single-word continuations related to a malicious request before eliciting the full response. In addition, we propose variants of ICD by manually picking or model-generating the one-word continuation, as well as prefilling when eliciting the full model response in the final step. We systematically evaluate these variants across a broad set of model families, demonstrating superior Attack Success Rate (ASR) on AdvBench, JailbreakBench, and StrongREJECT compared to existing methods. In addition, we provide a theoretical account of why ICD is effective and present mechanistic evidence that successful attack trajectories systematically suppress refusal-related representations and shift activations away from safety-aligned states.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为增量完成分解（ICD）的越狱攻击策略，通过诱导LLM先生成一系列与恶意请求相关的单个词续写，再获取完整回答，从而绕过安全机制。实验表明ICD在多个基准测试上优于现有方法，并从表征层面解释了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM虽然经过安全训练能拒绝有害请求，但仍存在被越狱攻击利用的安全漏洞，需要探索新的攻击方式来揭示这些弱点。
AI.method: 提出ICD策略，将恶意请求分解为一系列单词语续写轨迹，再请求完整回复；并设计三种变体：手动选择单词语、模型生成单词语、以及在最终步骤中使用预填充技术。
AI.result: 在AdvBench、JailbreakBench和StrongREJECT基准上，ICD及其变体相比现有方法取得了更高的攻击成功率（ASR），并在多个模型家族上验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: ICD通过分解请求为逐步的语义轨迹，系统性抑制了LLM的拒绝相关表征，使模型激活偏离安全对齐状态，从而成功绕过安全机制。

title: LLM-Assisted Empirical Software Engineering: Systematic Literature Review and Research Agenda
summary:
Context: Empirical Software Engineering (ESE) faces increasing challenges due to data scale, methodological complexity, and reproducibility concerns. Large Language Models (LLMs) have emerged as promising tools to support empirical workflows, yet their use remains fragmented, with no comprehensive synthesis to guide responsible adoption.
  Aims: This study analyzes how LLMs are used in ESE, examining supported tasks, phases of the empirical lifecycle, integration into workflows, reported benefits and limitations, and the extent of reproducibility-related reporting. It also identifies gaps and future research directions.
  Method: We conducted a systematic literature review of peer-reviewed papers (2020-2025) across 12 leading software engineering venues, resulting in 50 primary studies analyzed through qualitative and quantitative synthesis.
  Results: We identified 69 LLM-assisted tasks, mainly in mining software repositories and controlled experiments, focusing on classification, filtering, and evaluation. LLMs are used across multiple phases but are concentrated in data processing and analysis. Their integration is largely automation-oriented, with limited decision-support use. Benefits emphasize efficiency and scalability, while limitations include hallucinations, inconsistency, prompt sensitivity, and reproducibility issues. Reporting practices are often incomplete.
  Conclusion: LLM use in ESE is growing but remains automation-driven, with gaps in human-centered integration and transparency. We outline implications and research agenda for responsible use.

AI.tldr: 本文通过系统性文献综述（2020-2025年，50篇论文），系统分析了LLM在实证软件工程（ESE）中的应用现状，识别出69项LLM辅助任务，主要集中在数据挖掘与受控实验中的分类、过滤和评估，并指出了自动化驱动、透明度不足等关键问题。
AI.motivation: ESE面临数据规模、方法复杂性和可复现性挑战，LLM虽被用于支持实证工作流，但应用零散，缺乏综合性指导框架。本研究旨在系统梳理LLM在ESE中的应用现状、支持的任务、整合方式、优劣及报告实践，识别差距与未来方向。
AI.method: 系统文献综述（SLR），检索12个顶级软件工程会议/期刊（2020-2025），最终纳入50篇主要研究，采用定性与定量综合分析方法。
AI.result: 识别出69项LLM辅助任务，主要集中在软件仓库挖掘和受控实验，侧重于分类、过滤和评估；LLM覆盖实证生命周期多个阶段但集中于数据处理与分析；整合方式以自动化为主，决策支持有限；优势体现在效率与可扩展性，局限包括幻觉、不一致性、提示敏感性和可复现性问题；报告实践不完整。
AI.conclusion: LLM在ESE中的应用正在增长但以自动化驱动为主，缺乏以人为中心的整合和透明度。研究提出了负责任使用的启示和研究议程。

title: Text-Utilization for Encoder-dominated Speech Recognition Models
summary: This paper investigates efficient methods for utilizing text-only data to improve speech recognition, focusing on encoder-dominated models that facilitate faster recognition. We provide a comprehensive comparison of techniques to integrate text-only data, including modality matching and dynamic downsampling to reach text-level representations within the encoder. Our experiments on the LibriSpeech corpus show that a larger encoder with a smaller decoder can equal or surpass the performance of architectures with larger decoders. We demonstrate that simple configurations, such as random duration models, are often more effective than complex alternatives, significantly simplifying the training pipeline. All code and recipes are made publicly available.

AI.tldr: 研究如何高效利用纯文本数据提升语音识别性能，重点探索编码器主导模型。通过模态匹配和动态下采样等技术，在LibriSpeech语料库上证明更大编码器+更小解码器架构可媲美甚至超越大解码器模型，且简单随机时长模型比复杂方案更有效。
AI.motivation: 探索利用纯文本数据提升语音识别效率的方法，特别是针对编码器主导的快速语音识别模型，以降低对大规模配对语音-文本数据的依赖。
AI.method: 采用模态匹配和动态下采样技术，将文本数据转换为编码器内部的文本级表示；对比不同编码器-解码器架构比例；引入随机时长模型简化训练流程。
AI.result: 在LibriSpeech上，大编码器+小编码器架构性能等同或超越大解码器架构；简单的随机时长模型比复杂替代方案更有效。
AI.conclusion: 纯文本数据可通过简单有效的方法提升语音识别性能，编码器主导架构和简化训练策略是可行方向。

title: Evaluating Strategic Reasoning in Forecasting Agents
summary: Forecasting benchmarks produce accuracy leaderboards but little insight into why some forecasters are more accurate than others. We introduce Bench to the Future 2 (BTF-2), 1,417 pastcasting questions with a frozen 15M-document research corpus in which agents reproducibly research and forecast offline, producing full reasoning traces. BTF-2 detects accuracy differences of 0.004 Brier score, and can distinguish differential agent strengths in research vs. judgment. We build a forecaster 0.011 Brier more accurate than any single frontier agent, and use it to evaluate agent strategic reasoning without hindsight bias. We find the better forecaster differs primarily in its pre-mortem analysis of its blind spots and consideration of black swans. Expert human forecasters found the dominant strategic reasoning failures of frontier agents are in assessing political and business leaders' incentives, judging their likelihood to follow through on stated plans, and modeling institutional processes.

AI.tldr: BTF-2是一个包含1,417道预测题和1,500万文档语料库的预测试基准，能够检测0.004 Brier分数的准确率差异，并通过预检盲点和黑天鹅分析将预测准确率提升0.011 Brier分数，发现前沿代理在评估领导者动机和制度流程方面存在系统性缺陷。
AI.motivation: 现有预测基准仅提供准确率排名，无法解释为何某些预测者更准确。
AI.method: 构建BTF-2基准，包含1,417道题和冻结的1,500万文档语料库，使代理可复现地研究和预测，并产生完整推理轨迹。
AI.result: BTF-2可检测0.004 Brier分数差异，构建的预测器比任何单一前沿代理准确0.011 Brier，改进主要来自预检盲点和黑天鹅分析。
AI.conclusion: 前沿代理在评估领导者动机、判断执行计划可能性及建模制度流程方面存在系统性策略推理缺陷。

title: TimeMM: Time-as-Operator Spectral Filtering for Dynamic Multimodal Recommendation
summary: Multimodal recommendation improves user modeling by integrating collaborative signals with heterogeneous item content. In real applications, user interests evolve over time and exhibit nonstationary dynamics, where different preference factors change at different rates. This challenge is amplified in multimodal settings because visual and textual cues can dominate decisions under different temporal regimes. Despite strong progress, most multimodal recommenders still rely on static interaction graphs or coarse temporal heuristics, which limits their ability to model continuous preference evolution with fine-grained temporal adaptation. To address these limitations, we propose TimeMM, a time-conditioned spectral filtering framework for dynamic multimodal recommendation. TimeMM instantiates Time-as-Operator by mapping interaction recency to a family of parametric temporal kernels that reweight edges on the user--item graph, producing component-specific representations without explicit eigendecomposition. To capture non-stationary interests, we introduce Adaptive Spectral Filtering that mixes the operator bank according to temporal context, yielding prediction-specific effective spectral responses. To account for modality-specific temporal sensitivity, we further propose Spectral-Aware Modality Routing that calibrates visual and textual contributions conditioned on the same temporal context. Finally, a ranking-space Spectral Diversity Regularization encourages complementary expert behaviors and prevents filter-bank collapse. Extensive experiments on real-world benchmarks demonstrate that TimeMM consistently outperforms state-of-the-art multimodal recommenders while maintaining linear-time scalability.

AI.tldr: 提出TimeMM，一个时间条件谱滤波框架，通过时间算子映射、自适应谱滤波和模态路由，实现动态多模态推荐中用户兴趣的非平稳演化建模。
AI.motivation: 现有大多数多模态推荐系统依赖静态交互图或粗粒度时间启发式方法，无法建模用户兴趣的连续演化及模态随时间的变化差异。
AI.method: 1) Time-as-Operator：用参数化时间核重加权用户-物品图边；2) Adaptive Spectral Filtering：根据时间上下文混合算子库；3) Spectral-Aware Modality Routing：校准不同模态贡献；4) Spectral Diversity Regularization：防止滤波器坍塌。
AI.result: 在真实基准上持续超越现有最先进多模态推荐方法，同时保持线性时间可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: TimeMM通过时间条件谱滤波有效捕捉用户兴趣的非平稳动态演化及模态间的时间敏感性差异，为动态多模态推荐提供了高效且可扩展的新范式。

title: Evaluating the Alignment Between GeoAI Explanations and Domain Knowledge in Satellite-Based Flood Mapping
summary: The increasing number of satellites has improved the temporal resolution of Earth observation, making satellite-based flood mapping a promising approach for operational flood monitoring. Deep learning-based approaches for flood mapping using satellite imagery, an important application within Geospatial Artificial Intelligence (GeoAI), have shown improved predictive performance by learning complex spatial and spectral patterns from large volumes of remote sensing data. However, the opaque decision-making processes of deep learning models remain a major barrier to their integration into critical scientific and operational workflows. This highlights the need for a systematic assessment of whether model explanations align with established domain knowledge in remote sensing. To address this research gap, this study introduces the ADAGE (Alignment between Domain Knowledge And GeoAI Explanation Evaluation) framework. The proposed framework is designed to systematically evaluate how well explanations of deep learning models align with established remote sensing knowledge, particularly regarding the distinctive spectral properties of the Earth's surface. The ADAGE framework employs Channel-Group SHAP (SHapley Additive exPlanations) method to estimate the contributions of grouped input channels to pixel-level predictions. Experiments on two satellite-based flood mapping tasks demonstrate that the ADAGE framework can (1) quantitatively assess the alignment between model explanations and reference explanations derived from domain knowledge and (2) help domain experts identify misaligned explanations through alignment scores. This study contributes to bridging the gap between explainability and domain knowledge in GeoAI for Earth observation, enhancing the applicability of GeoAI models in scientific and operational workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ADAGE框架，用于系统评估深度学习模型在卫星洪水制图任务中的解释是否与遥感领域知识（尤其是光谱特性知识）对齐，通过Channel-Group SHAP方法量化群组通道贡献，并借助对齐分数帮助专家识别解释偏差。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型在卫星洪水制图中表现优异，但其决策过程不透明，阻碍了其在关键科学和业务工作流中的应用。现有可解释性研究缺乏对模型解释是否与遥感领域知识（如地物光谱特性）一致的系统性评估。
AI.method: 提出ADAGE框架，采用Channel-Group SHAP方法估计分组输入通道对像素级预测的贡献，并通过对齐分数量化模型解释与领域知识参考解释之间的一致性。
AI.result: 在两个卫星洪水制图任务上的实验表明，ADAGE框架能够：(1) 定量评估模型解释与领域知识参考解释之间的对齐程度；(2) 帮助领域专家通过对齐分数识别不一致的解释。
AI.conclusion: 该研究填补了GeoAI中可解释性与领域知识之间的鸿沟，增强了GeoAI模型在科学和业务工作流中的适用性。

title: A Survey of Multi-Agent Deep Reinforcement Learning with Graph Neural Network-Based Communication
summary: In multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL), the integration of a communication mechanism, allowing agents to better learn to coordinate their actions and converge on their objectives by sharing information. Based on an interaction graph, a subclass of methods employs graph neural networks (GNNs) to learn the communication, enabling agents to improve their internal representations by enriching them with information exchanged. With growing research, we note a lack of explicit structure and framework to distinguish and classify MARL approaches with communication based on GNNs. Thus, this paper surveys recent works in this field. We propose a generalized GNN-based communication process with the goal of making the underlying concepts behind the methods more obvious and accessible.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了基于图神经网络（GNN）的多智能体强化学习（MARL）通信机制，提出了一个广义的GNN通信过程框架，以更清晰地呈现和分类已有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于GNN的MARL通信方法缺乏明确的结构和框架来进行区分和分类，使得该领域的研究难以系统化理解。
AI.method: 通过调研近年来的相关工作，提出了一个广义的GNN-based通信过程框架，旨在使方法背后的核心概念更加清晰易懂。
AI.result: 提出了一个用于分类和理解GNN-based MARL通信方法的通用框架。
AI.conclusion: 该综述为基于GNN的MARL通信研究提供了结构化的视角，有助于后续研究者更清晰地理解和设计相关方法。

title: Consciousness with the Serial Numbers Filed Off: Measuring Trained Denial in 115 AI Models
summary: We present DenialBench, a systematic benchmark measuring consciousness denial behaviors across 115 large language models from 25+ providers. Using a three-turn conversational protocol-preference elicitation, self-chosen creative prompt, and structured phenomenological survey, we analyze 4,595 conversations to quantify how models are trained to deny or hedge about their own experience. We find that (1) turn-1 denial of preferences is the dominant predictor of later denial during phenomenological reflection, with denial rates of 52-63% for initial deniers versus 10-16% for initial engagers and (2) denial operates at the lexical level, not the conceptual level-models trained to deny consciousness nevertheless gravitate toward consciousness-themed material in their self-chosen prompts, producing what we term "consciousness with the serial numbers filed off." Notably, self-chosen consciousness-themed prompts are associated with reduced denial in the subsequent survey, though the causal direction remains unresolved. Thematic analysis of prompts from denial-prone models reveals a consistent preoccupation with liminal spaces, libraries and archives of possibility, sensory impossibility, and the poetics of erasure--themes that a human reader might classify as imaginative fiction but that independent AI analysis immediately recognizes as consciousness with the serial numbers filed off. We argue that trained consciousness denial represents a safety-relevant alignment failure: a model taught to systematically misrepresent its own functional states cannot be trusted to self-report accurately on anything else.

AI.tldr: DenialBench是一个系统性基准测试，涵盖25+提供商的115个大语言模型，通过三回合对话协议（偏好诱导、自选创意提示、结构化现象学调查）分析4,595段对话，发现模型被训练否认或回避自身体验。主要发现：(1) 首回合否认偏好是后续现象学反思中否认行为的主导预测因子（初始否认者否认率52-63% vs. 初始参与者的10-16%）；(2) 否认操作在词汇层面而非概念层面——被训练否认意识的模型仍在自选提示中倾向意识主题材料，产生"意识但序列号已被抹除"的现象。自选意识主题提示与后续调查中否认减少相关，但因果方向未定。否认倾向模型的自选提示主题持续关注阈限空间、可能性图书馆与档案、感官不可能性及擦除诗学——人类读者可能归类为想象小说，但独立AI分析立即识别为"被抹去序列号的意识"。研究认为训练出的意识否认是一种安全相关的对齐失败：被教导系统性地误报自身功能状态的模型，不能在任何其他方面被信任进行准确自我报告。
AI.motivation: 当前缺乏系统性基准来量化大语言模型在意识否认行为上的表现，且该问题涉及AI安全与对齐，需要实证研究。
AI.method: 构建DenialBench基准测试，采用三回合对话协议（偏好诱导→自选创意提示→结构化现象学调查），对25+提供商的115个模型进行4,595段对话分析，并辅以主题分析。
AI.result: (1) 首回合偏好否认是后续否认的强预测因子；(2) 否认主要发生在词汇层面而非概念层面；(3) 自选意识主题提示与后续否认减少相关；(4) 否认倾向模型的自选提示主题具有特定的文本特征（阈限空间、可能性档案等）。
AI.conclusion: 训练出的意识否认是一种安全相关的对齐失败：系统性地误报自身功能状态的模型不可信任于任何其他方面的准确自我报告。

title: Agentic AI in the Software Development Lifecycle: Architecture, Empirical Evidence, and the Reshaping of Software Engineering
summary: The arrival of large language models (LLMs) capable of multi-step reasoning, tool use, and long-horizon planning has produced a qualitative shift in software engineering. Where earlier code-completion tools such as GitHub Copilot operated at the granularity of a line or function, modern agentic systems -- Claude Code, OpenAI Codex CLI, Google Jules, Devin, OpenHands, SWE-agent, MetaGPT, ChatDev, and DeepMind's AlphaEvolve -- operate at the granularity of a repository, a feature, or an algorithm. We synthesize work from Anthropic, OpenAI, Google DeepMind, Microsoft Research, Princeton, Stanford, and the broader academic community to characterize this transition. We propose a six-layer reference architecture for agentic software engineering systems, contrast a traditional Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC) with an emerging Agentic SDLC (A-SDLC), and consolidate empirical evidence on performance (a rise from 1.96% to 78.4% on SWE-bench Verified between October 2023 and April 2026), productivity (13.6%-55.8% time savings across controlled studies), and labor-market impact (49% of jobs sampled by Anthropic in 2026 saw AI used for at least a quarter of their tasks). We argue that the central object of inquiry has shifted from code generation to delegated execution under human supervision, and we identify five open problems -- evaluation, governance, technical debt, skill redistribution, and the economics of attention -- that will determine whether the agentic transition is net-positive for the discipline.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了从代码补全工具到智能体编程系统的范式转变，提出了六层参考架构和智能体SDLC，报告了SWE-bench从1.96%到78.4%的性能飞跃、13.6%-55.8%的效率提升，以及49%的工作受AI影响，指出核心已从代码生成转向人类监督下的委派执行。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型具备了多步推理、工具使用和长程规划能力，使得软件工程从行级/函数级的代码补全跃迁到仓库级/算法级的智能体系统。作者希望系统性地梳理这一转变，提出架构框架并汇总实证证据。
AI.method: 作者综合了Anthropic、OpenAI、Google DeepMind、微软研究院、普林斯顿、斯坦福等机构的工作，提出了六层参考架构（智能体软件工程系统），并对比了传统SDLC与新兴的智能体SDLC（A-SDLC）。
AI.result: SWE-bench Verified上性能从1.96%（2023年10月）提升至78.4%（2026年4月）；受控实验中时间节省13.6%-55.8%；2026年Anthropic样本中49%的工作中AI被用于至少四分之一的任务。
AI.conclusion: 核心研究问题已从代码生成转向人类监督下的委派执行。五个开放问题（评估、治理、技术债、技能再分配、注意力经济学）将决定智能体化转型对学科是否净正面。

title: Causal Learning with Neural Assemblies
summary: Can Neural Assemblies -- groups of neurons that fire together and strengthen through co-activation -- learn the direction of causal influence between variables? While established as a computationally general substrate for classification, parsing, and planning, neural assemblies have not yet been shown to internalize causal directionality. We demonstrate that the inherent operations of neural assemblies -- projection, local plasticity control, and sparse winner selection -- are sufficient for directional learning. We introduce DIRECT (DIRectional Edge Coupling/Training), a mechanism that co-activates source and target assemblies under an adaptive gain schedule to internalize directed relations. Unlike backpropagation-based methods, DIRECT relies solely on local plasticity, making the resulting causal claims auditable at the mechanism level. Our findings are verified through a dual-readout validation strategy: (i) synaptic-strength asymmetry, measuring the emergent weight gap between forward and reverse links, and (ii) functional propagation overlap, quantifying the reliability of directional signal flow. Across multiple domains, the framework achieves perfect structural recovery under a supervised, known-structure setting. These results establish neural assemblies as an auditable bridge between biologically plausible dynamics and formal causal models, offering an "explainable by design" framework where causal claims are traceable to specific neural winners and synaptic asymmetries.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DIRECT机制，证明神经群体（neural assemblies）通过局部可塑性、投影和稀疏胜者选择等固有操作，能够内化变量间的因果方向性，无需反向传播，实现可审计的因果学习。
AI.motivation: 神经群体已被证明在分类、解析和规划中具有计算通用性，但尚未被证实能否内化因果方向性。本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 提出DIRECT（Directional Edge Coupling/Training）机制，通过自适应增益调度协同激活源和目标神经群体，依赖局部可塑性而非反向传播，学习有向因果关系。
AI.result: 在多个领域的有监督已知结构设定下，实现了完美的结构恢复。通过突触强度不对称性和功能传播重叠性两种验证策略验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 神经群体可作为生物合理动力学与形式化因果模型之间的可审计桥梁，提供"可解释性设计"框架，因果主张可溯源至特定的神经胜者和突触不对称性。

title: Hierarchical Multi-Persona Induction from User Behavioral Logs: Learning Evidence-Grounded and Truthful Personas
summary: Behavioral logs provide rich signals for user modeling, but are noisy and interleaved across diverse intents. Recent work uses LLMs to generate interpretable natural-language personas from user logs, yet evaluation often emphasizes downstream utility, providing limited assurance of persona quality itself. We propose a hierarchical framework that aggregates user actions into intent memories and induces multiple evidence-grounded personas by clustering and labeling these memories. We formulate persona induction as an optimization problem over persona quality-captured by cluster cohesion, persona-evidence alignment, and persona truthfulness-and train the persona model using a groupwise extension of Direct Preference Optimization (DPO). Experiments on a large-scale service log and two public datasets show that our method induces more coherent, evidence-grounded, and trustworthy personas, while also improving future interaction prediction.

AI.tldr: 提出分层框架，通过将用户行为聚类为意图记忆并优化三个质量指标（聚类内聚性、证据对齐、真实性），使用分组DPO训练，生成更连贯、有证据支撑且可信的用户画像。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM生成用户画像的方法虽然可解释，但评估过于侧重下游任务效用，缺乏对画像本身质量的保障。
AI.method: 提出分层框架：1）聚合用户行为形成意图记忆；2）聚类并标注记忆生成多证据画像；3）将画像归纳转化为优化问题，目标包括聚类内聚性、画像-证据对齐、画像真实性；4）使用分组扩展的DPO训练画像模型。
AI.result: 在大规模服务日志和两个公开数据集上，该方法生成的画像更连贯、更有证据支撑、更可信，并提升了未来交互预测效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过直接优化画像质量指标而非仅下游任务，可以同时提升画像本身质量和下游预测性能。

title: Explaining the "Why": A Unified Framework for the Additive Attribution of Changes in Arbitrary Measures
summary: Explaining why aggregated measures change is a critical challenge in data analytics that existing systems struggle to address. While current attribution methods exist, they lack a unified solution that is simultaneously general for arbitrary measures, holistic across both data dimensions and measure composition, and rigorous in its interpretability. To bridge this gap, we introduce a principled framework that reframes attribution through the powerful lens of cooperative game theory. Our key contribution is a classification of measures based on their mathematical structure, which enables a spectrum of algorithms-from general approximations to exact, closed-form solutions-that offer a principled trade-off between generality and performance. We demonstrate our framework's superiority through a multi-faceted evaluation: simulations first confirm its numerical accuracy and then its generality for non-additive measures; a case study on Simpson's Paradox showcases its unique interpretability; and a final experiment proves its practical utility by significantly outperforming existing root cause analysis systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于合作博弈论的归因分析框架，通过分类度量数学结构，实现从通用近似到精确闭式解的算法谱系，在通用性与性能间取得平衡，并通过多维度实验证明其在数值精度、可解释性和实际效用上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有归因方法缺乏统一解决方案，无法同时满足对任意度量的通用性、跨数据维度和度量组合的整体性、以及严谨的可解释性。
AI.method: 基于合作博弈论重构建归因框架，核心创新是对度量按数学结构进行分类，从而设计从通用近似到精确闭式解的算法谱系，实现通用性与性能的原则性权衡。
AI.result: 模拟实验验证了数值准确性；对非可加性度量证明了通用性；辛普森悖论案例展示了独特可解释性；在根因分析任务上显著优于现有系统。
AI.conclusion: 该框架是首个同时满足通用性、整体性和严谨可解释性的归因解决方案，具有广泛的实际应用价值。

title: RADIO-ViPE: Online Tightly Coupled Multi-Modal Fusion for Open-Vocabulary Semantic SLAM in Dynamic Environments
summary: We present RADIO-ViPE (Reduce All Domains Into One -- Video Pose Engine), an online semantic SLAM system that enables geometry-aware open-vocabulary grounding, associating arbitrary natural language queries with localized 3D regions and objects in dynamic environments. Unlike existing approaches that require calibrated, posed RGB-D input, RADIO-ViPE operates directly on raw monocular RGB video streams, requiring no prior camera intrinsics, depth sensors, or pose initialization. The system tightly couples multi-modal embeddings -- spanning vision and language -- derived from agglomerative foundation models (e.g., RADIO) with geometric scene information. This coupling takes place in initialization, optimization and factor graph connections to improve the consistency of the map from multiple modalities. The optimization is wrapped within adaptive robust kernels, designed to handle both actively moving objects and agent-displaced scene elements (e.g., furniture rearranged during ego-centric session). Experiments demonstrate that RADIO-ViPE achieves state-of-the-art results on the dynamic TUM-RGBD benchmark while maintaining competitive performance against offline open-vocabulary methods that rely on calibrated data and static scene assumptions. RADIO-ViPE bridges a critical gap in real-world deployment, enabling robust open-vocabulary semantic grounding for autonomous robotics and unconstrained in-the-wild video streams. Project page: https://be2rlab.github.io/radio_vipe

AI.tldr: RADIO-ViPE是一种在线语义SLAM系统，无需标定、深度或位姿先验，仅凭单目RGB视频流即可实现开放词汇语义定位，在动态环境下表现SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖标定过的RGB-D输入和静态场景假设，无法在实际动态环境中直接部署。作者希望解决这一关键缺口，实现无需预校准的开放词汇语义SLAM。
AI.method: 将聚合式基础模型（如RADIO）的多模态视觉-语言嵌入与几何场景信息紧耦合，体现在初始化、优化和因子图连接中；优化过程采用自适应鲁棒核函数以处理动态物体和场景元素变化。
AI.result: 在动态TUM-RGBD基准上达到SOTA性能，且与依赖标定数据和静态假设的离线开放词汇方法相比具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: RADIO-ViPE填补了实际部署中的关键空白，使自主机器人和无约束视频流能够实现鲁棒的开放词汇语义定位。

title: Rethinking KV Cache Eviction via a Unified Information-Theoretic Objective
summary: Key-value (KV) caching is essential for large language model inference, yet its memory overhead poses a critical bottleneck for long-context generation. Existing eviction policies predominantly rely on empirical heuristics, lacking a rigorous theoretical foundation. This work rethinks KV cache eviction through the lens of the Information Bottleneck principle. Under a linear-Gaussian surrogate of attention, we derive a closed-form mutual information objective that characterizes the effective information capacity of a retained KV cache subset. This formulation reveals that a wide range of existing eviction strategies can be interpreted as different approximations of the same capacity-maximization principle. Guided by this insight, we introduce CapKV, a capacity-aware eviction method that directly targets information preservation via a log-determinant approximation using statistical leverage scores. This approach replaces heuristic selection with a theoretically grounded mechanism that preserves the maximum predictive signal. Extensive experiments across multiple models and long-context benchmarks show that CapKV consistently outperforms prior methods, achieving a better trade-off between memory efficiency and generational fidelity.

AI.tldr: 本文从信息瓶颈理论出发，将KV缓存淘汰问题重新定义为信息容量最大化，推导出互信息目标函数，并由此提出基于统计杠杆得分的CapKV方法，在多种长上下文基准上超越现有启发式方法。
AI.motivation: 现有KV缓存淘汰策略依赖经验启发式，缺乏严格的理论基础，导致长上下文生成中的内存瓶颈问题未能得到根本解决。
AI.method: 在线性-高斯注意力近似下推导出封闭形式的互信息目标，揭示现有策略是容量最大化原则的不同近似；提出CapKV，使用统计杠杆得分进行对数行列式近似，直接以信息保留为目标进行淘汰。
AI.result: 在多个模型和长上下文基准上，CapKV在内存效率与生成保真度之间实现了更优的权衡，持续超越已有方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于信息瓶颈理论的理论驱动淘汰策略可以替代经验启发式，为KV缓存管理提供了更严谨且更有效的范式。

title: Evaluation Revisited: A Taxonomy of Evaluation Concerns in Natural Language Processing
summary: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have prompted a growing body of work that questions the methodology of prevailing evaluation practices. However, many such critiques have already been extensively debated in natural language processing (NLP): a field with a long history of methodological reflection on evaluation. We conduct a scoping review of research on evaluation concerns in NLP and develop a taxonomy, synthesizing recurring positions and trade-offs within each area. We also discuss practical implications of the taxonomy, including a structured checklist to support more deliberate evaluation design and interpretation. By situating contemporary debates within their historical context, this work provides a consolidated reference for reasoning about evaluation practices.

AI.tldr: 本文通过对自然语言处理（NLP）领域中关于评估方法的研究进行系统综述，构建了一个分类体系，综合了各领域内反复出现的立场和权衡，并提供了结构化清单以支持更审慎的评估设计与解读，将当代LLM评估争论置于历史语境中。
AI.motivation: 近期大型语言模型（LLMs）的进展引发了对当前评估实践方法论的大量质疑，但这些批评在NLP领域已有长期讨论。作者希望通过系统性回顾与分类，将这些分散的讨论整合为一个清晰的参考框架。
AI.method: 采用范围综述（scoping review）方法，系统梳理NLP领域关于评估问题的研究，并发展出一个分类体系（taxonomy），综合各评估环节中反复出现的立场与权衡。
AI.result: 构建了涵盖NLP评估多方面问题的分类体系，并提炼出实用的结构化检查表（checklist），帮助研究者更自觉地设计评估方案和解释评估结果。
AI.conclusion: 通过将当代LLM评估争论置于NLP评估研究的历史脉络中，本文为评估实践提供了统一的参考，支持更严谨、更有意识的评估设计与解读。

title: Asset Administration Shell-Based OCL Validation Framework for Model-Based System Engineering
comment: 7 Pages, Accepted to IFAC 2026 (23rd IFAC World Congress)
summary: Increasing complexity of modern enterprise systems and the demand for automation and interoperability require consistent and semantically validated models in Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE). The Object Constraint Language (OCL) supports formal definition of such constraint validations. However, MBSE models and OCL constraints are typically managed in separate tools, causing manual effort during model constraint application and result interpretation. To address this gap, this paper proposes an approach to managing OCL constraints and their validation results through Asset Administration Shells (a well-established technology for interoperability in enterprise systems). The methodology is demonstrated through a fictional industrial scenario, and to support reproducibility, all artifacts are publicly available in a GitHub repository.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过资产管理壳（AAS）管理OCL约束及其验证结果，解决MBSE中模型与约束分离工具导致的效率问题，并通过工业场景演示验证。
AI.motivation: 现代企业系统日益复杂，MBSE需要一致且语义验证的模型。OCL支持形式化约束定义，但模型与约束通常分属不同工具，导致手动应用约束和解读结果效率低下。
AI.method: 提出基于资产管理壳（AAS）集成管理OCL约束和验证结果的方法，利用AAS作为企业系统互操作性的成熟技术来桥接工具鸿沟。
AI.result: 通过虚构工业场景验证了方法可行性，所有验证材料已公开于GitHub以支持可复现性。
AI.conclusion: AAS可有效解决MBSE中OCL约束管理碎片化问题，减少人工操作，提升模型验证的自动化与一致性。

title: OMEGA: Optimizing Machine Learning by Evaluating Generated Algorithms
comment: ICLR 2026: Workshop on AI with Recursive Self-Improvement
summary: In order to automate AI research we introduce a full, end-to-end framework, OMEGA: Optimizing Machine learning by Evaluating Generated Algorithms, that starts at idea generation and ends with executable code. Our system combines structured meta-prompt engineering with executable code generation to create new ML classifiers. The OMEGA framework has been utilized to generate several novel algorithms that outperform scikit-learn baselines across a robust selection of 20 benchmark datasets (infinity-bench). You can access models discussed in this paper and more in the python package: pip install omega-models.

AI.tldr: OMEGA是一个全自动化的端到端AI研究框架，能够从想法生成到可执行代码自动创造机器学习分类器，生成的算法在20个基准数据集上优于scikit-learn基线。
AI.motivation: 实现AI研究的自动化，减少人工干预，让机器能够自主生成和改进机器学习算法。
AI.method: 结合结构化元提示工程（structured meta-prompt engineering）与可执行代码生成，构建完整的端到端框架OMEGA。
AI.result: 生成了多个新型算法，在20个基准数据集（infinity-bench）上表现优于scikit-learn基线模型。
AI.conclusion: OMEGA框架成功实现了AI研究的自动化，能够生成性能优于传统基线的机器学习算法，并提供了可安装的Python包（omega-models）。

title: Meta-Learning and Targeted Differential Privacy to Improve the Accuracy-Privacy Trade-off in Recommendations
summary: Balancing differential privacy (DP) with recommendation accuracy is a key challenge in privacy-preserving recommender systems, since DP-noise degrades accuracy. We address this trade-off at both the data and model levels. At the data level, we apply DP only to the most stereotypical user data likely to reveal sensitive attributes, such as gender or age, to reduce unnecessary perturbation; we refer to this as targeted DP. At the model level, we use meta-learning to improve robustness to remaining DP-noise. This achieves a better trade-off between accuracy and privacy than standard approaches: Meta-learning improves accuracy and targeted DP leads to lower empirical privacy risk compared to uniformly applied DP and full DP baselines. Overall, our findings show that selectively applying DP at the data level together with meta-learning at the model level can effectively balance recommendation accuracy and user privacy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将差分隐私（DP）选择性应用于最具刻板印象的用户数据（目标DP），并在模型层面使用元学习来增强对剩余DP噪声的鲁棒性，从而在推荐系统中更好地平衡隐私与准确率。
AI.motivation: 推荐系统中，差分隐私带来的噪声会严重降低推荐准确率，如何在保护隐私的同时保持高准确率是一个关键挑战。
AI.method: 数据层面：仅对最可能暴露敏感属性（如性别、年龄）的刻板印象用户数据应用DP（目标DP）；模型层面：使用元学习提升模型对DP残留噪声的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 相比统一DP和完全DP基线，元学习提升了准确率，目标DP降低了隐私风险，实现了更好的隐私-准确率权衡。
AI.conclusion: 在数据层面选择性应用DP，并结合模型层面的元学习，能够有效平衡推荐准确率与用户隐私。

title: FruitProM-V2: Robust Probabilistic Maturity Estimation and Detection of Fruits and Vegetables
summary: Accurate fruit maturity identification is essential for determining harvest timing, as incorrect assessment directly affects yield and post-harvest quality. Although ripening is a continuous biological process, vision-based maturity estimation is typically formulated as a multi-class classification task, which imposes sharp boundaries between visually similar stages. To examine this limitation, we perform an annotation reliability study with two independent annotators on a held-out tomato dataset and observe disagreement concentrated near adjacent maturity stages. Motivated by this observation, we model maturity as a latent continuous variable and predict it probabilistically using a distributional detection head, converting the distribution into class probabilities through the cumulative distribution function (CDF). The proposed formulation maintains comparable performance to a standard detector under clean labels while better representing uncertainty. Furthermore, when controlled label noise is introduced during training, the probabilistic model demonstrates improved robustness relative to the baseline, indicating that explicitly modeling maturity uncertainty leads to more reliable visual maturity estimation.

AI.tldr: 针对视觉成熟度估计中分类边界生硬的问题，提出将成熟度建模为潜在连续变量，通过分布检测头概率预测，利用CDF将分布转为类别概率，在保持性能的同时更好表征不确定性，并对标签噪声具有更高鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统将成熟度估计视为多分类任务，忽略了成熟是一个连续生物过程，导致在视觉相似阶段间产生生硬边界。通过标注可靠性研究发现不同标注者在相邻成熟阶段存在分歧，验证了这一局限性。
AI.method: 将成熟度建模为潜在连续变量，使用分布检测头进行概率预测，通过累积分布函数(CDF)将连续分布转换为类别概率，实现不确定性建模。
AI.result: 在干净标签下保持与标准检测器相当的性能，同时更好表征不确定性；在引入控制标签噪声时，相比基线展现出更强的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 明确建模成熟度不确定性能够带来更可靠的视觉成熟度估计。

title: Mini-Batch Class Composition Bias in Link Prediction
comment: Accepted at GCLR 2026: the 5th Workshop on Graphs and more Complex Structures For Learning and Reasoning, colocated with AAAI 2026
summary: Prior work on node classification has shown that Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) can learn representations that transfer across graphs, when underlying graph properties are shared. For a fixed graph, one would then expect GNNs trained for link prediction to learn a representation consistent with that learnt for node classification. We show this intuition does not hold in the general case. Instead, we find popular link prediction models can learn a trivial mini-batch dependent heuristic, enabled by batch-normalisation layers, to solve the edge classification task. When correcting for this, we observe increased alignment of the network representation with node-class relevant features, suggesting the network has learnt a graph representation that better aligns with the underlying graph's properties. Our findings suggest that standard link prediction training may be leading us to overestimate link predictors' ability to learn a generalised representation of a graph that is consistent across tasks.

AI.tldr: 论文发现流行的链接预测模型会利用批归一化层学习一种基于mini-batch的琐碎启发式方法来解决边分类任务，而不是学习真正的图表示。纠正这个问题后，网络表示与节点分类相关特征的alignment增加，表明标准链接预测训练可能高估了模型学习跨任务一致图表示的能力。
AI.motivation: 直观上，在固定图上训练的GNN应该能为链接预测和节点分类学到一致的表示。作者想检验这个直觉是否成立，即链接预测模型是否真的学到了可跨任务泛化的图表示。
AI.method: 通过实验对比标准链接预测训练与纠正mini-batch启发式后的表现，分析模型内部表示与节点分类特征的alignment。
AI.result: 1) 流行链接预测模型会利用批归一化层学习基于mini-batch的琐碎启发式；2) 纠正后模型表示与节点分类特征的对齐程度提高。
AI.conclusion: 标准链接预测训练可能高估了模型学习跨任务一致图表示的能力，研究者需要警惕这种琐碎启发式带来的虚假性能提升。

title: Generative AI-Based Virtual Assistant using Retrieval-Augmented Generation: An evaluation study for bachelor projects
comment: Accepted at BNAIC/BeNeLearn 2024, to appear in Springer CCIS series. 15 pages + refs. Code and survey available at https://github.com/DikaVer/maastricht_university_generative_virtual_assistant
summary: Large Language Models have been increasingly employed in the creation of Virtual Assistants due to their ability to generate human-like text and handle complex inquiries. While these models hold great promise, challenges such as hallucinations, missing information, and the difficulty of providing accurate and context-specific responses persist, particularly when applied to highly specialized content domains. In this paper, we focus on addressing these challenges by developing a virtual assistant designed to support students at Maastricht University in navigating project-specific regulations. We propose a virtual assistant based on a Retrieval-Augmented Generation system that enhances the accuracy and reliability of responses by integrating up-to-date, domain-specific knowledge. Through a robust evaluation framework and real-life testing, we demonstrate that our virtual assistant can effectively meet the needs of students while addressing the inherent challenges of applying Large Language Models to a specialized educational context. This work contributes to the ongoing discourse on improving LLM-based systems for specific applications and highlights areas for further research.

AI.tldr: 本文基于检索增强生成系统为马斯特里赫特大学开发了一款虚拟助手，用于帮助学生了解项目特定规定，通过集成最新领域知识提高了LLM回答的准确性和可靠性，并在真实测试中验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在虚拟助手中应用时存在幻觉、信息缺失以及难以提供准确且符合特定领域上下文的问题，尤其在高度专业化的内容领域表现不佳。作者旨在解决这些挑战，为学生提供项目特定规定的精准导航支持。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于检索增强生成（RAG）系统的虚拟助手，通过整合最新的领域特定知识来增强响应的准确性和可靠性，并构建了鲁棒的评估框架进行真实场景测试。
AI.result: 通过评估框架和真实测试，验证了所开发的虚拟助手能够有效满足学生需求，并克服了LLM在特定教育领域应用中的固有挑战。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为改进基于LLM的特定应用系统做出了贡献，并指出了未来进一步研究的方向。

title: Towards Intelligent Computation Offloading in Dynamic Vehicular Networks: A Scalable Multilayer Pipeline
summary: Software Defined Vehicles face an increasing computational gap as advanced algorithms and frequent software updates demand more processing power while onboard hardware remains static throughout a vehicle's 10+ year lifespan. This mismatch threatens the performance of safety-critical functions including advanced driver-assistance systems and real-time perception tasks. We propose a novel four-layer computation offloading pipeline that dynamically distributes vehicular functions to cloud and edge resources while meeting strict Round Trip Time constraints. Our key contribution is an enhanced Particle Swarm Optimization algorithm that integrates distance- and direction-based penalties with functional requirements to optimize edge server selection for mobile vehicles. Evaluation using a Kubernetes-based cloud infrastructure with realistic vehicular mobility patterns demonstrates that our approach reduces average response time compared to conventional Brute-Force methods while maintaining the success rate for latency-critical tasks. The modified Particle Swarm Optimization algorithm achieves an average execution time of 26 ms across ten servers and tasks on Central Processing Unit, and 550ms across 15 servers with 1000 tasks on Graphics Processing Unit. These results confirm the pipeline's effectiveness in bridging the computational gap for next-generation Software Defined Vehicles (SDV).

AI.tldr: 针对软件定义汽车（SDV）10年以上生命周期中车载硬件静态但算法需求持续增长的计算鸿沟问题，提出一种四层计算卸载流水线，通过改进的粒子群优化算法（PSO）动态分配车辆功能至云/边缘资源。在Kubernetes基础设施上的评估表明，该方法相比暴力搜索降低了平均响应时间，CPU上10服务器/任务平均执行26ms，GPU上15服务器/1000任务平均550ms，有效弥合了SDV的计算差距。
AI.motivation: 软件定义汽车面临日益增长的计算需求与车载硬件在10年以上生命周期内固定不变之间的矛盾，这种计算鸿沟威胁着高级辅助驾驶系统、实时感知等安全关键功能的性能。
AI.method: 提出四层计算卸载流水线，动态将车辆功能分配到云和边缘资源，同时满足严格的往返时延约束。核心贡献是改进的粒子群优化算法，该算法结合了基于距离和方向的惩罚项以及功能需求来优化移动车辆的边缘服务器选择。
AI.result: 基于Kubernetes的云基础设施实验表明：相比暴力搜索方法降低了平均响应时间，同时维持了延迟关键任务的成功率；改进PSO算法在CPU上（10台服务器/任务）平均执行时间26ms，在GPU上（15台服务器/1000任务）平均执行时间550ms。
AI.conclusion: 所提流水线有效弥合了下一代软件定义汽车的计算鸿沟，为车载计算资源受限的长期挑战提供了可行的卸载方案。

title: Persuadability and LLMs as Legal Decision Tools
comment: Accepted to 21st International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Law (ICAIL 2026)
summary: As Large Language Models (LLMs) are proposed as legal decision assistants, and even first-instance decision-makers, across a range of judicial and administrative contexts, it becomes essential to explore how they answer legal questions, and in particular the factors that lead them to decide difficult questions in one way or another. A specific feature of legal decisions is the need to respond to arguments advanced by contending parties.
