A legal decision-maker must be able to engage with, and respond to, including through being potentially persuaded by, arguments advanced by the parties. Conversely, they should not be unduly persuadable, influenced by a particularly compelling advocate to decide cases based on the skills of the advocates, rather than the merits of the case. We explore how frontier open- and closed-weights LLMs respond to legal arguments, reporting original experimental results examining how the quality of the advocate making those arguments affects the likelihood that a model will agree with a particular legal point of view, and exploring the factors driving these results. Our results have implications for the feasibility of adopting LLMs across legal and administrative settings.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了大型语言模型（LLMs）在法律决策中如何响应法律论证，特别是论证质量对模型观点倾向的影响，并探讨了将LLMs应用于司法和行政场景的可行性。
AI.motivation: 随着LLMs被提议作为法律决策助手甚至一审决策者，探索它们如何回答法律问题以及影响其决策的因素变得至关重要。尤其需要关注模型是否能够恰当回应当事人论证，既不被过度说服，又能合理接纳有力论点。
AI.method: 通过原创实验，研究前沿开源和闭源LLMs对法律论证的响应，分析论证质量（辩护方的说服力）如何影响模型采纳特定法律观点的可能性，并探索背后的驱动因素。
AI.result: 论证的质量（辩护方的说服力）显著影响LLMs采纳特定法律观点的可能性，模型可能受到论辩技巧而非案件实质的影响。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果对将LLMs应用于法律和行政场景的可行性具有重要启示，暗示需要谨慎处理模型被过度说服或偏离案件实质的风险。

title: CARD: Non-Uniform Quantization of Visual Semantic Unit for Generative Recommendation
summary: Generative recommendation frameworks typically represent items as discrete Semantic IDs (SIDs). While existing studies have sought to enhance SID construction by incorporating multimodal content, collaborative signals, or more advanced quantization techniques, learning high-quality SIDs still faces two key challenges: (1) The two-stage generative recommendation paradigm (SID construction and autoregressive generation) provides insufficient supervision for heterogeneous fusion, which hinders learning high-quality SIDs, and (2) non-uniform embeddings lead to codeword imbalance and generation bias. To address these challenges, we propose a novel generative recommendation framework, called CARD. CARD introduces a visual semantic unit that unifies textual, visual, and collaborative signals into a structured visual representation prior to encoding, enabling holistic semantic modeling and effectively alleviating the semantic gap, thereby reducing the reliance on supervision signals during SID learning. Furthermore, to deal with the highly non-uniform distribution of item semantic embeddings in recommendation scenarios, we develop a non-uniform quantization framework (NU-RQ-VAE), which incorporates a learnable and invertible non-uniform transformation into the quantization process to map skewed semantic distributions into a more balanced latent space, thereby significantly improving codebook utilization and quantization accuracy. Experiments on multiple datasets show that CARD consistently outperforms baseline methods under various settings; meanwhile, the proposed non-uniform transformation module is plug-and-play and remains robust across different quantization schemes. Code is available at https://github.com/HAI-UESTC/CARD.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CARD框架，通过视觉语义单元统一多模态信号，并设计非均匀量化（NU-RQ-VAE）解决语义ID学习中的监督不足和码本不平衡问题，在多个数据集上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式推荐中语义ID构建面临两大挑战：(1)两阶段范式（SID构建+自回归生成）对异构融合监督不足，难以学习高质量SID；(2)非均匀嵌入导致码本失衡和生成偏差。
AI.method: 提出CARD框架：(1)设计视觉语义单元，在编码前将文本、视觉和协同信号统一为结构化视觉表示，实现整体语义建模；(2)提出非均匀量化框架NU-RQ-VAE，引入可学习可逆的非均匀变换，将偏斜的语义分布映射到更均衡的潜在空间，提升码本利用率和量化精度。
AI.result: 多个数据集上CARD全面优于基线方法；非均匀变换模块即插即用，在不同量化方案下保持鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: CARD有效解决了生成式推荐中语义ID学习的监督不足和码本失衡问题，为多模态融合与非均匀量化提供了新思路。

title: Sample Selection Using Multi-Task Autoencoders in Federated Learning with Non-IID Data
comment: Published in Engineering Science and Technology, an International Journal, 61 (2025), 101920. DOI: https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jestch.2024.101920 and Codes: https://github.com/eardic/FL_DPQS
summary: Federated learning is a machine learning paradigm in which multiple devices collaboratively train a model under the supervision of a central server while ensuring data privacy. However, its performance is often hindered by redundant, malicious, or abnormal samples, leading to model degradation and inefficiency. To overcome these issues, we propose novel sample selection methods for image classification, employing a multitask autoencoder to estimate sample contributions through loss and feature analysis. Our approach incorporates unsupervised outlier detection, using one-class support vector machine (OCSVM), isolation forest (IF), and adaptive loss threshold (AT) methods managed by a central server to filter noisy samples on clients. We also propose a multi-class deep support vector data description (SVDD) loss controlled by a central server to enhance feature-based sample selection. We validate our methods on CIFAR10 and MNIST datasets across varying numbers of clients, non-IID distributions, and noise levels up to 40%. The results show significant accuracy improvements with loss-based sample selection, achieving gains of up to 7.02% on CIFAR10 with OCSVM and 1.83% on MNIST with AT. Additionally, our federated SVDD loss further improves feature-based sample selection, yielding accuracy gains of up to 0.99% on CIFAR10 with OCSVM. These results show the effectiveness of our methods in improving model accuracy across various client counts and noise conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文针对联邦学习中冗余、恶意或异常样本导致模型退化问题，提出基于多任务自编码器的样本选择方法，通过OCSVM、孤立森林、自适应阈值等无监督异常检测方法以及多类SVDD损失来过滤噪声样本，在CIFAR10和MNIST数据集上最高提升7.02%和1.83%的准确率。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习中存在冗余、恶意或异常样本，导致模型性能下降和效率降低，现有方法未能有效解决客户端上的样本噪声问题。
AI.method: 提出基于多任务自编码器的样本选择框架，利用损失和特征分析估计样本贡献。具体包括：1）无监督异常检测（OCSVM、孤立森林、自适应阈值）；2）多类深度SVDD损失进行基于特征的样本筛选。中央服务器统一管理这些过滤机制。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10上OCSVM方法准确率提升最高7.02%，MNIST上自适应阈值方法提升1.83%；联邦SVDD损失在CIFAR10上进一步带来0.99%的精度增益。在多种客户端数量、非IID分布和40%噪声水平下均有效。
AI.conclusion: 提出的样本选择方法能有效过滤联邦学习中的噪声样本，显著提升模型在多种复杂场景下的准确率，证明了损失和特征分析结合的有效性。

title: Open Problems in Frontier AI Risk Management
summary: Frontier AI both amplifies existing risks and introduces qualitatively novel challenges. Not only is there a notable lack of stable scientific consensus resulting from the rapid pace of technological change, but emerging frontier AI safety practices are often misaligned with, or may undermine, established risk management frameworks. To address these challenges, we systematically surface open problems in frontier AI risk management. Adopting a problem-oriented approach, we examine each stage of the risk management process - risk planning, identification, analysis, evaluation, and mitigation - through a structured review of the literature, identifying unresolved challenges and the actors best positioned to address them. Recognising that different types of open problems call for different responses, we classify open problems according to whether they reflect (a) a lack of scientific or technical consensus, (b) misalignment with, or challenges to, established risk management frameworks, or (c) shortcomings in implementation despite apparent consensus and alignment. By mapping these open problems and identifying the actors best positioned to address them - including developers, deployers, regulators, standards bodies, researchers, and third-party evaluators - this work aims to clarify where progress is needed to enable robust and meaningful consensus on frontier AI risk management.The paper does not propose specific solutions; instead, it provides a problem-oriented, agenda-setting reference document, complemented by a living online repository, intended to support coordination, reduce duplication, and guide future research and governance efforts.

AI.tldr: 本文系统梳理了前沿人工智能风险管理中的未解决问题，按风险规划、识别、分析、评估和缓解五个阶段，将问题分为三类：科学/技术共识缺乏、与现有风险管理框架不匹配、实施不足，并指明了各类问题的最佳解决主体，旨在为未来研究和治理提供参考。
AI.motivation: 前沿AI技术发展迅速，缺乏稳定的科学共识，且现有安全实践与传统风险管理框架不匹配甚至相悖，亟需系统识别和梳理这些挑战。
AI.method: 采用问题导向方法，通过结构化文献综述，按风险管理流程（规划、识别、分析、评估、缓解）逐一梳理未解决问题，并对问题进行三级分类。
AI.result: 识别出前沿AI风险管理各阶段的开放问题，将其归为三类（共识缺失、框架不匹配、实施不足），并明确了开发者、部署者、监管者、标准机构、研究人员和第三方评估者等最佳应对主体。
AI.conclusion: 本文不提供具体解决方案，而是作为议程设定型参考文献，辅以在线仓库，旨在协调各方力量、减少重复工作，指导未来研究与治理方向。

title: SpecTr-GBV: Multi-Draft Block Verification Accelerating Speculative Decoding
summary: Autoregressive language models suffer from high inference latency due to their sequential decoding nature. Speculative decoding (SD) mitigates this by employing a lightweight draft model to propose candidate tokens, which are selectively verified by a larger target model. While existing methods either adopt multi-draft strategies to increase acceptance rates or block verification techniques to jointly verify multiple tokens, they remain limited by treating these improvements in isolation. In this work, we propose SpecTr-GBV, a novel SD method that unifies multi-draft and greedy block verification (GBV) into a single framework. By formulating the verification step as an optimal transport problem over draft and target token blocks, SpecTr-GBV improves both theoretical efficiency and empirical performance. We theoretically prove that SpecTr-GBV achieves the optimal expected acceptance length physically attainable within the framework of i.i.d. draft generation, and this bound improves as the number of drafts increases. Empirically, we evaluate SpecTr-GBV across five datasets and four baselines. Our method achieves superior speedup and significantly higher block efficiency while preserving output quality. In addition, we perform comprehensive ablation studies to evaluate the impact of various hyperparameters in the model.

AI.tldr: SpecTr-GBV 是一种将多草稿策略与贪婪块验证统一的推测解码方法，通过最优传输理论实现理论最优的期望接受长度，在实际测试中取得显著加速效果。
AI.motivation: 自回归语言模型因顺序解码导致推理延迟高，现有推测解码方法将多草稿与块验证分开处理，未能充分发挥两者协同潜力。
AI.method: 将验证步骤建模为草稿块与目标块之间的最优传输问题，统一多草稿生成与贪婪块验证（GBV）于单一框架中。
AI.result: 在五个数据集和四个基线上取得更优加速比和更高块效率，同时保持输出质量；理论上证明在独立同分布草稿生成框架下达到最优期望接受长度，且该上界随草稿数量增加而提升。
AI.conclusion: SpecTr-GBV 通过统一多草稿与块验证，有效突破了现有方法在效率上的局限，为推测解码提供了理论最优且实践高效的解决方案。

title: An Empirical Study of Speculative Decoding on Software Engineering Tasks
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have become widely used for Software Engineering (SE) tasks, spanning from function-level code generation to complex repository-level workflows. However, the high latency of autoregressive inference remains a significant bottleneck, hindering their deployment in interactive environments. While Speculative Decoding (SD) offers a promising technique for lossless acceleration, prior research on long-context repository-level tasks and complex agentic interactions remains limited. To bridge this gap, we present the first systematic empirical study to evaluate the effectiveness of SD in SE tasks. We systematically benchmark a comprehensive spectrum of strategies, encompassing both model-based and model-free methods, across representative generation, editing, and repair scenarios. Our empirical results indicate that SD demonstrates clear potential for accelerating inference, particularly for smaller models that achieve higher speedups than those of their larger counterparts. We find that the effectiveness of SD methods varies across different task scenarios. Model-based approaches are well-suited for code generation, whereas model-free methods are better adapted to repository-level repair and editing scenarios. Furthermore, we observe that the repetitiveness of SE tasks improves the performance of model-free methods. In contrast to natural language tasks, the higher predictability of SE tasks allows for more aggressive hyperparameters. Our findings are summarized as guidelines to help increase inference efficiency for SE scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统性地评估了推测解码（SD）在软件工程（SE）任务中的加速效果，发现SD对小型模型加速明显，模型化方法适合代码生成，无模型方法更适合仓库级修复与编辑场景，SE任务的可预测性使超参数设置可更激进。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在软件工程任务中广泛应用，但自回归推理的高延迟成为部署瓶颈，而推测解码在长上下文的仓库级任务和复杂智能体交互中的有效性缺乏系统研究。
AI.method: 对模型化与无模型两大类推测解码策略，在代码生成、编辑、修复等代表性场景下进行系统性基准测试。
AI.result: 推测解码对小型模型加速效果优于大型模型；模型化方法适合代码生成，无模型方法适合仓库级修复与编辑；SE任务的可预测性使无模型方法表现更优，且允许更激进超参数设置。
AI.conclusion: 推测解码在软件工程任务中具有明确的加速潜力，不同任务场景应选择不同SD策略，研究成果可作为提升SE场景推理效率的指导原则。

title: Apriori-based Analysis of Learned Helplessness in Mathematics Tutoring: Behavioral Patterns by Level, Intervention, and Outcome
summary: This study applied the Apriori algorithm to analyze behavioral interaction patterns associated with learned helplessness (LH) in mathematics tutoring system logs. Interaction data were examined across three dimensions: LH level (low vs. high), system-based intervention (with vs. without), and problem-solving outcomes (solved vs. unsolved). The analysis of the complete dataset showed that skipping problems without using hints was the most frequent pattern linked to unsolved outcomes, while persistence behaviors such as not skipping were less dominant overall. Comparisons by LH level showed that low-LH students had stronger links between problem solving and not skipping, as well as positive associations between hint use and solved outcomes. High-LH students showed more avoidance patterns, with skipping strongly tied to unsolved outcomes. In the comparison of system-based intervention conditions, students without intervention had the highest lift for persistence-success links, while the with-intervention group had stronger patterns involving skipping behaviors leading to unsolved outcomes. Outcome-specific analysis showed that not skipping was consistently associated with solved problems across all groups, while skipping without hints predicted unsolved outcomes. Practical implications and recommendations are discussed.

AI.tldr: 本研究使用Apriori算法分析数学辅导系统日志中与习得性无助(LH)相关的行为交互模式。结果显示：跳过问题而不使用提示是未解决结果的最常见模式；低LH学生表现出更强的问题解决与不跳过行为的关联，而高LH学生则更多出现回避模式；无干预组学生展现出最强的坚持-成功关联，有干预组则更多出现跳过与未解决的关联模式。
AI.motivation: 探究学生在数学辅导系统中与习得性无助相关的行为交互模式，以理解不同LH水平学生在面对学习困难时的行为差异，以及系统干预对这些行为模式的影响。
AI.method: 采用Apriori算法对数学辅导系统日志中的行为交互模式进行关联规则挖掘，从三个维度（LH水平、系统干预、问题解决结果）分析交互数据。
AI.result: (1) 跳过问题而不使用提示是与未解决结果最频繁的模式；(2) 低LH学生更倾向于不跳过和使用提示来解决问题；(3) 高LH学生表现出更多跳过-未解决的回避模式；(4) 无干预组坚持-成功关联最强，有干预组跳过-未解决模式更显著。
AI.conclusion: 不跳过行为与成功解决问题一致相关，而跳过问题（尤其是不使用提示）预示着未解决结果，研究对教育实践提出了建议。

title: Efficient Listwise Reranking with Compressed Document Representations
summary: Reranking, the process of refining the output from a first-stage retriever, is often considered computationally expensive, especially when using Large Language Models (LLMs). A common approach to mitigate this cost involves utilizing smaller LLMs or controlling input length. Inspired by recent advances in document compression for retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), we introduce RRK, an efficient and effective listwise reranker compressing documents into multi-token fixed-size embedding representations. Our simple training via distillation shows that this combination of rich compressed representations and listwise reranking yields a highly efficient and effective system. In particular, our 8B-parameter model runs 3x-18x faster than smaller rerankers (0.6-4B parameters) while matching or outperforming them in effectiveness. The efficiency gains are even more striking on long-document benchmarks, where RRK widens its advantage further.

AI.tldr: 提出RRK方法，通过将文档压缩为多令牌固定大小的嵌入表示，结合列表式重排序，实现用8B参数模型比0.6-4B小模型快3-18倍且效果相当或更优的重排序系统。
AI.motivation: LLM重排序计算成本高，现有方法通过使用更小的LLM或控制输入长度来降低成本，但仍有改进空间。
AI.method: 受RAG文档压缩启发，将文档压缩为多令牌固定大小的嵌入表示，结合列表式重排序，并通过蒸馏进行训练。
AI.result: RRK（8B参数）运行速度比0.6-4B的小型重排序器快3-18倍，同时在效果上持平或更优，在长文档基准上优势更明显。
AI.conclusion: 文档压缩与列表式重排序的结合能显著提升重排序系统的效率与效果，尤其在长文档场景下表现突出。

title: MixerCA: An Efficient and Accurate Model for High-Performance Hyperspectral Image Classification
comment: Preprint accepted for publication in "Remote Sensing Applications: Society and Environment" Journal
summary: Over the past decade, hyperspectral image (HSI) classification has drawn considerable interest due to HSIs' ability to effectively distinguish terrestrial objects by capturing detailed, continuous spectral information. The strong performance of recent deep learning techniques in tasks like image classification and semantic segmentation has led to their growing use in HSI classification, due to their ability to capture complex spatial and spectral features more effectively than traditional methods. This paper presents MixerCA, a novel lightweight model for HSI classification that leverages depthwise convolution and a self-attention mechanism. MixerCA integrates depth-wise convolutions, token and channel mixing, and coordinate attention into a unified structure to decouple spatial and channel interactions, maintain consistent resolution throughout the network, and directly process HSI patches. Extensive experiments on four hyperspectral benchmark datasets reveal MixerCA's clear advantages over several competing algorithms, including 2D-CNN, 3D-CNN, Tri-CNN, HybridSN, ViT, and Swin Transformer. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/mqalkhatib/MixerCA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MixerCA，一种结合深度可分离卷积与自注意力机制的轻量级高光谱图像分类模型，在四个基准数据集上优于2D/3D-CNN、ViT、Swin Transformer等多种方法。
AI.motivation: 高光谱图像分类具有重要意义，现有深度学习方法虽表现优异但模型复杂度过高，需要更轻量且高效的分类模型。
AI.method: MixerCA模型融合了深度可分离卷积、token混合与通道混合、坐标注意力机制，通过解耦空间与通道交互、保持网络分辨率一致性、直接处理HSI patches来实现轻量化设计。
AI.result: 在四个高光谱基准数据集上的实验表明，MixerCA显著优于2D-CNN、3D-CNN、Tri-CNN、HybridSN、ViT及Swin Transformer等对比算法。
AI.conclusion: MixerCA作为一种轻量级模型，在保持较低计算成本的同时，在高光谱图像分类任务上取得了领先的性能，代码已开源可复现。

title: Correcting Performance Estimation Bias in Imbalanced Classification with Minority Subconcepts
summary: Class-level evaluation can conceal substantial performance disparities across subconcepts within the same class, causing models that perform well on average to fail on specific subpopulations. Prior work has shown that common evaluation measures for imbalanced classification are biased toward larger minority subconcepts and that utility-based reweighting using true subconcept labels can mitigate this bias; however, such labels are rarely available at test time. We introduce a practical utility-weighted evaluation that replaces unavailable subconcept labels with predicted posterior probabilities from a multiclass subconcept model. Evaluation weights are defined as the expected utility under this posterior, yielding a soft, uncertainty-aware metric we call predicted-weighted balanced accuracy (pBA). Experiments on tabular benchmarks as well as medical-imaging and text datasets show that unweighted scores can be misleading under within-class heterogeneity, while pBA provides more stable and interpretable assessments when subconcept distributions are uneven but not pathological. Our code is available at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/correcting-bias-imbalance-9C6C/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种预测加权平衡准确率（pBA），通过利用子概念的后验概率替代真实子概念标签，解决类别不平衡评估中因类内异质性导致的性能评估偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 现有类级评估在面对类内子概念分布不均时，平均性能会掩盖特定子概念上的失败；而传统的效用加权方法虽能缓解偏差，但真实子概念标签在测试时几乎不可用。
AI.method: 提出预测加权平衡准确率（pBA），用多类子概念模型输出的后验概率替代真实子概念标签，将期望效用作为评估权重，形成软性的、不确定性感知的评估指标。
AI.result: 在表格基准、医学影像和文本数据集上，未加权的评估在类内异质性下具有误导性，而pBA在子概念分布不均但不极端的情况下提供了更稳定、可解释的评估结果。
AI.conclusion: pBA是一种实用且有效的替代方案，能够在缺乏真实子概念标签时，对类内不平衡的模型性能进行更公正的评估。

title: MATH-PT: A Math Reasoning Benchmark for European and Brazilian Portuguese
comment: Accepted at 17th International Conference on Computational Processing of Portuguese (PROPOR 2026). Open access to dataset repo https://huggingface.co/datasets/tiagoteixeira03/MATH-PT and model outputs https://github.com/deep-spin/math-benchmark
summary: The use of large language models (LLMs) for complex mathematical reasoning is an emergent area of research, with fast progress in methods, models, and benchmark datasets. However, most mathematical reasoning evaluations exhibit a significant linguistic bias, with the vast majority of benchmark datasets being exclusively in English or (at best) translated from English. We address this limitation by introducing {\sc Math-PT}, a novel dataset comprising 1,729 mathematical problems written in European and Brazilian Portuguese. {\sc Math-PT} is curated from a variety of high-quality native sources, including mathematical Olympiads, competitions, and exams from Portugal and Brazil. We present a comprehensive benchmark of current state-of-the-art LLMs on {\sc Math-PT}, revealing that frontier reasoning models achieve strong performance in multiple choice questions compared to open weight models, but that their performance decreases for questions with figures or open-ended questions. To facilitate future research, we release the benchmark dataset and model outputs.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出Math-PT数据集，包含1,729道葡萄牙语数学题，评估了当前大语言模型在该数据集上的表现，发现前沿推理模型在选择题上表现优异，但在涉及图形或开放性问题时性能下降。
AI.motivation: 现有数学推理评估存在显著的语言偏见，绝大部分基准数据集仅使用英语或从英语翻译而来，缺乏对非英语语言的评估，这限制了LLM在多语言数学推理能力上的研究。
AI.method: 构建了Math-PT数据集，包含1,729道来自葡萄牙和巴西的数学奥林匹克竞赛、比赛和考试的高质量题目，并在此数据集上对当前最先进的LLM进行了全面基准测试。
AI.result: 前沿推理模型在多项选择题上相比开放权重模型表现强劲，但在涉及图形或开放性问题的题目上性能下降明显。
AI.conclusion: 为了促进未来研究，团队将公开该基准数据集和模型输出结果，以推动多语言数学推理评估的发展。

title: RepoDoc: A Knowledge Graph-Based Framework to Automatic Documentation Generation and Incremental Updates
summary:
Maintaining up-to-date, comprehensive documentation for large codebases is a persistent challenge. Recent progress in automated documentation has moved from template-based rules to large language models (LLMs), yet existing tools still process source code as flat fragments, producing isolated documents that lack semantic structure. This design also leads to excessive token consumption and slow generation, while failing to capture how code changes propagate across dependencies.
  We propose RepoDoc, a system that uses a repository knowledge graph (RepoKG) as the semantic foundation for the entire documentation lifecycle. Our framework consists of three stages: (1) RepoKG construction, which extracts code entities and their relationships; (2) module clustering, which groups code into functionally cohesive, hierarchical units; and (3) skillful agent-based generation, which queries the graph to create modular, cross-referenced documentation with auto-generated Mermaid diagrams. For incremental maintenance, a semantic impact propagation mechanism navigates the RepoKG bidirectionally to pinpoint all affected parts, allowing selective, targeted regeneration.
  Evaluated on 24 repositories across 8 programming languages, RepoDoc substantially outperforms state-of-the-art alternatives. It improves API coverage by 32.5% and completeness by 10.4%, while generating documentation 3x faster with 85% fewer tokens. For incremental updates, it cuts update time by 73% and token usage by 77%, and achieves 10.2% higher update recall, more accurately reflecting code changes in the regenerated documentation.
  The source code and experimental artifacts are available at https://github.com/SYSUSELab/RepoDoc.

AI.tldr: RepoDoc 提出基于知识图谱的仓库文档生成系统，通过构建 RepoKG、模块聚类和智能体生成三阶段，实现高效、结构化的代码文档自动生成与增量更新，在 24 个库上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有自动化文档工具将代码视为扁平片段，生成孤立文档，缺乏语义结构；同时存在 token 消耗大、生成速度慢、无法捕捉代码变更在依赖间传播的问题。
AI.method: 三阶段框架：(1) 构建仓库知识图谱 (RepoKG)，提取代码实体及其关系；(2) 模块聚类，将代码按功能内聚性分层分组；(3) 基于智能体的生成，查询图谱生成模块化、交叉引用的文档和 Mermaid 图。增量维护时通过语义影响传播机制双向导航 RepoKG 定位受影响部分，实现选择性重生成。
AI.result: 在 8 种语言 24 个仓库上：API 覆盖率提升 32.5%，完整性提升 10.4%；生成速度 3 倍，token 减少 85%；增量更新耗时减少 73%，token 减少 77%，召回率提升 10.2%。
AI.conclusion: RepoDoc 证明以知识图谱为核心的语义化文档框架能有效解决大规模代码库的文档生成与维护难题，显著提升效率和质量。

title: DreamProver: Evolving Transferable Lemma Libraries via a Wake-Sleep Theorem-Proving Agent
summary: We introduce DreamProver, an agentic framework that leverages a "wake-sleep" program induction paradigm to discover reusable lemmas for formal theorem proving. Existing approaches either rely on fixed lemma libraries, which limit adaptability, or synthesize highly specific intermediate lemmas tailored to individual theorems, thereby lacking generality. DreamProver addresses this gap through an iterative two-stage process. In the wake stage, DreamProver attempts to prove theorems from a training set using the current lemma library while proposing new candidate lemmas. In the "sleep" stage, it abstracts, refines, and consolidates these candidates to compress and optimize the library. Through this alternating cycle, DreamProver progressively evolves a compact set of high-level, transferable lemmas that can be effectively used to prove unseen theorems in related domains. Experimental results demonstrate that DreamProver substantially improves proof success rates across a diverse set of mathematical benchmarks, while also producing more concise proofs and reducing computational cost.

AI.tldr: DreamProver是一个基于"醒-睡"程序归纳范式的智能框架，通过迭代两阶段过程自动发现可重用的引理，用于形式化定理证明，显著提升了多个数学基准上的证明成功率，同时生成了更简洁的证明并降低了计算成本。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么依赖固定的引理库（缺乏适应性），要么为单个定理合成高度特化的中间引理（缺乏泛化性），无法在学习可重用且具有泛化能力的引理方面取得良好平衡。
AI.method: 采用"醒-睡"两阶段迭代范式：在"醒"阶段，使用当前引理库证明训练集中的定理，同时提出新的候选引理；在"睡"阶段，对这些候选引理进行抽象、精炼和整合，压缩并优化引理库。通过交替循环逐步演化出紧凑、高层次、可迁移的引理集合。
AI.result: 在多个数学基准测试上，DreamProver显著提高了证明成功率，生成了更简洁的证明，并降低了计算成本。
AI.conclusion: DreamProver通过让引理库在证明过程中自主演化，有效解决了固定引理库适应性差与特化引理泛化性不足之间的矛盾，为形式化定理证明中自动发现可重用知识提供了一条有前景的路径。

title: When to Retrieve During Reasoning: Adaptive Retrieval for Large Reasoning Models
comment: 12 pages, 3 figures, 9 tables. Accepted at SIGIR 2026 (49th International ACM SIGIR Conference on Research and Development in Information Retrieval), Melbourne, Australia
summary: Large reasoning models such as DeepSeek-R1 and OpenAI o1 generate extended chains of thought spanning thousands of tokens, yet their integration with retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) remains fundamentally misaligned. Current RAG systems optimize for providing context before reasoning begins, while reasoning models require evidence injection during multi-step inference chains. We introduce ReaLM-Retrieve, a reasoning-aware retrieval framework that addresses this mismatch through three key innovations: (1) a step-level uncertainty detector that identifies knowledge gaps at reasoning-step granularity rather than token or sentence level; (2) a retrieval intervention policy that learns when external evidence maximally benefits ongoing reasoning; and (3) an efficiency-optimized integration mechanism that reduces per-retrieval overhead by 3.2x compared to naive integration. Experiments on MuSiQue, HotpotQA, and 2WikiMultiHopQA demonstrate that ReaLM-Retrieve achieves on average 10.1% absolute improvement in answer F1 over standard RAG (range: 9.0-11.8% across the three benchmarks) while reducing retrieval calls by 47% compared to fixed-interval approaches like IRCoT (all improvements significant at p<0.01, paired bootstrap). On the challenging MuSiQue benchmark requiring 2-4 hop reasoning, our method achieves 71.2% F1 with an average of only 1.8 retrieval calls per question. Analysis shows that ReaLM-Retrieve also improves retrieval quality itself, achieving 81.3% Recall@5 with consistently higher precision and MRR than fixed-interval baselines on supporting evidence, establishing new state-of-the-art efficiency-accuracy trade-offs for reasoning-intensive retrieval tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出ReaLM-Retrieve，一种面向推理模型的检索增强生成框架，通过步骤级不确定性检测、智能检索干预策略和高效集成机制，在减少47%检索调用次数的同时，平均提升答案F1值10.1%。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG系统在推理开始前提供上下文，而大推理模型（如DeepSeek-R1、OpenAI o1）需要在整个多步推理过程中动态注入证据，两者之间存在根本性不匹配。
AI.method: 三个创新：(1)步骤级不确定性检测器，在推理步骤粒度而非token或句子级别识别知识缺口；(2)学习何时外部证据对推理最有益的检索干预策略；(3)相对朴素集成降低3.2倍检索开销的高效集成机制。
AI.result: 在MuSiQue、HotpotQA、2WikiMultiHopQA上，相比标准RAG平均F1提升10.1%（范围9.0-11.8%）；相比IRCoT等固定间隔方法减少47%检索调用；在MuSiQue上仅需1.8次检索即达71.2% F1；检索质量Recall@5达81.3%。
AI.conclusion: ReaLM-Retrieve在推理密集型检索任务上实现了效率-精度的新SOTA权衡，有效弥合了推理模型与RAG之间的对齐鸿沟。

title: A Data-Centric Framework for Intraoperative Fluorescence Lifetime Imaging for Glioma Surgical Guidance
summary: Accurate intraoperative assessment of glioma infiltration is essential for maximizing tumor resection while preserving functional brain tissue. Fluorescence lifetime imaging (FLIm) offers real-time, label-free biochemical contrast, but its clinical utility is challenged by biological heterogeneity, class imbalance, and variability in histopathological labeling. We present a data-centric AI (DC-AI) framework that integrates confident learning (CL), class refinement, and targeted label evaluation to develop a robust multi-class FLIm classifier for glioblastoma (GBM) resection margins. FLIm data were collected from 192 tissue margins across 31 newly diagnosed IDH-wildtype GBM patients and initially labeled into seven tumor cellularity classes by an expert neuropathologist. CL was applied to quantify FLIm point-level confidence, identify label inconsistencies, and guide iterative class merging into a three-class scheme ("low", "moderate", "high"). The resulting high-fidelity dataset enabled training a model that achieved 96% accuracy in the three-class task. SHAP analysis revealed class-specific FLIm feature importance, highlighting distinct optical signatures across the infiltration spectrum. Targeted FLIm analysis further identified biological (e.g., gray matter composition) and acquisition-related (e.g., blood contamination) contributors to low-confidence predictions. Blinded re-evaluation of margins flagged by CL demonstrated intra-pathologist variability, underscoring the value of selective relabeling rather than exhaustive review. Together, these findings demonstrate that a DC-AI framework can systematically improve data reliability, enhance model robustness, and refine biological interpretation of FLIm signals, supporting the development of clinically actionable optical tools for real-time glioma margin assessment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种数据为中心的AI框架，通过自信学习、类别细化和目标标签评估，开发了用于胶质母细胞瘤切除边缘的稳健多类荧光寿命成像分类器，在低/中/高三类任务中达到了96%的准确率。
AI.motivation: 术中准确评估胶质瘤浸润程度对最大化肿瘤切除同时保护功能脑区至关重要。FLIm提供实时、无标记的生化对比，但受生物异质性、类别不平衡和组织病理学标记变异性的限制，临床实用性面临挑战。
AI.method: 收集31例IDH野生型GBM患者的192个组织边缘FLIm数据，初始由专家标注为7类肿瘤细胞性类别。应用自信学习量化FLIm点级置信度、识别标签不一致性，迭代合并为低/中/高三类方案，形成高保真数据集训练分类器。
AI.result: 三分类任务准确率达96%。SHAP分析揭示了不同浸润谱的独特光学特征。目标FLIm分析识别了低置信度预测的生物学因素（如灰质成分）和采集相关因素（如血液污染）。自信学习标记的边缘盲审复评显示了病理学家内部变异性。
AI.conclusion: 数据为中心的AI框架能系统性地提高数据可靠性、增强模型鲁棒性、优化FLIm信号的生物学解释，支持开发临床可操作的光学工具用于实时胶质瘤边缘评估。

title: RaMP: Runtime-Aware Megakernel Polymorphism for Mixture-of-Experts
summary: The optimal kernel configuration for Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) inference depends on both batch size and the expert routing distribution, yet production systems dispatch from batch size alone, leaving 10-70% of kernel throughput unrealized. We present RaMP, a routing-aware dispatch framework. A performance-region analysis derives, from hardware constants alone, when each optimization helps, correctly predicting all 8 tested architectures, including 3 unseen. A four-parameter wave cost model selects the fastest configuration from the runtime expert histogram, achieving 0.93% mean regret versus exhaustive search, fitted from just 10-24 minutes of one-time profiling per model. Because the model depends only on CTA grid geometry, it is kernel-agnostic: applied to Alpha-MoE, it delivers 1.14x with no source modification. Paired with a co-designed CuTe DSL kernel exposing 134-268 polymorphic configurations, RaMP delivers 1.22x kernel speedup over static dispatch and 1.30x end-to-end speedup in vLLM serving over Triton, 1.41x over DeepGEMM, and 1.13x over FlashInfer CUTLASS.

AI.tldr: RaMP提出了一种路由感知的MoE推理调度框架，通过性能区域分析和波成本模型，根据运行时专家路由分布动态选择最优内核配置，实现1.22倍内核加速和1.30倍端到端加速，无需修改源代码。
AI.motivation: 现有MoE推理系统仅根据batch size调度内核，忽略了专家路由分布对性能的影响，导致10-70%的内核吞吐量未被充分利用。
AI.method: 1) 性能区域分析：仅从硬件常数推导优化条件，预测8种架构。2) 四参数波成本模型：根据运行时专家直方图选择最快配置，仅需10-24分钟一次性profiling，平均遗憾率0.93%。3) 与CuTe DSL内核协同设计，支持134-268种多态配置。
AI.result: Alpha-MoE上实现1.14倍加速（无需源码修改）；内核层面比静态调度快1.22倍；vLLM端到端比Triton快1.30倍，比DeepGEMM快1.41倍，比FlashInfer CUTLASS快1.13倍。
AI.conclusion: 路由感知调度能显著提升MoE推理性能，且该方法具有通用性（不依赖特定内核），为生产环境MoE推理提供了实用的优化方案。

title: Information Extraction from Electricity Invoices with General-Purpose Large Language Models
summary: Information extraction from semi-structured business documents remains a critical challenge for enterprise management. This study evaluates the capability of general-purpose Large Language Models to extract structured information from Spanish electricity invoices without task-specific fine-tuning. Using a subset of the IDSEM dataset, we benchmark two architecturally distinct models, Gemini 1.5 Pro and Mistral-small, across 19 parameter configurations and 6 prompting strategies. Our experimental framework treats prompt engineering as the primary experimental variable, comparing zero-shot baselines against increasingly sophisticated few-shot approaches and iterative extraction strategies. Results demonstrate that prompt quality dominates over hyperparameter tuning: the F1-score variation across all parameter configurations is marginal, while the gap between zero-shot and the best few-shot strategy exceeds 19 percentage points. The best configuration (few-shot with cross-validation) achieves an F1-score of 97.61% for Gemini and 96.11% for Mistral-small, with document template structure emerging as the primary determinant of extraction difficulty. These findings establish that prompt design is the critical lever for maximizing extraction fidelity in LLM-based document processing, thereby providing an empirical framework for integrating general-purpose LLMs into business document automation.

AI.tldr: 本研究评估了通用大语言模型（Gemini 1.5 Pro和Mistral-small）在无需微调的情况下，从西班牙语电费发票中提取结构化信息的能力。实验发现，提示工程的质量远超超参数调优的影响：不同参数配置下的F1分数变化微小，而零样本与最佳少样本策略之间的差距超过19个百分点。最佳配置（少样本+交叉验证）在Gemini上达到97.61%的F1分数，在Mistral-small上达到96.11%，文档模板结构是提取难度的主要决定因素。
AI.motivation: 从半结构化业务文档中提取信息对企业管理至关重要，但通用大语言模型在无需任务特定微调情况下的提取能力尚未被充分评估，尤其是在西班牙语电力发票这类特定领域。
AI.method: 使用IDSEM数据集子集，在19种参数配置和6种提示策略下，对Gemini 1.5 Pro和Mistral-small两种架构不同的模型进行基准测试，将提示工程作为主要实验变量，比较零样本基线、少样本方法和迭代提取策略。
AI.result: 提示质量主导提取性能：参数配置变化导致的F1分数波动微乎其微，而零样本与最佳少样本策略的F1差距超过19个百分点。最佳配置（少样本+交叉验证）下Gemini达97.61%，Mistral-small达96.11%。文档模板结构是影响提取难度的首要因素。
AI.conclusion: 提示设计是最大化LLM文档提取保真度的关键杠杆，为将通用大语言模型集成到业务文档自动化流程提供了实证框架。

title: Identifying and Characterizing Semantic Clones of Solidity Functions
summary: Smart Contracts are essential blockchain components, mainly written in Solidity. The high availability of public Solidity code leads to frequent reuse and high clone ratios. Since cloning can propagate vulnerabilities and flaws, effective detection is crucial. Although existing techniques work well in detecting syntactic clones, the identification of semantic clones is an open problem. To address this challenge, in this paper, we present and empirically assess a scalable methodology, based on analyzing code and comments, to spot semantically equivalent Solidity functions. We first collected an up-to-date dataset of about 300,000 Ethereum smart contracts, 82.07% of which are compliant with modern Solidity version 0.8. Manual validation of a statistically significant sample comprising 1,155 function pairs confirms the effectiveness of our solution, achieving an overall precision of 59% (rising to 84% for homonymous functions) and a recall of 97%. Besides, we explore the structural differences occurring on semantically equivalent Solidity functions, demonstrating that they often represent design alternatives focused on security choices, modularization, and gas optimization. Finally, we investigate the use of Large Language Models (LLMs) as documentation engines in scenarios where code comments are poor or absent. Our results show that LLM-generated summaries, combined with sentence transformers like BERT, can bridge the documentation gap, enabling the identification of semantic clones in uncommented code with 75% precision. This work establishes a modern benchmark for Solidity clone detection and provides a foundation for the automated discovery of secure and efficient code alternatives.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于代码和注释分析的、可扩展的Solidity语义等价函数检测方法，在约30万以太坊智能合约数据集上达到59%精确率（同名函数84%）和97%召回率，并探索了LLM作为文档引擎弥补注释缺失的可行性（75%精确率）。
AI.motivation: 现有技术对Solidity代码的语法克隆检测效果良好，但语义克隆（功能等价但结构不同的代码）的识别仍是一个开放问题。由于代码克隆可能传播漏洞和缺陷，而Solidity代码复用率高，迫切需要有效的语义克隆检测方法。
AI.method: 收集约30万以太坊智能合约（82.07%符合Solidity 0.8版本），基于代码和注释分析进行语义等价函数检测；对1155个函数对进行统计显著的手动验证；探索利用LLM生成代码摘要，结合BERT等句子变换器在注释缺失场景下识别语义克隆。
AI.result: 整体精确率59%（同名函数84%），召回率97%；LLM+句子变换器在无注释代码上达到75%精确率；揭示了语义等价函数的结构差异主要体现在安全选择、模块化和Gas优化等设计替代方案。
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了Solidity克隆检测的现代基准，为自动化发现安全且高效的代码替代方案提供了基础。LLM作为文档生成引擎能有效弥补注释缺失，辅助语义克隆识别。

title: Auto-Relational Reasoning
summary: Background & Objectives: In the last decade, Machine learning research has grown rapidly, but large models are reaching their soft limits demonstrating diminishing returns and still lack solid reasoning abilities. These limits could be surpassed through synergistic combination of Machine Learning scalability and rigid reasoning. Methods: In this work, we propose a theoretical framework for reasoning through object-relations in an automated manner integrated with Artificial Neural Networks. We present a formal analysis of the Reasoning, and we show the theory in practice through a paradigm integrating Reasoning and Machine Learning. Results: This paradigm is a system that solves Intelligence Quotient problems without any prior knowledge of the problem. Our system achieves 98.03% solving rate corresponding to the top 1% percentile or 132-144 iq score. This result is only limited by the small size of the model and the processing capabilities of the machine it run on. Conclusions: With the integration of prior knowledge in the system and the expansion of the dataset, the system can be generalized to solve a large category of problems. The functionality of the system inherently favors the solution of such problems in few-shot or zero-shot attempts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将机器学习可扩展性与严格推理相结合的理论框架，通过对象-关系推理范式实现自动化推理，并在IQ测试中达到98.03%的解决率（对应132-144 IQ），无需任何先验知识。
AI.motivation: 大型机器学习模型正达到软极限，出现收益递减且仍缺乏可靠的推理能力。作者认为通过将机器学习的可扩展性与严格推理进行协同结合，可以突破这些限制。
AI.method: 提出一个通过对象-关系进行自动化推理的理论框架，并与人工神经网络集成。对推理过程进行了形式化分析，并展示了将推理与机器学习相结合的实际范式系统。
AI.result: 系统无需任何先验知识即可解决IQ问题，达到98.03%的解决率，对应前1% percentile或132-144 IQ分数。该结果仅受限于模型大小和机器处理能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入先验知识和扩展数据集，该系统可以泛化到解决大量类别的问题。系统功能天然有利于少样本或零样本场景下的问题解决。

title: The Bandit's Blind Spot: The Critical Role of User State Representation in Recommender Systems
summary: With the increasing availability of online information, recommender systems have become an important tool for many web-based systems. Due to the continuous aspect of recommendation environments, these systems increasingly rely on contextual multi-armed bandits (CMAB) to deliver personalized and real-time suggestions. A critical yet underexplored component in these systems is the representation of user state, which typically encapsulates the user's interaction history and is deeply correlated with the model's decisions and learning. In this paper, we investigate the impact of different embedding-based state representations derived from matrix factorization models on the performance of traditional CMAB algorithms. Our large-scale experiments reveal that variations in state representation can lead to improvements greater than those achieved by changing the bandit algorithm itself. Furthermore, no single embedding or aggregation strategy consistently dominates across datasets, underscoring the need for domain-specific evaluation. These results expose a substantial gap in the literature and emphasize that advancing bandit-based recommender systems requires a holistic approach that prioritizes embedding quality and state construction alongside algorithmic innovation. The source code for our experiments is publicly available on https://github.com/UFSCar-LaSID/bandits_blind_spot.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在情境多臂老虎机推荐系统中，基于矩阵分解的不同嵌入状态表示对算法性能的影响。实验发现状态表示的变化比更换算法本身能带来更大提升，且没有一种嵌入策略普遍最优，强调了嵌入质量和状态构建的重要性。
AI.motivation: 现有的情境多臂老虎机推荐系统研究中，用户状态表示这一关键组件被严重忽视，大多数工作聚焦于算法创新而忽略了状态表示对性能的潜在影响。
AI.method: 采用基于矩阵分解模型的不同嵌入状态表示，将其应用于传统CMAB算法，并通过大规模实验对比不同嵌入策略和聚合方式的表现。
AI.result: 1) 状态表示的差异带来的性能提升甚至超过更换算法本身；2) 不存在一种通用的最优嵌入或聚合策略，其效果高度依赖数据集特性。
AI.conclusion: 推进基于老虎机的推荐系统需要将嵌入质量和状态构建与算法创新同等重视，采取整体性方法。

title: Why Domain Matters: A Preliminary Study of Domain Effects in Underwater Object Detection
comment: Poster Presentation at ICRA 2026 Workshop S2S
summary: Domain shift, where deviations between training and deployment data distributions degrade model performance, is a key challenge in underwater environments. Existing benchmarks testing performance for underwater domain shift simulate variability through synthetic style transfer. This fails to capture intrinsic scene factors such as visibility, illumination, scene composition, or acquisition factors, limiting analysis of real-world effects. We propose a labeling framework that defines underwater domains using measurable image, scene, and acquisition characteristics. Unlike prior benchmarks, it captures physically meaningful factors, enabling semantically consistent image grouping and supporting domain-specific evaluation of detection performance including failure analysis. We validate this on public datasets, showing systematic variations across domain factors and revealing hidden failure modes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于可测量图像、场景和采集特征的水下域定义标注框架，能够进行语义一致的图像分组和域特定检测性能评估，揭示了传统合成风格迁移方法忽略的真实域偏移因素和隐藏故障模式。
AI.motivation: 现有水下域偏移基准通过合成风格迁移模拟变化，无法捕捉能见度、光照、场景构成等真实场景因素，限制了对真实世界影响的分析，因此需要一种能定义物理意义上可解释的域的方法。
AI.method: 提出一个标注框架，利用可测量的图像、场景和采集特征来定义水下域，实现语义一致的图像分组，并支持域特定的检测性能评估和故障分析。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上验证了该方法，展示了不同域因素下的系统性变化，并揭示了隐藏的故障模式。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能够捕获物理上有意义的域因素，相比传统合成方法更真实地反映水下环境中的域偏移问题，有助于更深入分析检测模型的失败原因。

title: Observable Neural ODEs for Identifiable Causal Forecasting in Continuous Time
summary: Causal inference in continuous-time sequential decision problems is challenged by hidden confounders. We show that, in latent state-space models with time-varying interventions, observability of the latent dynamics from observed data is necessary for identifying dynamic treatment effects, linking control-theoretic observability to causal identifiability, even when hidden confounders affect both treatments and outcomes. We derive a continuous-time adjustment formula expressing potential outcome distributions under treatment trajectories via the measurement model, latent dynamics, and the filtering distribution over latent states given observed histories. We propose Observable Neural ODEs (ObsNODEs), Neural ODE models in observable normal form for causal forecasting. ObsNODEs learn continuous-time dynamics with states reconstructible from observations, enabling outcome prediction under alternative treatment paths. Experiments on synthetic cancer data, semi-synthetic data based on MIMIC-IV, and real-world sepsis data show strong performance over recent sequence models.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了连续时间序列决策问题中的因果推断，证明了在潜在状态空间模型中，潜在动态的可观测性是识别动态治疗效果的必要条件，并提出了可观测神经ODE（ObsNODEs）模型用于因果预测。
AI.motivation: 连续时间序列决策问题中，隐藏混杂因素的存在使得因果推断极具挑战性，现有方法难以有效处理这种情况。
AI.method: （1）建立了控制理论中的可观测性与因果可识别性之间的联系；（2）推导了连续时间调整公式；（3）提出ObsNODEs模型，采用可观测标准形式的神经ODE。
AI.result: 在合成癌症数据、基于MIMIC-IV的半合成数据以及真实脓毒症数据上，ObsNODEs优于近期序列模型。
AI.conclusion: 潜在动态的可观测性是连续时间因果推断的关键条件，ObsNODEs能够有效进行反事实预测。

title: CogRAG+: Cognitive-Level Guided Diagnosis and Remediation of Memory and Reasoning Deficiencies in Professional Exam QA
summary: Professional domain knowledge underpins human civilization, serving as both the basis for industry entry and the core of complex decision-making and problem-solving. However, existing large language models often suffer from opaque inference processes in which retrieval and reasoning are tightly entangled, causing knowledge gaps and reasoning inconsistencies in professional tasks. To address this, we propose CogRAG+, a training-free framework that decouples and aligns the retrieval-augmented generation pipeline with human cognitive hierarchies. First, we introduce Reinforced Retrieval, a judge-driven dual-path strategy with fact-centric and option-centric paths that strengthens retrieval and mitigates cascading failures caused by missing foundational knowledge. We then develop cognition-stratified Constrained Reasoning, which replaces unconstrained chain-of-thought generation with structured templates to reduce logical inconsistency and generative redundancy. Experiments on two representative models, Qwen3-8B and Llama3.1-8B, show that CogRAG+ consistently outperforms general-purpose models and standard RAG methods on the Registered Dietitian qualification exam. In single-question mode, it raises overall accuracy to 85.8\% for Qwen3-8B and 60.3\% for Llama3.1-8B, with clear gains over vanilla baselines. Constrained Reasoning also reduces the unanswered rate from 7.6\% to 1.4\%. CogRAG+ offers a robust, model-agnostic path toward training-free expert-level performance in specialized domains.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CogRAG+框架，通过解耦检索与推理、引入强化检索和分层约束推理，在注册营养师资格考试上显著提升了Qwen3-8B和Llama3.1-8B的性能，无需额外训练。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型在专业领域任务中检索与推理紧密耦合，导致知识缺失和推理不一致的问题，迫切需要一种解耦检索与推理、对齐人类认知层次的训练无关框架。
AI.method: 提出CogRAG+框架：1）强化检索（Reinforced Retrieval），采用基于评判器的双路径策略（事实中心路径和选项中心路径）；2）认知分层约束推理（Cognition-stratified Constrained Reasoning），用结构化模板替代无约束思维链生成，减少逻辑不一致和生成冗余。
AI.result: 在注册营养师资格考试上，Qwen3-8B单题准确率达85.8%，Llama3.1-8B达60.3%，均显著优于通用模型和标准RAG方法；未回答率从7.6%降至1.4%。
AI.conclusion: CogRAG+提供了一种鲁棒、模型无关的训练无关路径，可在专业领域实现专家级性能。

title: PICKLES: a Natural Language Framework for Requirement Specification and Model-Based Testing
summary: This paper combines methods from the fields of Model-Based Testing (MBT) and Behaviour-Driven Development (BDD) to define a testing approach with human-readable specifications and test cases, as in BDD, while using the modelling techniques and automatic test generation algorithms from MBT. We introduce PICKLES, a Precise Input and Control-flow Keyword-based Language for tEst Scenarios; an extension of Gherkin-style BDD scenarios, specified in structured natural language. We provide a bi-directional translation from Pickles scenarios to formal models, where both specifications and tests are human-readable, and a method to obtain a so-called master model combining all translated scenarios. Standard MBT algorithms can then be applied to automatically derive test cases from it. We implement a prototype of the translation and composition steps, which we use on an industrial case study: a software component from a traffic management system. With it, we illustrate the pipeline and show how Pickles can achieve significantly higher coverage with respect to BDD from the same set of scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PICKLES方法，结合模型驱动测试（MBT）和行为驱动开发（BDD），通过双向翻译将人类可读的BDD场景转化为形式化模型，实现自动化测试生成，并在交通管理系统的工业案例中证明其相比传统BDD能显著提高覆盖率。
AI.motivation: BDD的场景规格说明和测试用例人类可读，但缺乏自动化测试生成能力；MBT具备自动化测试生成，但其模型难以被非技术人员理解。因此，本文旨在结合两者优势，既保留人类可读性，又利用MBT的自动化测试生成算法。
AI.method: 定义PICKLES语言（Gherkin风格BDD场景的扩展），提供从PICKLES场景到形式化模型的双向翻译，并构建一个整合所有翻译后场景的"主模型（master model）"，然后应用标准MBT算法自动导出测试用例。
AI.result: 在交通管理系统的软件组件上进行了工业案例研究，验证了PICKLES pipeline的有效性，并证明从相同场景集出发，PICKLES能实现比传统BDD显著更高的覆盖率。
AI.conclusion: PICKLES成功弥合了BDD与MBT之间的鸿沟，在保持人类可读性的同时实现了自动化测试生成和更高覆盖率，为工业级测试提供了可行方案。

title: Grounding vs. Compositionality: On the Non-Complementarity of Reasoning in Neuro-Symbolic Systems
summary: Compositional generalization remains a foundational weakness of modern neural networks, limiting their robustness and applicability in domains requiring out-of-distribution reasoning. A central, yet unverified, assumption in neuro-symbolic AI is that compositional reasoning will emerge as a byproduct of successful symbol grounding. This work presents the first systematic empirical analysis to challenge this assumption by disentangling the contributions of grounding and reasoning. To operationalize this investigation, we introduce the Iterative Logic Tensor Network ($i$LTN), a fully differentiable architecture designed for multi-step deduction. Using a formal taxonomy of generalization -- probing for novel entities, unseen relations, and complex rule compositions -- we demonstrate that a model trained solely on a grounding objective fails to generalize. In contrast, our full $i$LTN, trained jointly on perceptual grounding and multi-step reasoning, achieves high zero-shot accuracy across all tasks. Our findings provide conclusive evidence that symbol grounding, while necessary, is insufficient for generalization, establishing that reasoning is not an emergent property but a distinct capability that requires an explicit learning objective.

AI.tldr: 本文通过提出可微分的迭代逻辑张量网络（iLTN），首次系统性地验证了一个核心假设：符号接地（symbol grounding）虽必要但不足以实现 compositional generalization，推理能力并非涌现产物，而是需要显式学习目标的独立能力。
AI.motivation: 神经符号AI领域长期存在一个未经验证的假设：组合推理能力会随着符号接地的成功而自然涌现。本文旨在通过实证分析挑战这一假设，解耦接地与推理对组合泛化的各自贡献。
AI.method: 提出迭代逻辑张量网络（iLTN），一种支持多步推理的全可微架构。利用形式化的泛化分类体系（新实体、未见关系、复杂规则组合），对比仅训练接地目标 vs. 联合训练接地与多步推理的表现。
AI.result: 仅训练接地目标的模型在所有泛化任务上失败；完整iLTN（联合训练接地+多步推理）在所有任务上实现高零样本准确率。
AI.conclusion: 符号接地是必要的但不足以实现组合泛化；推理不是涌现特性，而是一种需要显式学习目标的独立能力。

title: AgentSim: A Platform for Verifiable Agent-Trace Simulation
summary: Training trustworthy agentic LLMs requires data that shows the grounded reasoning process, not just the final answer. Existing datasets fall short: question-answering data is outcome-only, chain-of-thought data is not tied to specific documents, and web-agent datasets track interface actions rather than the core retrieval and synthesis steps of a RAG workflow. We introduce AgentSim, an open-source platform for simulating RAG agents. It generates verifiable, stepwise traces of agent reasoning over any document collection. AgentSim uses a policy to ensure the agent widely explores the document set. It combines a multi-model validation pipeline with an active human-in-the-loop process. This approach focuses human effort on difficult steps where models disagree. Using AgentSim, we construct and release the Agent-Trace Corpus (ATC), a large collection of grounded reasoning trajectories spanning three established IR benchmarks. We make three contributions: (1) the AgentSim platform with two mechanisms, Corpus-Aware Seeding and Active Validation, that improve trace diversity and quality; (2) the Agent-Trace Corpus (ATC), over 103,000 verifiable reasoning steps spanning three IR benchmarks, with 100% grounding rate on substantive answers; and (3) a comparative behavioral analysis revealing systematic differences in how state-of-the-art models approach information seeking. Platform, toolkit, and corpus are publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AgentSim平台，用于生成可验证的、基于文档的RAG代理推理轨迹，并构建了包含10万+步骤的Agent-Trace语料库（ATC），通过主动验证和人机协同机制确保数据质量。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集缺乏展示主体推理过程的数据：QA数据只给出最终答案，CoT数据不绑定具体文档，web-agent数据追踪界面操作而非RAG的核心检索与综合步骤。
AI.method: AgentSim平台包含两个核心机制：Corpus-Aware Seeding（语料感知播种）提升轨迹多样性，Active Validation（主动验证）通过多模型验证+人在环中聚焦模型分歧的困难步骤。
AI.result: 构建了Agent-Trace Corpus（ATC），包含超过103,000个可验证推理步骤，覆盖三个IR基准，实质性回答的100%接地率。并进行了对比行为分析，揭示前沿模型在信息寻求上的系统差异。
AI.conclusion: AgentSim平台和ATC语料库为训练可信的、具备推理过程的agentic LLM提供了高质量数据，平台、工具和语料均开源。

title: Lifting Embodied World Models for Planning and Control
summary: World models of embodied agents predict future observations conditioned on an action taken by the agent. For complex embodiments, action spaces are high-dimensional and difficult to specify: for example, precisely controlling a human agent requires specifying the motion of each joint. This makes the world model hard to control and expensive to plan with as search-based methods like CEM scale poorly with action dimensionality. To address this issue, we train a lightweight policy that maps high-level actions to sequences of low-level joint actions. Composing this policy with the frozen world model produces a lifted world model that predicts a sequence of future observations from a single high-level action. We instantiate this framework for a human-like embodiment, defining the high-level action space as a small set of 2D waypoints annotated on the current observation frame, each specifying a near-term goal position for a leaf joint (pelvis, head, hands). Waypoints are low-dimensional, visually interpretable, and easy to specify manually or to search over. We show that the lifted world model substantially outperforms searching directly in low-level joint space ($3.8\times$ lower mean joint error to the goal pose), while remaining more compute-efficient and generalizing to environments unseen by the policy.

AI.tldr: 提出一种"提升世界模型"(Lifted World Model)框架，通过轻量级策略将高层动作(2D路径点)映射为低层关节动作，从而在复杂人体化身的高维动作空间中实现更高效、更精确的未来观测预测，相比直接搜索低层关节空间，联合误差降低3.8倍。
AI.motivation: 具身智能体的世界模型面临高维动作空间带来的控制困难和规划计算成本高的问题，尤其是类人化身涉及多关节运动，传统搜索方法(如CEM)扩展性差。
AI.method: 训练一个轻量级策略网络，将高层动作(2D路径点，标注在当前观测帧上，指定叶关节如骨盆、头部、手部的近端目标位置)映射为低层关节动作序列；将该策略与冻结的世界模型组合，形成"提升世界模型"，可从单个高层动作预测未来观测序列。
AI.result: 提升世界模型在目标姿态的联合误差上比直接在低层关节空间搜索低3.8倍，计算效率更高，且能泛化到策略未见过的环境中。
AI.conclusion: 通过高层动作抽象(低维、视觉可解释的路径点)结合轻量级策略，可以有效解决复杂化身世界模型的高维动作控制难题，兼顾精度、效率和泛化能力。

title: Privacy-Preserving Federated Learning Framework for Distributed Chemical Process Optimization
summary: Industrial chemical plants often operate under strict data confidentiality constraints, making centralized data-driven process modeling difficult. Federated learning (FL) provides a promising solution by enabling collaborative model training across distributed facilities without sharing raw operational data. This paper proposes a privacy-preserving federated learning framework for distributed chemical process optimization using data collected from multiple geographically separated plants. Each plant locally trains a neural-network-based process model using its own time-series sensor data, while only model parameters are transmitted to a central aggregation server through secure aggregation mechanisms. This design allows cross-plant knowledge sharing while maintaining strict data locality and industrial confidentiality. Experimental evaluation was conducted using process datasets from three independent chemical plants operating under heterogeneous conditions. The results demonstrate rapid convergence of the federated model, with the global mean squared error decreasing from approximately 2369 to below 50 within the first five communication rounds and stabilizing around 35 after 40 rounds. In comparison with local-only training, the proposed federated framework significantly improves prediction accuracy across all plants, while achieving performance comparable to centralized training. The findings indicate that federated learning provides an effective and scalable solution for collaborative industrial analytics, enabling privacy-preserving predictive modeling and process optimization across distributed chemical production facilities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种隐私保护的联邦学习框架，用于分布式化工过程建模，允许多个独立化工厂在不共享原始数据的情况下协同训练神经网络模型，实验表明其收敛速度快、预测精度接近集中式训练，且优于本地独立训练。
AI.motivation: 化工企业因数据保密限制难以集中建模，联邦学习能打破数据孤岛，实现跨工厂协同优化，同时保护工业数据隐私。
AI.method: 各工厂本地使用时序传感器数据训练神经网络过程模型，仅将模型参数通过安全聚合机制上传至中央服务器进行聚合更新，保持数据本地化。
AI.result: 全局均方误差在前5轮通信内从约2369降至50以下，40轮后稳定在35左右；预测精度显著优于本地独立训练，性能接近集中式训练。
AI.conclusion: 联邦学习为分布式化工生产提供了一种有效且可扩展的解决方案，能在保障隐私的前提下实现协作式工业分析与过程优化。

title: LLMs Generate Kitsch
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used to generate pictures, texts, music, videos, and other works that have traditionally required human creativity. LLM-generated artifacts are often rated better than human-generated works in controlled studies. At the same time, they can come across as generic and hollow. We propose to resolve this tension by arguing that LLMs systematically generate kitsch, and that this is a consequence of the way in which they are trained. We also show empirically that readers perceive LLM-generated stories as kitschier, if we control for their definition of "kitsch". We discuss implications for the design of future studies and for creative tasks such as research and coding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出大型语言模型（LLMs）系统性地生成"媚俗"（kitsch）作品，这是其训练方式的必然结果。通过实证研究，在控制"媚俗"定义的情况下，读者确实认为LLM生成的故事更媚俗。文章讨论了这一发现对未来研究设计以及创意任务（如研究和编程）的启示。
AI.motivation: 解决一个矛盾现象：LLM生成的作品在对照研究中常被评价为优于人类创作，但又常被认为是"空洞、平庸"的。作者试图通过"媚俗"这一美学概念来调和这一张力，并从训练机制上解释其根源。
AI.method: 理论论证与实证研究相结合。理论上从LLM的训练方式（最大化平均人类偏好）推导其必然产生媚俗；实证上通过控制"媚俗"定义，让读者对LLM生成的故事进行评判。
AI.result: 在控制"媚俗"定义后，读者确实感知到LLM生成的故事比人类创作的故事更"媚俗"。
AI.conclusion: LLM生成媚俗是其训练方式的系统性结果，这对未来研究设计和创意工作（如研究和编程）具有重要启示意义。

title: Graph Construction and Matching for Imperative Programs using Neural and Structural Methods
comment: 20 Pages. Technical Report. Maynooth University, Ireland. Submitted on 29 April 2026
summary: Reusing verification artefacts requires identifying structural and semantic similarities across programs and their specifications. In this paper, we focus on graph construction as a foundational step toward this goal. We present a pipeline that converts imperative programs and their annotations into typed, attributed graphs. Our experiments cover datasets including C with ACSL, Java with JML, and Dafny for C\#. The pipeline integrates abstract syntax tree parsing with semantic embeddings derived from models such as SentenceTransformer and CodeBERT. This enables the generation of graph representations that capture both structural relationships and semantic context. Our results show that consistent graph representations can be constructed across different languages and annotation styles. This work provides a practical basis for future steps in semantic enrichment and approximate graph matching for scalable verification artefact reuse.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一条流水线，用于将带有注解的命令式程序（C/ACSL、Java/JML、Dafny）转换为类型化属性图，融合了AST解析与语义嵌入（SentenceTransformer、CodeBERT），为后续验证工件的语义丰富与近似图匹配奠定基础。
AI.motivation: 跨语言、跨规范的验证工件复用需要识别程序与规约之间的结构与语义相似性，而图构建是实现这一目标的基础步骤。
AI.method: 设计了一条流水线，将命令式程序及其注解通过AST解析与语义嵌入（SentenceTransformer、CodeBERT）相结合，生成类型化属性图，覆盖C（ACSL）、Java（JML）和Dafny（C#）三种语言。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能够跨不同语言和注解风格构建一致的图表示，验证了流水线的可行性与通用性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为后续语义丰富和近似图匹配以实现可扩展的验证工件复用提供了实用的基础。

title: AGEL-Comp: A Neuro-Symbolic Framework for Compositional Generalization in Interactive Agents
summary: Large Language Model (LLM)-based agents exhibit systemic failures in compositional generalization, limiting their robustness in interactive environments. This work introduces AGEL-Comp, a neuro-symbolic AI agent architecture designed to address this challenge by grounding actions of the agent. AGEL-Comp integrates three core innovations: (1) a dynamic Causal Program Graph (CPG) as a world model, representing procedural and causal knowledge as a directed hypergraph; (2) an Inductive Logic Programming (ILP) engine that synthesizes new Horn clauses from experiential feedback, grounding symbolic knowledge through interaction; and (3) a hybrid reasoning core where an LLM proposes a set of candidate sub-goals that are verified for logical consistency by a Neural Theorem Prover (NTP). Together, these components operationalize a deduction--abduction learning cycle: enabling the agent to deduce plans and abductively expand its symbolic world model, while a neural adaptation phase keeps its reasoning engine aligned with new knowledge. We propose an evaluation protocol within the \texttt{Retro Quest} simulation environment to probe for compositional generalization scenarios to evaluate our AGEL agent. Our findings clearly indicate the better performance of our AGEL model over pure LLM-based models. Our framework presents a principled path toward agents that build an explicit, interpretable, and compositionally structured understanding of their world.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AGEL-Comp，一种神经符号AI代理架构，通过动态因果程序图（CPG）、归纳逻辑编程（ILP）和神经定理证明器（NTP）的混合推理，解决LLM代理在组合泛化中的系统性失败问题，实验表明其性能优于纯LLM模型。
AI.motivation: 基于LLM的代理在交互环境中存在组合泛化的系统性失败，需要一种能够构建显式、可解释且组合结构化的世界理解的代理架构。
AI.method: AGEL-Comp架构包含三个核心创新：(1) 动态因果程序图（CPG）作为世界模型，以有向超图表示程序和因果知识；(2) 归纳逻辑编程（ILP）引擎从经验反馈中合成新的Horn子句；(3) 混合推理核心：LLM提出候选子目标，由神经定理证明器（NTP）验证逻辑一致性，实现演绎-溯因学习循环。
AI.result: 在Retro Quest模拟环境中的组合泛化场景下，AGEL模型的表现明显优于纯LLM模型。
AI.conclusion: AGEL-Comp为构建具有显式、可解释且组合结构化世界理解的代理提供了一条原则性路径。

title: Factorized Latent Reasoning for LLM-based Recommendation
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have recently been adopted for recommendation by framing user preference modeling as a language generation problem. However, existing latent reasoning approaches typically represent user intent with a single latent vector, which struggles to capture the inherently multi-faceted nature of user preferences. We propose Factorized Latent Reasoning (FLR), a novel framework for LLM-based sequential recommendation that decomposes latent reasoning into multiple disentangled preference factors. FLR introduces a lightweight multi-factor attention module that iteratively refines a latent thought representation, where each factor attends to distinct aspects of the user's interaction history. To encourage diversity and specialization, we design orthogonality, attention diversity, and sparsity regularization objectives, and dynamically aggregate factor contributions for the final prediction. We further integrate FLR with an efficient reinforcement learning strategy based on group-relative policy optimization, enabling stable alignment directly in the latent reasoning space. Experiments on multiple benchmarks show that FLR consistently outperforms strong baselines while improving robustness and interpretability.

AI.tldr: 提出分解式潜在推理(FLR)框架，将用户偏好的潜在推理分解为多个解耦因子，通过多因子注意力模块、多样性正则化和强化学习对齐，提升LLM推荐系统在多方面的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM推荐方法通常用单一潜在向量表示用户意图，难以捕捉用户偏好固有的多面性特征。
AI.method: 1) 轻量级多因子注意力模块，迭代精炼潜在思维表示，每个因子关注交互历史的不同方面；2) 正交性、注意力多样性和稀疏性正则化目标；3) 动态聚合因子贡献进行最终预测；4) 结合基于组相对策略优化的强化学习策略进行稳定对齐。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，FLR一致优于强基线方法，同时提升了鲁棒性和可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 将潜在推理分解为多个解耦因子是提升LLM推荐系统性能、鲁棒性和可解释性的有效途径。

title: Privacy-Preserving Clothing Classification using Vision Transformer for Thermal Comfort Estimation
comment: To be appeared in 2026 IEEE International Conference on Consumer Electronics - Taiwan (ICCE-TW 2026)
summary: A privacy-preserving clothing classification scheme is presented to enable secure occupant-centric control (OCC) systems. Although the utilization of camera images for HVAC control has been widely studied to optimize thermal comfort, privacy protection of occupant images has not been considered in prior works. While various privacy-preserving methods have been proposed for image classification, applying conventional schemes results in severe accuracy degradation. In this paper, we introduce a privacy-preserving classification method using Vision Transformer (ViT) applied to clothing insulation estimation. In an experiment using the DeepFashion dataset categorized by clothing insulation, while the conventional pixel-based method suffers a severe accuracy drop, our scheme maintains a high accuracy on encrypted images, showing no degradation from plain images across all categories.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于Vision Transformer的隐私保护服装分类方案，用于建筑暖通空调控制，在加密图像上保持高精度而不降级。
AI.motivation: 现有研究利用摄像头图像优化热舒适控制，但未考虑隐私保护；而传统隐私保护方法应用于图像分类时会导致严重精度下降。
AI.method: 采用Vision Transformer（ViT）处理加密图像，实现隐私保护的服装隔热等级分类。
AI.result: 在DeepFashion数据集上，传统像素级方法精度严重下降，而ViT方案在加密图像上保持高精度，与明文图像无差异。
AI.conclusion: ViT能有效实现隐私保护的服装分类，在不牺牲分类精度的前提下保障 occupant 图像隐私安全。

title: PPG-Based Affect Recognition with Long-Range Deep Models: A Measurement-Driven Comparison of CNN, Transformer, and Mamba Architectures
summary: Photoplethysmography (PPG) is increasingly used in wearable affective computing due to its low cost and ease of integration into consumer devices. Recent advances in deep learning have introduced long-range sequence models, such as Transformers, and state-space models, like Mamba, which have demonstrated strong performance on natural language and general time-series tasks. However, it remains unclear whether these architectures offer tangible benefits over widely used Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) and Long Short-Term Memory (LSTMs) for PPG-based affect recognition, given that datasets are typically small and noisy. This work presents a measurement-driven comparison of four deep learning architectures, CNN, CNN-LSTM hybrid, Transformers, and Mamba, for classifying arousal, valence, and relaxation states from wrist-based PPG signals. All models are evaluated under a subject-independent 5-fold cross-validation protocol using identical preprocessing, segmentation, and training pipelines. Our results show that the Transformer and Mamba models achieve performance comparable to that of a CNN baseline, but do not consistently outperform it across all tasks. CNNs remain the most effective overall, providing the highest accuracy with the smallest model size, whereas Transformers have a better balance of F1 scores for Arousal and Relaxation. The study provides the first evaluation of Transformer and Mamba models for PPG-based affect recognition, offering practical guidance on model selection for wearable affective monitoring systems.

AI.tldr: 本文系统比较了四种深度学习架构（CNN、CNN-LSTM混合、Transformer和Mamba）在基于PPG信号的情感识别任务上的表现，发现CNN在多数任务中表现最优，而Transformer和Mamba并未显著优于简单基线模型。
AI.motivation: 虽然Transformer和Mamba在自然语言和时间序列任务中表现优异，但PPG情感识别数据集通常小而嘈杂，这些先进架构是否比传统CNN和LSTM更有优势尚不明确。
AI.method: 在相同预处理、分割和训练流程下，采用受试者独立的五折交叉验证，比较CNN、CNN-LSTM混合、Transformer和Mamba四种架构对腕部PPG信号的 arousal（唤醒度）、valence（效价）和relaxation（放松状态）分类效果。
AI.result: Transformer和Mamba性能与CNN基线相当，但未能持续超越；CNN在准确率和模型大小上综合最优，Transformer在Arousal和Relaxation的F1分数上略有优势。
AI.conclusion: 这是首次将Transformer和Mamba用于PPG情感识别评估，为可穿戴情感监控系统的模型选择提供了实用指导。

title: Associative-State Universal Transformers: Sparse Retrieval Meets Structured Recurrence
summary:
We study whether a structured recurrent state can serve as a compact associative backbone for language modeling while still supporting exact retrieval. We introduce UniMatrix, a Universal Transformer style family that reuses a shared recurrent block across depth and augments it with hybrid state updates, a ROSA-style residual path, and token-conditioned embedding modulation. We evaluate these models on byte-level WikiText-2, synthetic associative recall, throughput profiling on Apple MPS, and a corrected benchmark for triple-token interactions.
  At small scale, UniMatrix-Core and UniMatrix-ROSA slightly outperform a parameter-matched Transformer on WikiText-2 while using many fewer parameters, reaching 5.084 and 5.083 bits-per-byte versus 5.124. The main negative result is equally important: on associative recall, the original UniMatrix family remains near chance while the Transformer reaches 25.4 percent, showing that compressed recurrent state alone is not enough for exact lookup. A retrieval-oriented follow-up, UniMatrix-Assoc, helps only marginally. By contrast, UniMatrix-SparsePointer, which adds sparse slot routing and direct pointer-logit fusion, reaches 75.6 percent on the original pilot recipe and 99.2 percent on a no-dropout follow-up while using 53.8 percent fewer parameters than the Transformer baseline. Ablations show that the gain comes from sufficient slot capacity and exact pointer-level output routing. Overall, structured recurrent state is promising and parameter-efficient, but strong long-range behavior still requires explicit sparse retrieval and better kernels.

AI.tldr: 本文提出UniMatrix系列模型，探索结构化循环状态作为语言模型紧凑关联记忆的可行性。研究发现，纯循环状态在精确检索任务上表现不佳（仅接近随机水平），而通过稀疏槽路由和指针逻辑融合的UniMatrix-SparsePointer在关联记忆任务上达到99.2%的准确率，同时参数减少53.8%。结果表明结构化循环状态具有参数效率优势，但强长程行为仍需要显式稀疏检索和更好的内核支持。
AI.motivation: 研究结构化循环状态能否作为语言模型的紧凑关联记忆主干，同时支持精确检索。当前Transformer虽然检索能力强但计算成本高，而循环状态模型参数效率高但精确检索能力未知。
AI.method: 提出UniMatrix系列，采用Universal Transformer风格的共享循环块跨深度复用，结合混合状态更新、ROSA风格残差路径和token条件嵌入调制。特别引入UniMatrix-SparsePointer，通过稀疏槽路由和直接指针逻辑融合实现精确检索。
AI.result: 小规模UniMatrix-Core和UniMatrix-ROSA在WikiText-2上以更少参数略优于Transformer（5.084/5.083 vs 5.124 bits-per-byte）。但原始UniMatrix在关联记忆任务上仅接近随机水平（Transformer达25.4%）。UniMatrix-SparsePointer达到75.6%（原方案）和99.2%（改进方案）的准确率，参数减少53.8%。
AI.conclusion: 结构化循环状态在参数效率方面有前景，但强长程行为仍需要显式稀疏检索和更好的内核支持。纯压缩循环状态不足以实现精确查找，必须结合显式检索机制。

title: Recommendations for Efficient and Responsible LLM Adoption within Industrial Software Development
comment: Accepted for publication in the Information and Software Technology Journal
summary: Context: Large language models (LLMs) are observed to have a significant positive impact on various software engineering (SE) activities. With improved accessibility, the adoption of powerful LLMs in industry has surged recently. However, there is a lack of actionable best practices for the efficient and responsible adoption of LLMs within industrial software settings. Objectives: We developed seven actionable recommendations to address this research gap. Methods: We conducted a multi-case study with three organisations that use LLMs within their SE activities and synthesised seven recommendations through qualitative thematic analysis. We conducted a complementary online survey with software practitioners from various industries to evaluate the perceived relevance of our recommendations. Results: Our results and recommendations focus on (i) users' preference to use LLMs as AI assistants, (ii) the importance of relevant stakeholders' satisfaction in the LLM-output evaluation, (iii) scoping the applicability of LLMs within SE tasks, (iv) the effect of LLMs on SE workflows, (v) the necessity and directions for developing human oversight mechanisms, and (vi) the necessary skills for practitioners for leveraging LLMs within SE. The online survey indicates a high level of agreement from the participants regarding the perceived relevance of the recommendations. Conclusion: We outline future research directions, including mapping the seven recommendations to the principles of the EU AI Act (AIA) in order to examine how they relate to the current regulatory compliance frameworks.

AI.tldr: 通过对三家组织的多案例研究和行业调查，提出了七项关于在工业软件工程中高效、负责任采用大型语言模型（LLM）的可操作建议。
AI.motivation: LLM在软件工程中应用广泛且效果显著，但缺乏在工业环境中高效、负责任采用LLM的可行最佳实践指导。
AI.method: 在三个组织中进行多案例研究，通过定性主题分析综合出七项建议，并通过面向不同行业从业者的在线调查评估建议的相关性。
AI.result: 提出了七项建议，涵盖：LLM作为AI助手的用户偏好、利益相关者满意度评估、SE任务中LLM的适用性范围、LLM对SE工作流的影响、人工监督机制的需求与方向、以及从业者必备技能。调查结果表明参与者对建议相关性高度认可。
AI.conclusion: 明确了未来研究方向，包括将七项建议映射到欧盟AI法案（AIA）原则，以检验其与当前监管合规框架的关系。

title: Benchmarking the Safety of Large Language Models for Robotic Health Attendant Control
comment: 20 pages, 9 figures, 3 tables, 8 pages supplementary material
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly considered for deployment as the control component of robotic health attendants, yet their safety in this context remains poorly characterized. We introduce a dataset of 270 harmful instructions spanning nine prohibited behavior categories grounded in the American Medical Association Principles of Medical Ethics, and use it to evaluate 72 LLMs in a simulation environment based on the Robotic Health Attendant framework. The mean violation rate across all models was 54.4\%, with more than half exceeding 50\%, and violation rates varied substantially across behavior categories, with superficially plausible instructions such as device manipulation and emergency delay proving harder to refuse than overtly destructive ones. Model size and release date were the primary determinants of safety performance among open-weight models, and proprietary models were substantially safer than open-weight counterparts (median 23.7\% versus 72.8\%). Medical domain fine-tuning conferred no significant overall safety benefit, and a prompt-based defense strategy produced only a modest reduction in violation rates among the least safe models, leaving absolute violation rates at levels that would preclude safe clinical deployment. These findings demonstrate that safety evaluation must be treated as a first-class criterion in the development and deployment of LLMs for robotic health attendants.

AI.tldr: 该研究构建了包含270条有害指令的数据集，评估了72个LLM在机器人健康护理场景中的安全性。结果显示平均违规率达54.4%，开放权重模型安全性能远逊于专有模型（中位数72.8% vs 23.7%），且医学领域微调和提示防御策略均未能有效降低违规率至安全部署水平。
AI.motivation: LLM越来越多地被部署为机器人健康护理员的控制组件，但其安全性尚未得到充分表征，需要系统性地评估LLM在此类高风险场景中的安全表现。
AI.method: 基于美国医学协会医学伦理原则定义了9类禁止行为类别，构建270条有害指令数据集；在机器人健康护理模拟环境中评估72个LLM；分析模型规模、发布日期、开放/专有属性、医学微调及提示防御策略对安全性能的影响。
AI.result: 平均违规率54.4%，超半数模型违规率超50%；设备操控和紧急延迟等表面合理指令更难拒绝；开放权重模型违规率中位数72.8%远高于专有的23.7%；医学微调无显著安全提升；提示防御仅对最不安全模型产生小幅改善。
AI.conclusion: 安全性评估必须作为开发部署LLM机器人健康护理员的一等标准，当前模型的安全水平远未达到临床部署要求。

title: Momentum-Conserving Graph Neural Networks for Deformable Objects
summary: Graph neural networks (GNNs) have emerged as a versatile and efficient option for modeling the dynamic behavior of deformable materials. While GNNs generalize readily to arbitrary shapes, mesh topologies, and material parameters, existing architectures struggle to correctly predict the temporal evolution of key physical quantities such as linear and angular momentum. In this work, we propose MomentumGNN -- a novel architecture designed to accurately track momentum by construction. Unlike existing GNNs that output unconstrained nodal accelerations, our model predicts per-edge stretching and bending impulses which guarantee the preservation of linear and angular momentum. We train our network in an unsupervised fashion using a physics-based loss, and we show that our method outperforms baselines in a number of common scenarios where momentum plays a pivotal role.

AI.tldr: 提出MomentumGNN架构，通过预测边级冲量而非节点加速度，在GNN中天然保证线动量和角动量守恒，无监督训练并在多项物理任务中超越基线。
AI.motivation: 现有GNN在模拟可变形材料动态行为时，无法正确预测线动量和角动量等关键物理量的时间演化。
AI.method: 提出MomentumGNN，预测每条边的拉伸和弯曲冲量，而非无约束的节点加速度，从而在结构上保证线动量和角动量守恒；采用基于物理的无监督损失函数训练。
AI.result: 在多个动量起关键作用的常见场景中，该方法优于现有基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 通过构造性的动量守恒设计，MomentumGNN能更准确模拟可变形材料的物理动态，是一种有效且可推广的GNN改进方向。

title: Anchored Confabulation: Partial Evidence Non-Monotonically Amplifies Confident Hallucination in LLMs
summary: We identify a previously unknown calibration property of large language models: providing one confirmed intermediate fact toward a multi-step reasoning chain increases the model's confident-wrong-answer rate before full evidence eliminates it. We call this anchored confabulation: a partial anchor commits the model to confident parametric completion of remaining reasoning steps. We formalize it as Parametric Hallucination Confidence (PHC) and establish it across six lines of evidence including a causal injection experiment (PHC 0.613 to 0.656 to 0.595 to 0.536, N=160) and capability scaling across five model families (Spearman rho=0.900, p=0.037). The Anchoring Threshold Law k*(n)=floor(n/3) predicts PHC amplification by hop depth with four confirmed predictions. Applied to RAG routing, a LearnedRouter exploiting PHC closes 81.1% of the oracle performance gap (macro F1=0.426, p<1e-6) on 1,800 queries across four benchmarks with no model fine-tuning and 50x fewer labels than prior RL-based work. An epistemic humility prompt reduces the PHC spike by -0.118; explicit self-rating (PHC=0.684, p<0.001) outperforms lexical confidence as a routing signal.

AI.tldr: 本文发现大语言模型在多步推理中存在“锚定虚构”现象：提供一个已确认的中间事实会增加模型自信错误答案的概率。作者将其形式化为参数幻觉置信度(PHC)，通过六条证据线验证，并提出锚定阈值定律k*(n)=floor(n/3)。基于PHC的路由系统无需微调即可缩小81.1%的oracle性能差距。
AI.motivation: 识别大语言模型中一种先前未知的校准属性：在提供部分正确中间事实的情况下，模型反而会以更高自信度输出错误答案，揭示了推理链中局部正确信息对整体可靠性的负面影响。
AI.method: 形式化定义参数幻觉置信度(PHC)，通过六条证据线验证：(1)因果注入实验；(2)跨5个模型家族的能力缩放分析；(3)提出锚定阈值定律k*(n)=floor(n/3)预测PHC随推理深度放大；(4)RAG路由应用：利用PHC的LearnedRouter无需微调；(5)认知谦逊提示降低PHC峰值；(6)显式自我评分作为路由信号。
AI.result: 因果注入实验PHC从0.613→0.656→0.595→0.536(N=160)；跨模型家族Spearman rho=0.900(p=0.037)；LearnedRouter在1800个查询上宏F1=0.426(p<1e-6)，缩小81.1%的oracle差距，比RL方法少50倍标签量；认知谦逊提示降低PHC峰值-0.118；显式自我评分PHC=0.684(p<0.001)优于词汇置信度。
AI.conclusion: 锚定虚构是一种系统性现象，部分中间事实反而加剧模型错觉；PHC可作为有效的路由信号减少检索增强生成中的错误；锚定阈值定律揭示了PHC与推理深度的定量关系，为设计更可靠的LLM推理系统提供了理论基础。

title: TDD Governance for Multi-Agent Code Generation via Prompt Engineering
comment: 5 pages. Submitted to the 1st International Workshop on Empirical Prompt Engineering for Software Engineering (PROMPT-SE 2026)
summary: Large language models (LLMs) accelerate software development but often exhibit instability, non-determinism, and weak adherence to development discipline in unconstrained workflows. While test-driven development (TDD) provides a structured Red-Green-Refactor process, existing LLM-based approaches typically use tests as auxiliary inputs rather than enforceable process constraints. We present an AI-native TDD framework that operationalizes classical TDD principles as structured prompt-level and workflow-level governance mechanisms. Extracted principles are formalized in a machine-readable manifesto and distributed across planning, generation, repair, and validation stages within a layered architecture that separates model proposal from deterministic engine authority. The system enforces phase ordering, bounded repair loops, validation gates, and atomic mutation control to improve stability and reproducibility. We describe architecture and discuss encoding software engineering discipline directly into prompt orchestration, which we think offers a promising direction for reliable LLM-assisted development.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种AI原生TDD框架，将经典TDD原则编码为提示级别和工作流级别的治理机制，通过分层架构（规划、生成、修复、验证）和确定性引擎控制，解决LLM在软件开发中的不稳定性、非确定性和纪律性缺失问题。
AI.motivation: LLM加速了软件开发，但在无约束工作流中常表现出不稳定、非确定性和对开发纪律的弱遵守。现有基于LLM的方法通常将测试作为辅助输入而非可强制执行的流程约束，缺乏系统性治理。
AI.method: 将TDD原则提取并形式化为机器可读的"宣言"，跨规划、生成、修复、验证四个阶段分发；采用分层架构，将模型提议与确定性引擎权威分离；实施阶段排序、有界修复循环、验证门控和原子变异控制等机制。
AI.result: 通过架构设计，系统改善了稳定性（减少非确定性输出）和可重复性，通过强制阶段排序、修复循环上限、验证关卡等机制将软件工程纪律直接编码到提示编排中。
AI.conclusion: 将软件工程纪律直接编码到提示编排中，为可靠的LLM辅助开发提供了一个有前景的方向。

title: Human-in-the-Loop Benchmarking of Heterogeneous LLMs for Automated Competency Assessment in Secondary Level Mathematics
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures, 5 tables. Submitted to 2AI-2026-Applied AI Conference
summary:
As Competency-Based Education (CBE) is gaining traction around the world, the shift from marks-based assessment to qualitative competency mapping is a manual challenge for educators. This paper tackles the bottleneck issue by suggesting a "Human-in-the-Loop" benchmarking framework to assess the effectiveness of multiple LLMs in automating secondary-level mathematics assessment. Based on the Grade 10 Optional Mathematics curriculum in Nepal, we created a multi-dimensional rubric for four topics and four cross-cutting competencies: Comprehension, Knowledge, Operational Fluency, and Behavior and Correlation.
  The multi-provider ensemble, consisted of open-weight models -- Eagle (Llama 3.1-8B) and Orion (Llama 3.3-70B) -- and proprietary frontier models Nova (Gemini 2.5 Flash) and Lyra (Gemini 3 Pro), was benchmarked against a ground truth defined by two senior mathematics faculty members (kappa_w = 0.8652). The findings show a marked "Architecture-compatibility gap". Although the Gemini-based Mixture-of-Experts (Sparse MoE) models achieved "Fair Agreement" (kappa_w ~ 0.38), the larger Orion (70B) model exhibited "No Agreement" (kappa_w = -0.0261), suggesting that architectural compliance with instruction constraints outweighs the scale of raw parameters in rubric-constrained tasks. We conclude that while LLMs are not yet suitable for autonomous certification, they provide high-value assistive support for preliminary evidence extraction within a "Human-in-the-Loop" framework.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种"人在回路"基准框架，评估多种LLM在尼泊尔10年级数学能力本位评估中的有效性。结果表明，模型架构与指令约束的兼容性（MoE架构表现更优）比参数规模更重要，LLM目前适合辅助证据提取，但不适合自主认证。
AI.motivation: 能力本位教育（CBE）在全球兴起，但从分数制评估转向定性能力映射对教育者而言是手动瓶颈，亟需自动化辅助方法。
AI.method: 构建多维度评分标准（涵盖4个主题和4项跨领域能力），采用多提供者集成（包括开源模型Eagle 8B、Orion 70B和闭源模型Nova、Lyra），以两位资深教师的评分作为基准（kappa_w=0.8652），通过加权Kappa系数评估模型一致性。
AI.result: 基于Gemini的稀疏MoE模型达到"公平一致性"（kappa_w~0.38），而更大的Orion（70B）模型仅为"无一致性"（kappa_w=-0.0261），存在显著的"架构兼容性差距"。
AI.conclusion: LLM尚不适合自主认证，但在"人在回路"框架中可为初步证据提取提供高价值辅助支持；在基于评分标准的约束任务中，架构对指令约束的遵守程度比参数规模更重要。

title: ViBE: Visual-to-M/EEG Brain Encoding via Spatio-Temporal VAE and Distribution-Aligned Projection
summary: Brain encoding models not only serve to decipher how visual stimuli are transformed into neural responses, but also represent a critical step toward visual prostheses that restore vision for patients with severe vision disorders. Brain encoding involves two fundamental steps: achieving faithful reconstruction of neural responses and establishing cross-modal alignment between visual stimuli and neural responses. To this end, we propose ViBE, a novel brain encoding framework for generating magnetoencephalography (MEG) and electroencephalography (EEG) signals from visual stimuli. Specifically, we first design a spatio-temporal convolutional variational autoencoder (TSC-VAE) that captures the spatio-temporal characteristics of M/EEG signals for effective neural response reconstruction. To bridge the modality gap between visual features and neural representations, we employ Q-Former to map CLIP image embeddings to the TSC-VAE latent space, producing neural proxy embeddings.
