This common practice implicitly assumes that geometric information is uniformly distributed across layers, which may underutilize the structural 3D cues encoded in VFMs. In this study, we present a systematic layer-wise analysis of DINOv3, revealing that 3D information is distributed non-uniformly: deeper layers exhibit stronger depth predictability and better capture inter-sample geometric variation. Motivated by this, we introduce a Last-Layer-Centric Feature Recombination (LFR) module to enhance geometric expressiveness. LFR treats the final layer as a geometric anchor and adaptively selects complementary intermediate layers according to a minimal-similarity criterion. Selected features are fused with the last-layer representation via compact linear adapters.Extensive experiments show that LFR module consistently improves MDE accuracy and achieves state-of-the-art performance. Our analysis sheds light on how geometric knowledge is organized within VFMs and offers an efficient strategy for unlocking their potential in dense 3D tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文发现DINOv3中3D信息在层间非均匀分布，深层更具深度可预测性，据此提出基于最后一层的特征重组模块（LFR），选择互补中间层特征融合，在单目深度估计任务上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 以往方法默认假设几何信息在Transformer各层均匀分布，均匀采样中间层构建多尺度特征，未能充分利用VFM中编码的结构3D信息。
AI.method: 对DINOv3进行逐层分析，发现深层更好编码几何信息；提出Last-Layer-Centric Feature Recombination (LFR)模块，以最后一层为几何锚点，基于最小相似性准则自适应选择互补的中间层特征，通过紧凑线性适配器与最后一层表示融合。
AI.result: LFR模块在多个MDE基准上持续提升精度，达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了VFM中几何知识的不均匀组织方式，提供了一种高效策略释放其在密集3D任务中的潜力。

title: Semi-supervised learning with max-margin graph cuts
comment: Published at AISTATS 2010 (13th International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Statistics)
summary: This paper proposes a novel algorithm for semisupervised learning. This algorithm learns graph cuts that maximize the margin with respect to the labels induced by the harmonic function solution. We motivate the approach, compare it to existing work, and prove a bound on its generalization error. The quality of our solutions is evaluated on a synthetic problem and three UCI ML repository datasets. In most cases, we outperform manifold regularization of support vector machines, which is a state-of-the-art approach to semi-supervised max-margin learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图割的半监督学习算法，通过最大化谐波函数标签的边际来提升性能，并在多个数据集上优于主流方法。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督最大边际学习方法（如流形正则化SVM）性能有限，作者希望提出一种能更有效利用未标签数据的算法。
AI.method: 提出一种最大化谐波函数诱导标签的边际的图割算法，结合半监督学习框架，并推导了泛化误差界。
AI.result: 在合成数据集和三个UCI数据集上，多数情况下优于流形正则化SVM这一主流半监督最大边际学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提算法在半监督学习中有效，具有理论保障和实际优越性。

title: OCR-Memory: Optical Context Retrieval for Long-Horizon Agent Memory
summary: Autonomous LLM agents increasingly operate in long-horizon, interactive settings where success depends on reusing experience accumulated over extended histories. However, existing agent memory systems are fundamentally constrained by text-context budgets: storing or revisiting raw trajectories is prohibitively token-expensive, while summarization and text-only retrieval trade token savings for information loss and fragmented evidence. To address this limitation, we propose Optical Context Retrieval Memory (OCR-Memory), a memory framework that leverages the visual modality as a high-density representation of agent experience, enabling retention of arbitrarily long histories with minimal prompt overhead at retrieval time. Specifically, OCR-Memory renders historical trajectories into images annotated with unique visual identifiers. OCR-Memory retrieves stored experience via a \emph{locate-and-transcribe} paradigm that selects relevant regions through visual anchors and retrieves the corresponding verbatim text, avoiding free-form generation and reducing hallucination. Experiments on long-horizon agent benchmarks show consistent gains under strict context limits, demonstrating that optical encoding increases effective memory capacity while preserving faithful evidence recovery.

AI.tldr: 提出光学上下文检索记忆（OCR-Memory），将智能体历史轨迹渲染为带视觉标识的图片，通过“定位-转录”范式检索，以视觉模态高密度存储长历史，减少token消耗与幻觉，在长周期任务中提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体记忆系统受限于文本上下文预算，直接存储轨迹token成本过高，总结和纯文本检索会导致信息丢失与证据碎片化。
AI.method: 将历史轨迹渲染为带唯一视觉标识的图片，检索时通过视觉锚点定位相关区域，再转录对应的原始文本，避免自由生成。
AI.result: 在长周期智能体基准测试中，在严格上下文限制下取得一致性能提升，证明光学编码增加有效记忆容量并保持忠实证据恢复。
AI.conclusion: OCR-Memory通过视觉模态高密度表示，突破了文本上下文预算的限制，实现了任意长历史的低开销保留与高保真检索。

title: $\text{PKS}^4$:Parallel Kinematic Selective State Space Scanners for Efficient Video Understanding
summary:
Temporal modeling remains a fundamental challenge in video understanding, particularly as sequence lengths scale. Traditional video models relying on dense spatiotemporal attention suffer from quadratic computational costs for long videos. To circumvent these costs, recent approaches adapt image models for videos via Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) methods such as adapters. However, deeply inserting these modules incurs prohibitive activation memory overhead during back-propagation. While recent efficient State Space Models (SSMs) introduce linear complexity, they disrupt 2D spatial relationships and rely on extensive masked pre-training to recover spatial awareness.
  To overcome these limitations, we propose Parallel Kinematic Selective State Space Scanners (PKS$^4$). We retain a standard 2D vision backbone for spatial semantics and insert a single plug-and-play PKS$^4$ module with linear-complexity temporal scanning, avoiding temporal attention and multi-layer adapters. We first extract kinematic priors via a Kinematic Prior Encoder, which captures local displacements and motion boundaries through inter-frame correlations and differences. These priors drive linear-complexity SSMs to track underlying kinematic states, adaptively modulating update speeds and read-write strategies at each time step.
  Instead of global scanning, we deploy parallel scanners along the temporal dimension for each spatial location, preserving spatial structures while reducing overhead. Experiments on spatial-heavy and temporal-heavy action recognition benchmarks show that PKS$^4$ achieves state-of-the-art performance. Remarkably, our method converges in merely $20$ epochs, achieving approximately $10\times$ lower training compute than pure video SSMs, establishing a new paradigm for efficient video understanding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PKS⁴，一种结合2D视觉骨干网络与线性复杂度状态空间模型的视频理解方法。通过运动先验编码器提取帧间运动信息，驱动并行SSM扫描器沿时间维度建模，在避免密集时空注意力与多层适配器的情况下，以20轮训练实现SOTA性能，计算量仅为纯视频SSM的1/10。
AI.motivation: 现有视频理解方法面临两大困境：传统时空注意力计算量随序列长度二次增长；而PEFT方法（如适配器）虽降低计算成本，但深层插入导致反向传播激活内存开销巨大。近期SSM虽具有线性复杂度，但会破坏2D空间关系且依赖大规模掩码预训练。因此，需要一个既能保留空间结构、又具备线性时间复杂度的高效视频建模方案。
AI.method: PKS⁴包含两个核心组件：1) 运动先验编码器，通过帧间相关性和差分提取局部位移与运动边界，作为SSM的运动先验；2) 并行运动选择性SSM扫描器，沿时间维度为每个空间位置部署独立扫描器，利用运动先验自适应调节状态更新的读取-写入策略，实现线性复杂度的时序建模。整体以即插即用模块形式插入标准2D视觉骨干网络。
AI.result: 在空间密集型与时间密集型动作识别基准上均取得SOTA性能。仅需20轮训练即可收敛，训练计算量约为纯视频SSM方法的1/10。
AI.conclusion: PKS⁴通过将2D骨干网络的空间建模能力与SSM的线性时序建模能力解耦结合，以运动先验引导状态更新，在保持高效的同时避免了空间结构破坏，为高效视频理解建立了新范式。

title: Random Cloud: Finding Minimal Neural Architectures Without Training
summary: I propose the \emph{Random Cloud} method, a training-free approach to neural architecture search that discovers minimal feedforward network topologies through stochastic exploration and progressive structural reduction. Unlike post-training pruning methods that require a full train-prune-retrain cycle, this method evaluates randomly initialized networks without backpropagation, progressively reduces their topology, and only trains the best minimal candidate at the end. I evaluate on 7 classification benchmarks against magnitude pruning and random pruning baselines. The Random Cloud matches or outperforms both baselines in 6 of 7 datasets, achieving statistically significant improvements on Sonar ($+4.9$pp accuracy, $p{=}0.017$ vs magnitude pruning) with 87\% parameter reduction. Crucially, the method is faster than both pruning baselines in 4 of 5 datasets (0.67--0.94$\times$ the cost of full training), since it avoids training the full-size network entirely.

AI.tldr: 提出Random Cloud方法，一种无需训练的神经架构搜索方法，通过随机探索和渐进式结构缩减发现最小前馈网络拓扑，在7个分类基准测试中6个匹配或优于剪枝基线，参数量减少87%，速度更快。
AI.motivation: 现有剪枝方法需要完整的训练-剪枝-再训练循环，成本高昂。作者希望提出一种无需反向传播训练即可发现最小网络拓扑的方法。
AI.method: 随机初始化网络，不进行反向传播训练，通过随机探索和渐进式结构缩减逐步减少网络拓扑，最后只训练最优的最小候选网络。
AI.result: 在7个分类基准中6个匹配或优于幅度剪枝和随机剪枝基线；Sonar数据集上准确率提升4.9个百分点（p=0.017），参数量减少87%；在5个数据集中的4个上速度更快（全训练成本的0.67-0.94倍）。
AI.conclusion: Random Cloud方法作为一种无需训练的神经架构搜索方法，在多数任务上能匹配或超越传统剪枝方法，同时更高效，避免了训练全尺寸网络的开销。

title: SAGE: A Strategy-Aware Graph-Enhanced Generation Framework For Online Counseling
comment: Full version of the work accepted as a short paper at the 34th ACM Conference on User Modeling, Adaptation and Personalization (UMAP '26). 9 pages, 4 figures, 5 tables
summary: Effective mental health counseling is a complex, theory-driven process requiring the simultaneous integration of psychological frameworks, real-time distress signals, and strategic intervention planning. This level of clinical reasoning is critical for safety and therapeutic effectiveness but is often missing in general-purpose Large Language Models (LLMs). We introduce SAGE (Strategy-Aware Graph-Enhanced), a novel framework designed to bridge the gap between structured clinical knowledge and generative AI. SAGE constructs a heterogeneous graph that unifies conversational dynamics with a psychologically grounded layer, explicitly anchoring interactions in a theory-driven lexicon. Our architecture first employs a Next Strategy Classifier to identify the optimal therapeutic intervention. Subsequently, a Graph-Aware Attention mechanism projects graph-derived structural signals into soft prompts, conditioning the LLM to generate responses that maintain clinical depth. Validated through both automated metrics and expert human evaluation, SAGE outperforms baselines in strategy prediction and recommended response quality. By providing actionable intervention recommendations, SAGE serves as a cutting-edge decision-support tool designed to augment human expertise in high-stakes crisis counseling.

AI.tldr: SAGE是一个融合结构化临床知识与生成式AI的框架，通过构建异构图（整合对话动态与心理学理论）和Next Strategy Classifier + Graph-Aware Attention机制，在危机咨询中显著提升了策略预测和响应质量。
AI.motivation: 通用大语言模型缺乏临床推理能力，无法有效整合心理框架、实时痛苦信号和干预策略规划，这在心理健康咨询这一高安全要求场景中存在严重不足。
AI.method: 构建异构图统一对话动态与心理学理论；使用Next Strategy Classifier预测最佳干预策略；通过Graph-Aware Attention机制将图结构信号投影为软提示，引导LLM生成临床深度回复。
AI.result: 在自动评估和人类专家评估中，SAGE在策略预测和推荐回复质量上均优于基线模型。
AI.conclusion: SAGE可作为高危机咨询中的决策支持工具，通过可操作的干预建议增强人类专家的能力。

title: A Multistage Extraction Pipeline for Long Scanned Financial Documents: An Empirical Study in Industrial KYC Workflows
summary: Structured information extraction from long, multilingual scanned financial documents is a core requirement in industrial KYC and compliance workflows. These documents are typically non machine readable, noisy, and visually heterogeneous. They usually span dozens of pages while containing only sparse task relevant information. Although recent vision-language models achieve strong benchmark performance, directly applying them end to end to full financial reports often leads to unreliable extraction under real world conditions. We present a multistage extraction framework that integrates image preprocessing, multilingual OCR, hybrid page-level retrieval, and compact VLM-based structured extraction. The design separates page localization from multimodal reasoning, enabling more accurate extraction from complex multipage documents. We evaluated the framework on 120 production KYC documents comprising about 3000 multilingual scanned pages. Across multiple OCR-VLM combinations, the proposed pipeline consistently outperforms direct PDF-to-VLM baselines, improving field-level accuracy by up to 31.9 percentage points. The best configuration, PaddleOCR with MiniCPM2.6, achieves 87.27 percent accuracy. Ablation studies show that page-level retrieval is the dominant factor in performance improvements, particularly for complex financial statements and non-English documents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于工业KYC场景的多阶段文档信息抽取框架，通过预处理、多语言OCR、混合页面级检索和紧凑VLM的结构化抽取，在约3000页多语言扫描文档上比直接端到端VLM方法提升最多31.9个百分点的字段级准确率，最佳配置（PaddleOCR+MiniCPM2.6）达到87.27%准确率。
AI.motivation: 工业KYC和合规流程中需要从长篇幅、多语言、扫描质量差的金融文档中提取结构化信息，而现有视觉语言模型直接应用于完整金融报告时，在真实场景下提取结果不可靠。
AI.method: 提出多阶段抽取框架：图像预处理 → 多语言OCR → 混合页面级检索（定位相关页面） → 紧凑VLM结构化抽取。将页面定位与多模态推理相分离。
AI.result: 在120份生产级KYC文档（约3000页多语言扫描页）上评估，多阶段管线一致优于直接PDF-to-VLM基线，字段级准确率提升最高达31.9个百分点。最佳配置（PaddleOCR+MiniCPM2.6）准确率87.27%。消融实验表明页面级检索是性能提升的主导因素。
AI.conclusion: 分离页面定位与多模态推理的多阶段框架能显著提升复杂多页文档的结构化信息抽取可靠性，页面级检索机制对复杂财务报表和非英语文档尤为关键。

title: Uncertainty-Aware Predictive Safety Filters for Probabilistic Neural Network Dynamics
summary: Predictive safety filters (PSFs) leverage model predictive control to enforce constraint satisfaction during deep reinforcement learning (RL) exploration, yet their reliance on first-principles models or Gaussian processes limits scalability and broader applicability. Meanwhile, model-based RL (MBRL) methods routinely employ probabilistic ensemble (PE) neural networks to capture complex, high-dimensional dynamics from data with minimal prior knowledge. However, existing attempts to integrate PEs into PSFs lack rigorous uncertainty quantification. We introduce the Uncertainty-Aware Predictive Safety Filter (UPSi), a PSF that provides rigorous safety predictions using PE dynamics models by formulating future outcomes as reachable sets. UPSi introduces an explicit certainty constraint that prevents model exploitation and integrates seamlessly into common MBRL frameworks. We evaluate UPSi within Dyna-style MBRL on standard safe RL benchmarks and report substantial improvements in exploration safety over prior neural network PSFs while maintaining performance on par with standard MBRL. UPSi bridges the gap between the scalability and generality of modern MBRL and the safety guarantees of predictive safety filters.

AI.tldr: UPSi是一种基于概率集成神经网络的可达集预测安全过滤器，通过显式确定性约束平衡MBRL的探索安全性与任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有预测安全过滤器依赖第一性原理模型或高斯过程，难以扩展到复杂高维系统；而模型强化学习中概率集成神经网络虽能捕获复杂动力学，但缺乏严谨的不确定性量化来保证安全。
AI.method: 提出UPSi框架：利用概率集成神经网络建模动力学，将未来状态预测形式化为可达集，并引入显式确定性约束防止模型过度利用，无缝集成到Dyna式MBRL中。
AI.result: 在标准安全RL基准测试中，相较于先前的神经网络PSF方法，UPSi显著提升了探索安全性，同时任务性能与标准MBRL持平。
AI.conclusion: UPSi弥合了现代MBRL的可扩展性与预测安全过滤器的安全保障之间的鸿沟。

title: Differentially-Private Text Rewriting reshapes Linguistic Style
summary: Differential Privacy (DP) for text matured from disjointed word-level substitutions to contiguous sentence-level rewriting by leveraging the generative capacity of language models. While this form of text privatization is best suited for balancing formal privacy guarantees with grammatical coherence, its impact on the register identity of text remains largely unexplored. By conducting a multidimensional stylistic profiling of differentially-private rewriting, we demonstrate that the cost of privacy extends far beyond lexical variation. Specifically, we find that rewriting under privacy constraints induces a systematic functional mutation of the text's communicative signature. This shift is characterized by the severe attrition of interactive markers, contextual references, and complex subordination. By comparing autoregressive paraphrasing against bidirectional substitution across a spectrum of privacy budgets, we observe that both architectures force convergence toward a non-involved and non-persuasive register. This register-blind sanitization effectively preserves semantic content but structurally homogenizes the nuanced stylistic markers that define human-authored discourse.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了差分隐私文本重写对文本语域特征的影响，发现隐私保护机制会导致文本注册特征的系统性功能变异，表现为交互标记、语境参照和复杂从句的严重衰减，最终使文本趋于非参与性和非说服性的同质化语域。
AI.motivation: 现有差分隐私文本研究主要关注隐私保护与语法连贯性的平衡，但忽视了隐私重写对文本语域身份（register identity）的影响，即文本在交际功能上的风格特征变化。
AI.method: 通过多维度文体特征分析，在多种隐私预算下比较自回归释义（autoregressive paraphrasing）与双向替换（bidirectional substitution）两种差分隐私文本重写架构的效果。
AI.result: 隐私约束下的文本重写不仅导致词汇层面的变化，更引起文本交际签名的系统性功能变异：交互标记、语境参照和复杂从句结构严重减少；两种架构均迫使文本收敛于非参与性、非说服性的语域风格。
AI.conclusion: 差分隐私文本重写虽然保留了语义内容，但在结构上同质化了人类文本中细微的风格标记，导致语域盲（register-blind）的文本净化现象。

title: Cross-Domain Transfer of Hyperspectral Foundation Models
summary: Hyperspectral imaging (HSI) semantic segmentation typically relies on in-domain training, but limited data availability often restricts model performance in real-world applications. Current approaches to leverage foundation models in proximal sensing use cross-modality techniques, bridging RGB and HSI to exploit vision foundation models. However, these methods either discard spectral information or introduce architectural complexity. We propose cross-domain transfer as an alternative, reusing HSI foundation models - originally trained in remote sensing - for proximal sensing applications. By eliminating the need to bridge modality gaps, our approach preserves spectral information while maintaining a simple architecture. Using the HS3-Bench benchmark, we systematically evaluate and compare conventional in-domain, in-modality training, cross-modality transfer and cross-domain transfer strategies. Our results demonstrate that cross-domain transfer achieves large performance improvements over in-domain, in-modality training, reduces the performance gap to cross-modality approaches and maintains strong performance in limited data settings. Thus, this work advances more effective HSI semantic segmentation in diverse applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出跨域迁移策略，利用遥感领域预训练的高光谱基础模型直接应用于近感领域的高光谱语义分割，无需跨模态桥接，在HS3-Bench基准上优于传统域内训练，且接近跨模态方法性能。
AI.motivation: 高光谱语义分割受限于数据稀缺，现有跨模态方法（RGB到HSI）要么丢弃光谱信息，要么增加架构复杂度。本文探索更简洁的跨域迁移方案，直接复用遥感高光谱基础模型。
AI.method: 提出跨域迁移策略，直接使用遥感领域预训练的HSI基础模型进行近感应用；系统比较了三种策略：域内-模态内训练、跨模态迁移和跨域迁移；使用HS3-Bench基准进行评估。
AI.result: 跨域迁移相比域内-模态内训练取得大幅性能提升，缩小了与跨模态方法的差距，且在有限数据场景下保持强劲表现。
AI.conclusion: 跨域迁移是一种有效的替代方案，在保留光谱信息的同时保持架构简洁，为高光谱语义分割在多样化应用中的部署提供了新途径。

title: Unifying Sparse Attention with Hierarchical Memory for Scalable Long-Context LLM Serving
summary:
Long-context LLM serving is bottlenecked by the cost of attending over ever-growing KV caches. Dynamic sparse attention promises relief by accessing only a small, query-dependent subset of the KV state per decoding step and extending the KV storage to CPU memory. In practice, however, these algorithmic savings rarely translate into end-to-end system-level gains because sparse methods typically operate at different granularities and thus rely on ad hoc, per-algorithm implementations. At the same time, hierarchical KV storage introduces a new systems bottleneck: retrieving fine-grained, irregular KV subsets across the GPU-CPU boundary can easily erase the benefits of sparsity.
  We present SPIN, a sparse-attention-aware inference framework that co-designs the execution pipeline with hierarchical KV storage through three techniques: (1) a unified partition abstraction that maps different sparsity granularities onto a shared page-based KV substrate; (2) a locality-aware KV cache manager that dynamically sizes per-request HBM budgets and uses a GPU-friendly bucketed LRU policy to cut PCIe round-trips; and (3) a two-level hierarchical metadata layout sized to the active working set rather than the worst-case address space. Built on vLLM with three representative sparse attention algorithms, SPIN delivers 1.66-5.66x higher end-to-end throughput and 7-9x lower TTFT than vLLM, and reduces TPOT by up to 58% over the original sparse-attention implementations.

AI.tldr: SPIN是一个稀疏注意力感知的推理框架，通过统一分区抽象、 locality感知的KV缓存管理和两级层次化元数据布局，协同设计执行流水线与分层KV存储，在vLLM基础上实现1.66-5.66x端到端吞吐量提升和最高58%的TPOT降低。
AI.motivation: 长上下文LLM服务中，动态稀疏注意力虽理论上能减少KV缓存访问开销，但实际系统层面难以获益：稀疏方法粒度不统一导致各自为政的实现，且分层KV存储中跨GPU-CPU边界检索细粒度不规则KV子集会抵消稀疏性带来的收益。
AI.method: (1) 统一分区抽象：将不同稀疏粒度映射到共享的页式KV基板上；(2) locality感知的KV缓存管理器：动态调整每请求的HBM预算，采用GPU友好的桶式LRU策略减少PCIe往返；(3) 两级层次化元数据布局：大小适配活跃工作集而非最坏情况地址空间。
AI.result: 在vLLM基础上集成三种代表性稀疏注意力算法，SPIN实现1.66-5.66x端到端吞吐量提升，7-9x更低的TTFT，相比原始稀疏注意力实现TPOT降低高达58%。
AI.conclusion: SPIN通过系统级的协同设计，有效弥合了稀疏注意力算法潜力与端到端系统实际收益之间的鸿沟，验证了稀疏感知框架在长上下文LLM推理中的实用价值。

title: From Black-Box Confidence to Measurable Trust in Clinical AI: A Framework for Evidence, Supervision, and Staged Autonomy
summary: Trust in clinical artificial intelligence (AI) cannot be reduced to model accuracy, fluency of generation, or overall positive user impression. In medicine, trust must be engineered as a measurable system property grounded in evidence, supervision, and operational boundaries of AI autonomy. This article proposes a practical framework for trustworthy clinical AI built around three principles: evidence, supervision, and staged autonomy. Rather than replacing deterministic clinical logic wholesale with end-to-end black-box models, the proposed approach combines a deterministic core, a patient-specific AI assistant for contextual validation, a multi-tier model escalation mechanism, and a human supervision layer for verification, escalation, and risk control. We demonstrate that trust also depends on selective verification of clinically critical findings, bounded clinical context, disciplined prompt architecture, and careful evaluation on realistic cases. Classifier-driven modular prompting is examined as an incremental path to scaling clinical depth without sacrificing prompt performance and without waiting for complete rule-based coverage. To operationalize trust, a set of trust metrics is proposed, built on metrological principles -- measurement uncertainty, calibration, traceability -- enabling quantitative rather than subjective assessment of each architectural layer. In this perspective, trustworthy clinical AI emerges not as a property of an individual model, but as an architectural outcome of a system into which evidence trails, human oversight, tiered escalation, and graduated action rights are embedded from the outset.

AI.tldr: 本文提出可信临床AI应作为系统工程来设计，核心三原则是：证据、监督、分级自主权。架构包括确定性核心、患者特定AI助手、多级模型升级机制和人类监督层，并提出基于计量学原理的信任度量体系。
AI.motivation: 临床AI的信任不能仅靠模型准确率或流畅度，必须作为可度量的系统属性来设计，需要从架构层面嵌入证据追踪、人类监督和分级行动权限。
AI.method: 提出四个架构组件：确定性核心+患者特定AI助手+多级模型升级机制+人类监督层；采用分类器驱动的模块化提示；基于计量学原理（测量不确定度、校准、可追溯性）设计信任度量。
AI.result: 信任取决于对关键临床发现的选择性验证、有界临床上下文、严谨的提示架构和真实案例评估。模块化提示提供了在不牺牲性能的前提下扩展临床深度的渐进路径。
AI.conclusion: 可信临床AI不是单一模型的属性，而是从设计之初就嵌入证据轨迹、人类监督、分级升级和渐进式行动权限的系统架构结果。

title: Featurising Pixels from Dynamic 3D Scenes with Linear In-Context Learners
comment: To appear at CVPR 2026 (oral). Project website: https://lila-pixels.github.io
summary: One of the most exciting applications of vision models involve pixel-level reasoning. Despite the abundance of vision foundation models, we still lack representations that effectively embed spatio-temporal properties of visual scenes at the pixel level. Existing frameworks either train on image-based pretext tasks, which do not account for dynamic elements, or on video sequences for action-level reasoning, which does not scale to dense pixel-level prediction. We present a framework that learns pixel-accurate feature descriptors from videos, LILA. The core element of our training framework is linear in-context learning. LILA leverages spatio-temporal cue maps -- depth and motion -- estimated with off-the-shelf networks. Despite the noisy nature of those cues, LILA trains effectively on uncurated video datasets, embedding semantic and geometric properties in a temporally consistent manner. We demonstrate compelling empirical benefits of the learned representation across a diverse suite of vision tasks: video object segmentation, surface normal estimation and semantic segmentation.

AI.tldr: LILA是一个从视频中学习像素级特征描述符的框架，利用线性上下文学习和时空线索图（深度和运动），在未处理的视频数据集上训练，产生具有时间和几何一致性的表示，并在视频对象分割、表面法线估计和语义分割等任务上表现出色。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉基础模型要么基于图像的 pretext 任务训练（忽略动态元素），要么基于视频序列进行动作级推理（无法扩展到密集像素级预测），缺乏能够有效嵌入视觉场景时空属性的像素级表示。
AI.method: 提出LILA框架，核心是线性上下文学习（linear in-context learning），利用现成网络估计的时空线索图（深度和运动），在未整理的视频数据集上训练，将语义和几何属性以时间一致的方式嵌入表示中。
AI.result: 在视频对象分割、表面法线估计和语义分割等多种视觉任务上展示了学习到的表示的显著实证优势。
AI.conclusion: LILA通过结合时空线索和线性上下文学习，能够有效从视频中学习像素级特征，克服了现有方法在动态场景和密集预测方面的局限性。

title: Language Diffusion Models are Associative Memories Capable of Retrieving Unseen Data
comment: Also see arXiv:2505.21777 for a related work
summary: When do language diffusion models memorize their training data, and how to quantitatively assess their true generative regime? We address these questions by showing that Uniform-based Discrete Diffusion Models (UDDMs) fundamentally behave as Associative Memories (AMs) $\textit{with emergent creative capabilities}$. The core idea of an AM is to reliably recover stored data points as $\textit{memories}$ by establishing distinct basins of attraction around them. Historically, models like Hopfield networks use an explicit energy function to guarantee these stable attractors. We broaden this perspective by leveraging the observation that energy is not strictly necessary, as basins of attraction can also be formed via conditional likelihood maximization. By evaluating token recovery of $\textit{training}$ and $\textit{test}$ examples, we identify in UDDMs a sharp memorization-to-generalization transition governed by the size of the training dataset: as it increases, basins around training examples shrink and basins around unseen test examples expand, until both later converge to the same level. Crucially, we can detect this transition using only the conditional entropy of predicted token sequences: memorization is characterized by vanishing conditional entropy, while in the generalization regime the conditional entropy of most tokens remains finite. Thus, conditional entropy offers a practical probe for the memorization-to-generalization transition in deployed models.

AI.tldr: 本文发现基于Uniform的离散扩散模型(UDDMs)本质上充当具有新兴创造能力的联想记忆模型。通过训练集大小控制记忆到泛化的转变，并用条件熵作为检测这种转变的实用探针。
AI.motivation: 探究语言扩散模型何时记忆训练数据，以及如何定量评估其真实的生成机制。
AI.method: 1. 将UDDMs重新解释为联想记忆模型(AMs)，利用条件似然最大化形成吸引域。2. 通过评估训练和测试样本的token恢复能力，识别记忆到泛化的转变。3. 利用条件熵检测这一转变。
AI.result: 记忆到泛化的转变由训练数据集大小控制：数据集增大时，训练样本吸引域缩小，未见测试样本吸引域扩大，最终两者收敛到相同水平。条件熵在记忆区消失，在泛化区保持有限。
AI.conclusion: 条件熵可作为部署模型中记忆到泛化转变的实用探针。能量函数并非联想记忆的必要条件，条件似然最大化也能形成吸引域。

title: Swap distance minimization shapes the order of subject, object and verb in languages of the world
summary: Languages of the world vary concerning the order of subject, object and verb. The most frequent dominant orders are SOV and SVO, and researchers have tailored models to this fact. However, there are still languages whose dominant order does not conform to these expectations or even lack a dominant order. Here we show that across linguistic families and macroareas, word order variation within languages is shaped by the principle of swap distance minimization even when the dominant order is not SOV/SVO and even when a dominant order is lacking.

AI.tldr: 该研究揭示了跨语言和语系的词序变异受到交换距离最小化原则的塑造，即便语言的主要语序并非SOV/SVO，甚至缺乏明确的主要语序。
AI.motivation: 世界上语言的主语、宾语和动词的语序存在差异，最常见的优势语序是SOV和SVO，但仍有语言不符合这些预期或缺乏优势语序。研究者希望解释这些非典型语序语言中的词序变化规律。
AI.method: 作者通过跨语言家族和宏观区域的数据分析，检验了交换距离最小化原则在词序变异中的作用，特别关注了非SOV/SVO优势语序和缺乏优势语序的语言。
AI.result: 研究发现，即使语言的主要语序不是SOV/SVO，甚至没有明确的主要语序，词序变异仍然受到交换距离最小化原则的塑造。
AI.conclusion: 交换距离最小化是跨语言词序变异中的一个普遍原则，其作用范围超越了传统的SOV/SVO优势语序类型，适用于更广泛的语言类型。

title: Robust Alignment: Harmonizing Clean Accuracy and Adversarial Robustness in Adversarial Training
comment: 2026 IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition - Findings Track (CVPR'26 Findings)
summary: Adversarial Training (AT) is one of the most effective methods for developing robust deep neural networks (DNNs). However, AT faces a trade-off problem between clean accuracy and adversarial robustness. In this work, we reveal a surprising phenomenon for the first time: Varying input perturbation intensities for training samples near decision boundaries in AT have minimal impact on model robustness. This finding directly exposes the inconsistency between accuracy and robustness score fluctuations, leading us to identify the misalignment between input and latent spaces as a critical driver of the robustness-accuracy trade-off. To mitigate this misalignment for harmonizing accuracy and robustness, we define Robust Alignment as a new AT target, encouraging the model perception to change with input perturbations provided the final label prediction remains unchanged, which can be achieved via two novel ideas. First, we suggest a reduced and fixed perturbation intensity for those boundary samples, which facilitates the model to utilize the perturbations as learnable patterns, instead of noises that complicate decision boundaries meaninglessly. Second, we propose a Domain Interpolation Consistency Adversarial Regularization (DICAR), based on rigorous theoretical derivations, which explicitly introduces semantic alignment between input and latent spaces into AT. Based on these two ideas, we end up with a new Robust Alignment Adversarial Training (RAAT) method, effectively harmonizing accuracy and robustness. Extensive experiments on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and Tiny-ImageNet with ResNet-18, PreActResNet-18, and WideResNet-28-10 demonstrate the effectiveness of RAAT in improving the trade-off beyond four common baselines and a total of 14 related state-of-the-art (SOTA) works.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了对抗训练中一个令人惊讶的现象：决策边界附近样本的输入扰动强度变化对模型鲁棒性影响极小。基于此，发现输入空间与潜在空间的不对齐是鲁棒性-准确性权衡的关键驱动因素。为此提出鲁棒对齐对抗训练(RAAT)方法，通过固定边界样本扰动强度和域插值一致性对抗正则化(DICAR)来调和准确性与鲁棒性。实验证明RAAT在多个数据集和网络架构上优于14种SOTA方法。
AI.motivation: 对抗训练面临准确性与鲁棒性的权衡问题。作者发现决策边界附近样本的扰动强度变化对鲁棒性影响极小，这暴露了准确性与鲁棒性评分波动的不一致性，进一步识别出输入空间与潜在空间的不对齐是权衡问题的关键驱动因素。因此，需要一种方法来对齐这两个空间，以调和准确性与鲁棒性。
AI.method: 1) 提出鲁棒对齐(RA)作为新AT目标，要求模型感知随输入扰动变化而改变，但最终标签预测保持不变。2) 对边界样本采用减小且固定的扰动强度，使模型将扰动视为可学习模式而非噪声。3) 提出域插值一致性对抗正则化(DICAR)，基于理论推导将输入与潜在空间间的语义对齐引入AT。综合形成RAAT方法。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100、Tiny-ImageNet上使用ResNet-18、PreActResNet-18、WideResNet-28-10进行大量实验，RAAT在改善鲁棒性-准确性权衡方面超越了4种常见基线和14种SOTA方法。
AI.conclusion: RAAT通过鲁棒对齐有效调和了准确性与鲁棒性的矛盾，验证了输入-潜在空间对齐在对抗训练中的关键作用，为改善权衡问题提供了新方向。

title: KAYRA: A Microservice Architecture for AI-Assisted Karyotyping with Cloud and On-Premise Deployment
summary: We present KAYRA, an end-to-end karyotyping system that operates inside the operational constraints of a clinical cytogenetic laboratory. KAYRA is architected as a containerized microservice pipeline whose ML stack combines an EfficientNet-B5 + U-Net semantic segmenter, a Mask R-CNN (ResNet-50 + FPN) instance detector, and a ResNet-18 classifier, orchestrated through a cascaded ROI-narrowing strategy that focuses each downstream model on the chromosome-bearing region. The same container images are deployed both as a cloud service and as an on-premise installation, supporting clinical environments where patient-data egress is not permitted as well as those where it is. A pilot clinical evaluation against two commercial reference karyotyping systems on 459 chromosomes from 10 metaphase spreads shows segmentation accuracy of 98.91 % (vs. 78.21 % / 40.52 %), classification accuracy of 89.1 % (vs. 86.9 % / 54.5 %), and rotation accuracy of 89.76 % (vs. 94.55 % / 78.43 %). KAYRA improves over the older density-thresholding reference on all three axes (p < 0.0001 for segmentation and classification by Fisher's exact test on chromosome-level counts), and on segmentation also against the modern AI- supported reference (p < 0.0001); on classification the difference vs. the modern AI reference is not statistically significant at the present test-set size (p = 0.34). The system reaches TRL 6 maturity and integrates the human-in-the-loop expert-review workflow that diagnostic cytogenetic practice requires. The thesis of this paper is that a multi-model cytogenetic AI service can be packaged as a microservice architecture supporting flexible deployment - cloud-hosted or on-premise - while delivering strong empirical performance on a pilot clinical evaluation.

AI.tldr: KAYRA是一个端到端的核型分析系统，采用微服务架构，结合EfficientNet-B5+U-Net语义分割器、Mask R-CNN实例检测器和ResNet-18分类器，通过级联ROI缩小策略实现临床级染色体分析。系统可部署在云端或本地，在459条染色体的临床评估中，分割准确率达98.91%，分类准确率89.1%，旋转准确率89.76%，达到了TRL 6成熟度。
AI.motivation: 现有商业核型分析系统性能不足（分割准确率仅40-78%），且临床细胞遗传学实验室面临严格的数据隐私约束（禁止患者数据出域），需要一种既能灵活部署（云端/本地）又能提供高精度分析的端到端解决方案。
AI.method: 采用容器化微服务架构，ML组合包括：EfficientNet-B5+U-Net语义分割器、Mask R-CNN(ResNet-50+FPN)实例检测器、ResNet-18分类器，通过级联ROI缩小策略逐步聚焦染色体区域。同一容器镜像支持云端和本地部署，并集成人机协同的专家审查工作流。
AI.result: 在459条染色体（10个中期涂片）的临床评估中：分割准确率98.91%（对比商业系统78.21%/40.52%），分类准确率89.1%（对比86.9%/54.5%），旋转准确率89.76%（对比94.55%/78.43%）。在分割和分类上显著优于传统密度阈值系统（p<0.0001），分割也显著优于现代AI参考系统（p<0.0001），分类与现代AI参考差异不显著（p=0.34）。系统达到TRL 6成熟度。
AI.conclusion: 多模型细胞遗传学AI服务可封装为微服务架构，支持云和本地灵活部署，在临床评估中展现出强劲性能，验证了该架构在临床细胞遗传学实验室中的可行性和有效性。

title: Domain-Adapted Small Language Models for Reliable Clinical Triage
summary: Accurate and consistent Emergency Severity Index (ESI) assignment remains a persistent challenge in emergency departments, where highly variable free-text triage documentation contributes to mistriage and workflow inefficiencies. This study evaluates whether open-source small language models (SLMs) can serve as reliable, privacy-preserving decision-support tools for clinical triage. We systematically compared multiple SLMs across diverse prompting pipelines and found that clinical vignettes, concise summaries of triage narratives, yielded the most accurate predictions. The SLM, Qwen2.5-7B, demonstrated the strongest balance of accuracy, stability, and computational efficiency. Through large-scale domain adaptation using expert-curated and silver-standard pediatric triage data, fine-tuned Qwen2.5-7B models substantially reduced discordance and clinically significant errors, outperforming all baseline SLMs and advanced proprietary large language models (LLMs, e.g., GPT-4o). These findings highlight the feasibility of institution-specific SLMs for reliable, privacy-preserving ESI decision support and underscore the importance of targeted fine-tuning over more complex inference strategies.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了开源小语言模型（SLMs）在急诊预检分诊中作为隐私保护决策支持工具的可行性。研究发现，使用临床小故事作为输入最准确，Qwen2.5-7B模型在精度、稳定性和效率上表现最佳。通过大规模领域自适应微调，该模型显著降低了分诊不一致率和临床严重错误，性能甚至超越GPT-4o等高级大语言模型。结果表明，针对特定机构的微调SLMs是可靠且隐私友好的分诊解决方案。
AI.motivation: 急诊分诊中ESI分配不准确、自由文本记录变异性大导致分诊错误和工作效率低下。现有大语言模型存在隐私风险、计算成本高，因此需要探索开源小语言模型作为可靠、隐私保护的决策支持工具。
AI.method: 系统比较多种SLMs和提示词流程，发现临床小故事摘要最优；使用Qwen2.5-7B进行大规模领域自适应微调，结合专家标注和银标儿科分诊数据训练。
AI.result: 微调后的Qwen2.5-7B显著降低分诊不一致率和临床显著错误，优于所有基线SLMs和GPT-4o等专有大语言模型。
AI.conclusion: 机构专属微调SLMs可作为可靠、隐私保护的ESI决策支持工具，定向微调比复杂推理策略更有效。

title: Delta Score Matters! Spatial Adaptive Multi Guidance in Diffusion Models
summary: Diffusion models have achieved remarkable success in synthesizing complex static and temporal visuals, a breakthrough largely driven by Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG). However, despite its pivotal role in aligning generated content with textual prompts, standard CFG relies on a globally uniform scalar. This homogeneous amplification traps models in a well-documented "detail-artifact dilemma": low guidance scales fail to inject intricate semantics, while high scales inevitably cause structural degradation, color over-saturation, and temporal inconsistencies in videos. In this paper, we expose the physical root of this flaw through the lens of differential geometry. By analyzing Tweedie's Formula, we reveal that CFG intrinsically performs a tangential linear extrapolation. Because the natural data manifold is highly curved, this uniform linear step introduces a severe orthogonal deviation. To keep the generation trajectory safely bounded, we formulate a theoretical upper bound for spatial and adaptive guidance. Based on these geometric insights, we propose Spatial Adaptive Multi Guidance (SAMG), a training-free and virtually zero-cost sampling algorithm. SAMG dynamically computes point-wise conditional guidance energy, applying a conservative minimum scale to high-energy boundary regions to preserve delicate micro-textures, while deploying an aggressive maximum scale in low-energy regions to maximize semantic injection. Extensive experiments across diverse image (SD 1.5, SDXL, SD3.5 Medium) and video (CogVideoX, ModelScope) architectures demonstrate that SAMG effectively resolves the detail-artifact dilemma, achieving superior semantic alignment, structural integrity, and temporal smoothness without any computational overhead.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SAMG（空间自适应多引导），一种基于微分几何分析CFG（无分类器引导）缺陷的训练免费采样算法。通过揭示CFG本质是切向线性外推，在弯曲数据流形上会产生正交偏差，SAMG动态计算逐点条件引导能量，在边界区域使用保守最小尺度保留细节，在低能量区域使用激进最大尺度增强语义，从而解决"细节-伪影困境"。
AI.motivation: 现有CFG使用全局统一标量，导致低引导尺度无法注入细粒度语义，高引导尺度引发结构退化、颜色过饱和及视频时间不一致性，即"细节-伪影困境"。作者希望通过微分几何视角揭示此问题的物理根源。
AI.method: 1）通过微分几何分析Tweedie公式，揭示CFG本质是切向线性外推，在弯曲的数据流形上会产生正交偏差；2）推导空间自适应引导的理论上界；3）提出SAMG算法，动态计算逐点条件引导能量，对高能量边界区域用保守最小尺度保留微纹理，低能量区域用激进最大尺度增强语义。
AI.result: 在SD 1.5、SDXL、SD3.5 Medium（图像）和CogVideoX、ModelScope（视频）多种架构上的实验表明，SAMG有效解决了细节-伪影困境，实现了更优的语义对齐、结构完整性和时间平滑性，且无额外计算开销。
AI.conclusion: 基于几何洞察提出的SAMG是一种训练免费、零计算开销的采样算法，能够动态调整引导强度，从根本上突破了CFG的细节-伪影困境。

title: Multiple Additive Neural Networks for Structured and Unstructured Data
comment: Accepted author manuscript; page layout differs from the published Springer version
summary: This paper extends and explains the Multiple Additive Neural Networks (MANN) methodology, an enhancement to the traditional Gradient Boosting framework, utilizing nearly shallow neural networks instead of decision trees as base learners. This innovative approach leverages neural network architectures, notably Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) and Capsule Neural Networks, to extend its application to both structured data and unstructured data such as images and audio. For structured data the advantages of capsule neural networks as feature extractors are used and combined with MANN as a classifier. MANN's unique architecture promotes continuous learning and integrates advanced heuristics to combat overfitting, ensuring robustness and reducing sensitivity to hyperparameter settings like learning rate and iterations. Our empirical studies reveal that MANN surpasses traditional methods such as Extreme Gradient Boosting (XGB) in accuracy across well-known datasets. This research demonstrates MANN's superior precision and generalizability, making it a versatile tool for diverse data types and complex learning environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MANN方法，用浅层神经网络替代决策树作为基学习器进行梯度提升，结合CNN和胶囊网络处理结构化和非结构化数据，实验表明其在多个数据集上优于XGBoost。
AI.motivation: 传统梯度提升框架（如XGBoost）以决策树为基学习器，在处理非结构化数据（如图像、音频）时能力有限，且对超参数敏感、易过拟合。
AI.method: 提出MANN框架，使用近乎浅层的神经网络（CNN、胶囊网络）替代决策树作为基学习器，集成连续学习机制和多种启发式策略防止过拟合。
AI.result: 在多个知名数据集上，MANN的准确率超过XGBoost等传统方法，具有更好的精度和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: MANN是一种通用性强、鲁棒性好的学习方法，适用于结构化与非结构化数据，能有效降低对超参数的敏感性。

title: Decoupling Knowledge and Task Subspaces for Composable Parametric Retrieval Augmented Generation
summary: Parametric Retrieval-Augmented Generation (PRAG) encodes external documents into lightweight parameter modules that can be retrieved and merged at inference time, offering a promising alternative to in-context retrieval augmentation. Despite its potential, many PRAG implementations train document adapters with task-supervised objectives, which may cause each adapter to encode both document-specific facts and reusable task-solving behavior. This entanglement may make adapter composition less reliable: when multiple adapters are merged at inference time, their overlapping task behaviors can accumulate together with document-specific updates, potentially making the merged adapter less stable and less focused on the intended document knowledge. To examine this issue, we explore Orthogonal Subspace Decomposition (OSD), an adapter-training setup that separates reusable task behavior from document-specific knowledge adapters. Concretely, we first train a Task LoRA to capture reusable task behavior, and then train document LoRAs to encode document-specific knowledge in a orthogonal subspace. This setup provides a controlled way to examine how orthogonalizing task and document LoRA updates affects adapter composition in multi-document PRAG. Experiments across multiple knowledge-intensive tasks and model scales suggest that this orthogonalization strategy can improve compositional robustness in parametric RAG, especially when multiple document adapters are merged.

AI.tldr: 本文提出正交子空间分解（OSD）方法，将可复用的任务行为与文档特定知识分别编码到不同LoRA中，通过正交化训练提升参数化RAG在多文档融合时的组合鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有参数化RAG（PRAG）方法使用任务监督目标训练文档适配器，导致每个适配器同时编码了文档事实和可复用的任务求解行为。当多个适配器推理时融合，重叠的任务行为会累积，使融合后的适配器不稳定且偏离预期的文档知识。
AI.method: 提出正交子空间分解（OSD）训练框架：1）先训练一个Task LoRA捕获可复用的任务行为；2）在正交子空间中训练文档LoRA编码文档特定知识，确保任务行为与文档知识解耦。
AI.result: 在多个知识密集型任务和不同规模模型上的实验表明，这种正交化策略能够提升参数化RAG的组合鲁棒性，尤其在多个文档适配器融合时效果显著。
AI.conclusion: 正交化解耦训练能有效缓解PRAG中适配器融合时的任务行为累积问题，提升多文档组合的稳定性和知识聚焦能力，为参数化检索增强生成提供了一种更鲁棒的适配器组合方案。

title: MTCurv: Deep learning for direct microtubule curvature mapping in noisy fluorescence microscopy images
comment: Accepted for presentation at the International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR) 2026
summary: Accurate quantification of the geometry of curvilinear biological structures is essential for understanding cellular mechanics and disease-related morphological alterations. Microtubule curvature is a key descriptor of filament rigidity and mechanical perturbations. However, reliable curvature extraction from fluorescence microscopy images remains challenging due to noise, low contrast, and partial filament visibility. Existing approaches rely on segmentation pipelines with pre or post-processing, which are highly sensitive to segmentation errors and often fail under adverse imaging conditions. In this work, we propose MTCurv, a deep learning framework for direct, segmenta-tion-free regression of microtubule curvature maps from noisy microscopy images. Leveraging a synthetic dataset with pixel-wise curvature annotations, we reformulated curvature estimation as a regression problem and adapted an attention-based residual U-Net. To reduce hallucinations and enforce spatial coherence, we introduced a gradient-aware loss combining Mean Squared Error with a gradient consistency term. Beyond model and loss design, we evaluated commonly used regression and image quality metrics, revealing that many perceptual and blind metrics are poorly suited for curvature estimation. Correlation-based metrics, particularly Spearman correlation, emerged as more reliable indicators of curvature prediction quality. Experiments on two datasets of increasing difficulty demonstrated that MTCurv accurately recovers local microtubule curvatures, even in the presence of background fluorescence. Ablation studies highlighted the contribution of both residual encoding and attention-based decoding. Overall, this work provides a practical tool for filament curvature analysis and methodological insights for geometry-aware regression in biomedical imaging. Datasets and code are made available.

AI.tldr: 提出了MTCurv，一种基于深度学习的无分割微管曲率直接回归框架，利用合成数据训练和梯度感知损失函数，从噪声显微镜图像中准确估计曲线生物结构的几何特征。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖分割管线，对分割误差敏感且在低信噪比条件下表现不佳，难以从荧光显微镜图像中可靠提取微管曲率。
AI.method: 将曲率估计重构为回归问题，使用合成数据集生成像素级曲率真值，采用带注意力机制的残差U-Net架构，并引入结合均方误差与梯度一致性项的梯度感知损失函数。
AI.result: 在两个难度递增的数据集上，MTCurv能准确恢复局部微管曲率，即便存在背景荧光干扰；消融实验验证了残差编码和注意力解码的贡献；相关性指标（特别是Spearman相关）比感知/盲指标更可靠。
AI.conclusion: 提供了一种实用的丝状结构曲率分析工具，并为生物医学成像中的几何感知回归提供了方法论见解。

title: HalluCiteChecker: A Lightweight Toolkit for Hallucinated Citation Detection and Verification in the Era of AI Scientists
summary: We introduce HalluCiteChecker, a toolkit for detecting and verifying hallucinated citations in scientific papers. While AI assistant technologies have transformed the academic writing process, including citation recommendation, they have also led to the emergence of hallucinated citations that do not correspond to any existing work. Such citations not only undermine the credibility of scientific papers but also impose an additional burden on reviewers and authors, who must manually verify their validity during the review process. In this study, we formalize hallucinated citation detection as an NLP task and provide a corresponding toolkit as a practical foundation for addressing this problem. Our package is lightweight and can perform verification in seconds on a standard laptop. It can also be executed entirely offline and runs efficiently using only CPUs. We hope that HalluCiteChecker will help reduce reviewer workload and support organizers by enabling systematic pre-review and publication checks. Our code is released under the Apache 2.0 license on GitHub and is distributed as an installable package via PyPI. A demonstration video is available on YouTube.

AI.tldr: HalluCiteChecker 是一个轻量级工具包，用于检测和验证科学论文中的幻觉引用（不存在的参考文献）。它可在普通笔记本电脑上数秒内完成验证，支持离线运行和仅CPU使用，旨在减轻审稿人和作者的手动验证负担。
AI.motivation: AI助手在学术写作中的广泛应用导致了大量幻觉引用（不存在的参考文献）的出现，这些引用损害了论文的可信度，且手动验证给审稿人和作者带来沉重负担。
AI.method: 将幻觉引用检测形式化为一个NLP任务，并构建了对应的轻量级工具包。该工具包可在普通笔记本电脑上秒级运行，支持完全离线部署和仅CPU执行。
AI.result: 开发了HalluCiteChecker工具包，可在普通硬件上高效运行，代码已开源在GitHub（Apache 2.0许可），可通过PyPI安装，并提供演示视频。
AI.conclusion: HalluCiteChecker有望减轻审稿人工作负担，并支持组织者进行系统化的预审和出版检查。

title: GIFGuard: Proactive Forensics against Deepfakes in Facial GIFs via Spatiotemporal Watermarking
summary: The rapid evolution of deepfake technology poses an unprecedented threat to the authenticity of Graphics Interchange Format (GIF) imagery, which serves as a representative of short-loop temporal media in social networks. However, existing proactive forensics works are designed for static images, which limits their applicability to animated GIFs. To bridge this gap, we propose GIFGuard, the first spatiotemporal watermarking framework tailored for deepfake proactive forensics in GIFs. In the embedding stage, we propose the Spatiotemporal Adaptive Residual Encoder (STARE) to ensure robustness against high-level semantic tampering. It employs a 3D convolutional backbone with adaptive channel recalibration to capture globally coherent temporal dependencies. In the extraction stage, we design the Deep Integrity Restoration Decoder (DIRD). It utilizes a spatiotemporal hourglass architecture equipped with 3D attention to restore latent features, allowing for the accurate extraction of watermark signals even under severe facial manipulation. Furthermore, we construct GIFfaces, the first large-scale benchmark dataset curated for GIF proactive forensics to facilitate research in this domain. Extensive results show that GIFGuard achieves high-fidelity visual quality and remarkable robustness performance against deepfakes. Related code and dataset will be released.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GIFGuard，首个针对GIF动图的深度伪造主动取证时空水印框架，包含STARE编码器和DIRD解码器，并构建了GIFfaces基准数据集，在保真度和鲁棒性上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有主动取证工作主要针对静态图像，无法直接应用于GIF动图（短循环时间序列媒体），亟需一种专门为GIF设计的深度伪造防御方案。
AI.method: 提出GIFGuard框架：1）嵌入阶段使用STARE（时空自适应残差编码器），基于3D卷积骨干和自适应通道重校准捕获全局时序依赖；2）提取阶段使用DIRD（深度完整性恢复解码器），采用时空沙漏架构结合3D注意力恢复潜在特征并准确提取水印；3）构建GIFfaces基准数据集。
AI.result: GIFGuard实现了高保真视觉质量，并在面对深度伪造时展现出出色的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: GIFGuard填补了GIF动图深度伪造主动取证的空白，代码和数据集将开源，有望推动该领域研究发展。

title: What Kind of Language is Easy to Language-Model Under Curriculum Learning?
comment: The 15th edition of the Workshop on Cognitive Modeling and Computational Linguistics (CMCL 2026)
summary: Many of the thousands of attested languages share common configurations of features, creating a spectrum from typologically very rare (e.g., object-verb-subject word order) or impossible languages to very common combinations of features (e.g., subject-object-verb word order). One central question is under what conditions such typological tendencies can be predicted, and specifically whether the learning bias of language models (LMs) is sufficient to reproduce such patterns. In this study, we add one dimensionality to such analysis -- the learning scenario for LMs -- to explore its interaction with the inductive bias of LMs. Specifically, as a first study, we examine the effect of curriculum learning (CL), as a developmentally motivated learning scenario, i.e., starting with simpler sentences rather than randomly-ordered input. We expand existing LM-based exploration (El-Naggar et al., 2025a,b) with a simple CL variant and find that CL substantially impacts the apparent inductive bias of LMs.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨课程学习（从简单句子开始训练）如何影响语言模型的归纳偏置，发现课程学习显著改变了语言模型对语言类型学倾向的偏好。
AI.motivation: 理解语言类型学倾向（如语序偏好）是否可以从语言模型的学习偏置中预测，以及学习场景（如课程学习）如何与归纳偏置相互作用。
AI.method: 在已有语言模型探索的基础上，引入课程学习（Curriculum Learning）作为发展动机的学习场景，即从简单句子开始训练而非随机顺序输入，比较其对语言模型归纳偏置的影响。
AI.result: 课程学习显著影响了语言模型的归纳偏置，改变了模型对语言类型学特征的偏好。
AI.conclusion: 学习场景（如课程学习）与语言模型的归纳偏置之间存在重要交互作用，课程学习能显著改变模型的类型学偏好，说明仅靠学习偏置不足以完全预测语言类型学倾向。

title: 3D-LENS: A 3D Lifting-based Elevated Novel-view Synthesis method for Single-View Aerial-Ground Re-Identification
summary: Aerial-Ground Re-Identification (AG-ReID) is constrained by the viewpoint-domain gap, as drastic viewpoint disparities occlude or distort discriminative features, making cross-viewpoint image retrieval challenging. While existing methods rely on paired cross-view annotations, real-world deployments, such as wilderness search-and-rescue (SAR), often lack target-domain data, requiring retrieval from ground-level references alone. To our knowledge, we are the first to address this challenge by formalizing the Single-View AG-ReID (SV AG-ReID) setting, where models trained on a single real viewpoint must generalize to an unseen viewpoint. We propose 3D Lifting-based Elevated Novel-view Synthesis (3D-LENS), a unified framework combining geometrically-consistent novel view synthesis that leverages large-scale 3D mesh reconstruction, with a robust representation learning scheme to mitigate synthetic-to-real bias. Unlike 2D generative baselines that suffer from geometric inconsistencies or prior 3D methods that are restricted to class-specific templates, our approach ensures view-consistent synthesis across diverse categories without predefined templates that fail to capture fine-grained details, such as carried objects. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on SV AG-ReID scenarios. Code and data will be released at https://github.com/TurtleSmoke/3D-LENS.

AI.tldr: 本文首次提出单视角无人机-地面行人再识别（SV AG-ReID）任务，并设计了基于3D网格重建与新颖视角合成的3D-LENS框架，在无配对目标域数据的情况下实现跨视角泛化，取得了SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有AG-ReID方法依赖配对跨视角标注，但在实际场景（如野外搜救）中往往无法获取目标域数据，需要仅从地面视角检索。本文首次正式定义并解决这一更具挑战性的单视角AG-ReID问题。
AI.method: 提出3D-LENS框架：1）利用大规模3D网格重建生成几何一致的新颖视角合成图像；2）设计鲁棒表示学习方案以缓解合成到真实数据的域偏移。相比2D生成基线（几何不一致）和传统3D方法（限于类别特定模板），该方法无需预定义模板即可捕捉细粒度细节（如携带物品）。
AI.result: 在单视角AG-ReID场景下，3D-LENS取得了最先进的性能，实验充分验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次提出了SV AG-ReID问题，并基于3D网格重建与视角合成提供了有效解决方案，为跨视角行人再识别在无配对数据场景下的应用开辟了新方向。

title: A Note on How to Remove the $\ln\ln T$ Term from the Squint Bound
summary: In Orabona and Pál [2016], we introduced the shifted KT potentials, to remove the $\ln \ln T$ factor in the parameter-free learning with expert bound. In this short technical note, I show that this is equivalent to changing the prior in the Krichevsky--Trofimov algorithm. Then, I show how to use the same idea to remove the $\ln \ln T$ factor in the data-independent bound for the Squint algorithm.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了如何通过改变Krichevsky-Trofimov算法中的先验，消除参数自由学习中的ln ln T因子，并将此方法扩展到Squint算法中以移除其数据无关界中的ln ln T因子。
AI.motivation: 消除参数自由学习和Squint算法中存在的ln ln T因子，改进原有界限的紧致性。
AI.method: 将移位KT势能等价解释为改变Krichevsky-Trofimov算法中的先验分布，并将该思想推广到Squint算法中。
AI.result: 成功移除了参数自由学习中的ln ln T因子，并且同样移除了Squint算法数据无关界中的ln ln T因子。
AI.conclusion: 改变先验分布是一种有效且通用的技巧，可用于改进多种在线学习算法的理论界限。

title: MoRFI: Monotonic Sparse Autoencoder Feature Identification
summary: Large language models (LLMs) acquire most of their factual knowledge during the pre-training stage, through next token prediction. Subsequent stages of post-training often introduce new facts outwith the parametric knowledge, giving rise to hallucinations. While it has been demonstrated that supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on new knowledge may exacerbate the problem, the underlying mechanisms are still poorly understood. We conduct a controlled fine-tuning experiment, focusing on closed-book QA, and find latent directions that causally contribute to hallucinations. Specifically, we fine-tune Llama 3.1 8B, Gemma 2 9B and Mistral 7B v03 on seven distinct single QA datasets, controlling for the percentage of new knowledge and number of training epochs. By measuring performance on the test set, we validate that incrementally introducing new knowledge increases hallucinations, with the effect being more pronounced with prolonged training. We leverage pre-trained sparse autoencoders (SAEs) to analyze residual stream activations across various checkpoints for each model and propose Monotonic Relationship Feature Identification (MoRFI) for capturing causally relevant latents. MoRFI filters SAE features that respond monotonically to controlled fine-tuning data mixtures of a target property. Our findings show that exposure to unknown facts disrupts the model's ability to retrieve stored knowledge along a set of directions in the residual stream. Our pipeline reliably discovers them across distinct models, recovering knowledge through single-latent interventions.

AI.tldr: 论文发现大模型在微调过程中接触未知事实会破坏其检索已存储知识的能力，并通过提出MoRFI方法识别出残差流中导致幻觉的因果潜在方向。
AI.motivation: 尽管已知监督微调（SFT）引入新知识会加剧幻觉问题，但其背后的机制仍不清楚，因此作者希望探究该现象的深层原因。
AI.method: 作者在Llama 3.1 8B等三个模型上进行受控微调实验，控制新知识比例和训练轮次；利用预训练的稀疏自编码器（SAE）分析残差流激活；提出Monotonic Relationship Feature Identification (MoRFI)方法，筛选出对微调数据中目标属性单调响应的SAE特征。
AI.result: 增量引入新知识会增加幻觉，且长时间训练效果更明显；发现残差流中存在一组因果相关的潜在方向，其被新知识干扰后破坏模型检索已有知识的能力；MoRFI能可靠地在不同模型中识别这些方向，并通过单潜在变量干预恢复知识。
AI.conclusion: 新知识的引入通过干扰残差流中特定方向来破坏模型的知识检索能力，进而导致幻觉，而MoRFI方法可以有效识别并缓解这一问题。

title: DenseStep2M: A Scalable, Training-Free Pipeline for Dense Instructional Video Annotation
summary:
Long-term video understanding requires interpreting complex temporal events and reasoning over procedural activities. While instructional video corpora, like HowTo100M, offer rich resources for model training, they present significant challenges, including noisy ASR transcripts and inconsistent temporal alignments between narration and visual content. In this work, we introduce an automated, training-free pipeline to extract high-quality procedural annotations from in-the-wild instructional videos. Our approach segments videos into coherent shots, filters poorly aligned content, and leverages state-of-the-art multimodal and large language models (Qwen2.5-VL and DeepSeek-R1) to generate structured, temporally grounded procedural steps.
  This pipeline yields DenseStep2M, a large-scale dataset comprising approximately 100K videos and 2M detailed instructional steps, designed to support comprehensive long-form video understanding. To rigorously evaluate our pipeline, we curate DenseCaption100, a benchmark of high-quality, human-written captions. Evaluations demonstrate strong alignment between our auto-generated steps and human annotations. Furthermore, we validate the utility of DenseStep2M across three core downstream tasks: dense video captioning, procedural step grounding, and cross-modal retrieval. Models fine-tuned on DenseStep2M achieve substantial gains in captioning quality and temporal localization, while exhibiting robust zero-shot generalization across egocentric, exocentric, and mixed-perspective domains. These results underscore the effectiveness of DenseStep2M in facilitating advanced multimodal alignment and long-term activity reasoning. Our dataset is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/mingjige/DenseStep2M.

AI.tldr: 本文提出自动化、无需训练的流水线，从嘈杂的教学视频中提取高质量时序步骤，构建包含约10万视频、200万步骤的DenseStep2M数据集，并验证其在密集视频描述、步骤定位、跨模态检索等下游任务上的显著效果。
AI.motivation: 长视频理解需要解释复杂时间事件并在程序性活动上进行推理。现有教学视频语料如HowTo100M存在ASR转录噪声大、旁白与视觉内容时序对齐不一致等问题，缺乏高质量的结构化程序性标注。
AI.method: 提出一个自动化、无需训练的流水线：1) 将视频分割为连贯镜头；2) 过滤对齐不佳的内容；3) 利用先进的多模态大模型（Qwen2.5-VL和DeepSeek-R1）生成结构化、有时序定位的程序性步骤，构建DenseStep2M数据集。同时策展了高质量人工标注基准DenseCaption100用于评估。
AI.result: 自动生成的步骤与人工标注高度对齐；在下游任务（密集视频描述、程序步骤定位、跨模态检索）上，基于DenseStep2M微调的模型在描述质量和时序定位方面取得显著提升，并在自我中心、外部视角及混合视角领域展现出鲁棒的零样本泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: DenseStep2M能有效促进多模态对齐和长期活动推理，为解决教学视频中的噪声和不对齐问题提供了高质量训练资源，对长视频理解领域有重要贡献。

title: Hyper Input Convex Neural Networks for Shape Constrained Learning and Optimal Transport
comment: 65 pages, 13 figures, the first two authors contributed equally
summary: We introduce Hyper Input Convex Neural Networks (HyCNNs), a novel neural network architecture designed for learning convex functions. HyCNNs combine the principles of Maxout networks with input convex neural networks (ICNNs) to create a neural network that is always convex in the input, theoretically capable of leveraging depth, and performs reliable when trained at scale compared to ICNNs. Concretely, we prove that HyCNNs require exponentially fewer parameters than ICNNs to approximate quadratic functions up to a given precision. Throughout a series of synthetic experiments, we demonstrate that HyCNNs outperform existing ICNNs and MLPs in terms of predictive performance for convex regression and interpolation tasks. We further apply HyCNNs to learn high-dimensional optimal transport maps for synthetic examples and for single-cell RNA sequencing data, where they oftentimes outperform ICNN-based neural optimal transport methods and other baselines across a wide range of settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Hyper Input Convex Neural Networks (HyCNNs)，一种融合Maxout网络与输入凸神经网络的新架构，在保持输入凸性的同时，理论上能以指数级更少的参数逼近二次函数，并在凸回归、插值和最优传输任务中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有ICNN在大规模训练时可靠性不足，且参数效率较低；作者希望结合Maxout网络的特性来提升ICNN的表达能力与训练稳定性。
AI.method: 将Maxout网络的思想融入ICNN框架，设计一种始终保持输入凸性的神经网络架构，并证明其在逼近二次函数时所需参数远少于传统ICNN。
AI.result: 在凸回归和插值任务中，HyCNN优于现有ICNN和MLP；在高维最优传输任务（含单细胞RNA测序数据）中，HyCNN也优于ICNN-based方法和多种基线。
AI.conclusion: HyCNN是一种参数高效、可扩展的凸函数学习架构，在多个应用场景中具有显著优势。

title: HealthNLP_Retrievers at ArchEHR-QA 2026: Cascaded LLM Pipeline for Grounded Clinical Question Answering
summary: Patient portals now give individuals direct access to their electronic health records (EHRs), yet access alone does not ensure patients understand or act on the complex clinical information contained in these records. The ArchEHR-QA 2026 shared task addresses this challenge by focusing on grounded question answering over EHRs, and this paper presents the system developed by the HealthNLP_Retrievers team for this task. The proposed approach uses a multi-stage cascaded pipeline powered by the Gemini 2.5 Pro large language model to interpret patient-authored questions and retrieve relevant evidence from lengthy clinical notes. Our architecture comprises four integrated modules: (1) a few-shot query reformulation unit which summarizes verbose patient queries; (2) a heuristic-based evidence scorer which ranks clinical sentences to prioritize recall; (3) a grounded response generator which synthesizes professional-caliber answers restricted strictly to identified evidence; and (4) a high-precision many-to-many alignment framework which links generated answers to supporting clinical sentences. This cascaded approach achieved competitive results. Across the individual tracks, the system ranked 1st in question interpretation, 5th in answer generation, 7th in evidence identification, and 9th in answer-evidence alignment. These results show that integrating large language models within a structured multi-stage pipeline improves grounding, precision, and the professional quality of patient-oriented health communication. To support reproducibility, our source code is publicly available in our GitHub repository

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了HealthNLP_Retrievers团队在ArchEHR-QA 2026共享任务中开发的基于Gemini 2.5 Pro大语言模型的多阶段级联管道系统，用于患者门户中电子健康记录的问答任务，该系统在多项指标上取得有竞争力的成绩。
AI.motivation: 患者门户虽允许个人直接访问电子健康记录，但仅提供访问权限不足以确保患者理解或处理其中复杂的临床信息。因此需要开发能够基于电子健康记录进行接地问答的系统，帮助患者更好地理解和利用自己的健康数据。
AI.method: 提出一个多阶段级联管道，包含四个集成模块：(1)少样本查询改写单元——总结冗长的患者问题；(2)基于启发式的证据评分器——对临床句子排序以优先召回；(3)接地响应生成器——仅基于识别证据合成专业级答案；(4)高精度多对多对齐框架——将生成的答案链接到支持的临床句子。底层使用Gemini 2.5 Pro大语言模型。
AI.result: 在多个子任务中排名：问题解释第1名、答案生成第5名、证据识别第7名、答案-证据对齐第9名，展示了竞争性的整体表现。
AI.conclusion: 将大语言模型集成到结构化多阶段管道中，可以改善接地性、精确性以及面向患者的健康沟通的专业质量。代码已开源。

title: AirZoo: A Unified Large-Scale Dataset for Grounding Aerial Geometric 3D Vision
summary: Despite the rapid progress in data-driven 3D vision, aerial geometric 3D vision remains a formidable challenge due to the severe scarcity of large-scale, high-fidelity training data. Existing benchmarks, predominantly biased toward ground-level or object-centric views, do not account for complex viewpoint transformations and diverse environmental conditions in UAV-based sensing. To bridge this critical gap, we propose AirZoo, a unified large-scale dataset and benchmark for grounding aerial geometric 3D vision. AirZoo possesses three appealing properties: 1) Scalable Generation Pipeline: Leveraging freely available, world-scale photogrammetric 3D meshes, it renders vast outdoor environments with customizable UAV flight trajectories and configurable weather/illumination. 2) Comprehensive Scene Diversity: It provides the most extensive coverage of region types to date (spanning 378 regions across 22 countries), systematically encompassing both highly structured urban landscapes and complex unstructured natural environments. 3) Rich Geometric Annotations: Each frame provides synchronized, pixel-level metric depth and precise 6-DoF geo-referenced poses, essential for geometry-aware learning. Through three rigorous evaluation tracks -- aerial image retrieval, cross-view matching, and multi-view 3D reconstruction -- we demonstrate that AirZoo serves as a powerful pre-training engine. Extensive experiments on both public and newly collected real-world benchmarks reveal that fine-tuning on AirZoo yields substantial performance gains for SoTA models (e.g., MegaLoc, RoMa, VGGT, and Depth Anything 3), establishing a new performance upper bound for aerial spatial intelligence.

AI.tldr: 提出AirZoo，一个大规模航拍几何3D视觉数据集与基准，通过可扩展生成管线、覆盖22国378区域、提供像素级深度与6DoF位姿，在三个评测任务上显著提升SoTA模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有3D视觉数据集偏向地面或物体中心视角，缺乏覆盖复杂视角变换和环境条件的航拍数据，制约了无人机感知领域的发展。
AI.method: 利用全球可用的摄影测量3D网格，结合可定制的无人机飞行轨迹和可配置天气/光照条件，规模化生成高保真航拍数据。
AI.result: AirZoo在航拍图像检索、跨视角匹配、多视图3D重建三个评测任务上，通过微调显著提升MegaLoc、RoMa、VGGT、Depth Anything 3等SoTA模型性能，刷新航拍空间智能的上限。
AI.conclusion: AirZoo可作为强大的预训练引擎，有效缓解航拍几何3D视觉领域数据稀缺问题，推动无人机空间智能发展。

title: ClawGym: A Scalable Framework for Building Effective Claw Agents
summary: Claw-style environments support multi-step workflows over local files, tools, and persistent workspace states. However, scalable development around these environments remains constrained by the absence of a systematic framework, especially one for synthesizing verifiable training data and integrating it with agent training and diagnostic evaluation. To address this challenge, we present ClawGym, a scalable framework that supports the full lifecycle of Claw-style personal agent development. Concretely, we construct ClawGym-SynData, a diverse dataset of 13.5K filtered tasks synthesized from persona-driven intents and skill-grounded operations, paired with realistic mock workspaces and hybrid verification mechanisms. We then train a family of capable Claw-style models, termed ClawGym-Agents, through supervised fine-tuning on black-box rollout trajectories, and further explore reinforcement learning via a lightweight pipeline that parallelizes rollouts across per-task sandboxes.To support reliable evaluation, we further construct ClawGym-Bench, a benchmark of 200 instances calibrated through automated filtering and human-LLM review. Relevant resources will be soon released at https://github.com/ClawGym.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ClawGym，一个支持Claw式个人智能体全生命周期开发的框架，包含合成数据集ClawGym-SynData（13.5K任务）、训练得到的ClawGym-Agents模型族，以及评估基准ClawGym-Bench（200个实例）。
AI.motivation: Claw风格环境支持多步骤工作流，但缺乏系统化的框架来合成可验证的训练数据并将其与智能体训练和诊断评估集成，阻碍了可扩展开发。
AI.method: 1) 构建ClawGym-SynData：基于角色驱动意图和技能基础操作合成13.5K多样化任务，配备模拟工作空间和混合验证机制。2) 训练ClawGym-Agents：通过监督微调（黑盒轨迹）和强化学习（跨沙箱并行回滚）训练模型族。3) 构建ClawGym-Bench：通过自动过滤和人机审核校准的200个实例基准。
AI.result: 构建了13.5K过滤任务的合成数据集，训练了ClawGym-Agents模型族，建立了200个实例的评估基准。
AI.conclusion: ClawGym为Claw式个人智能体提供了完整生命周期支持框架，涵盖数据合成、模型训练和评估诊断，相关资源将开源发布。

title: Star-Fusion: A Multi-modal Transformer Architecture for Discrete Celestial Orientation via Spherical Topology
summary: Reliable celestial attitude determination is a critical requirement for autonomous spacecraft navigation, yet traditional "Lost-in-Space" (LIS) algorithms often suffer from high computational overhead and sensitivity to sensor-induced noise. While deep learning has emerged as a promising alternative, standard regression models are often confounded by the non-Euclidean topology of the celestial sphere and by the periodic boundary conditions of Right Ascension (RA) and Declination (Dec). In this paper, we present Star-Fusion, a multi-modal architecture that reformulates orientation estimation as a discrete topological classification task. Our approach leverages spherical K-Means clustering to partition the celestial sphere into K topologically consistent regions, effectively mitigating coordinate wrapping artifacts. The proposed architecture employs a tripartite fusion strategy: a SwinV2-Tiny transformer backbone for photometric feature extraction, a convolutional heatmap branch for spatial grounding, and a coordinate-based MLP for geometric anchoring. Experimental evaluations on a synthetic Hipparcos-derived dataset demonstrate that Star-Fusion achieves a Top-1 accuracy of 93.4% and a Top-3 accuracy of 97.8%. Furthermore, the model exhibits high computational efficiency, maintaining an inference latency of 18.4 ms on resource-constrained COTS hardware, making it a viable candidate for real-time onboard deployment in next-generation satellite constellations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Star-Fusion多模态架构，将姿态估计转为离散拓扑分类任务，采用球形K-Means聚类划分天球区域，结合SwinV2-Tiny、卷积热图分支和坐标MLP三部分融合策略。在Hipparcos合成数据集上达到Top-1 93.4%、Top-3 97.8%精度，推理延迟仅18.4ms，适合星载实时部署。
AI.motivation: 传统"Lost-in-Space"算法计算开销大且对传感器噪声敏感；深度学习回归模型难以处理天球非欧拓扑结构及赤经赤纬的周期性边界条件。亟需一种高效、鲁棒的姿态确定方法。
AI.method: 1) 将姿态估计重构为离散拓扑分类任务；2) 利用球形K-Means聚类将天球划分为K个拓扑一致区域；3) 三分支融合架构：SwinV2-Tiny提取光度特征、卷积热图分支提供空间定位、坐标MLP实现几何锚定。
AI.result: 在合成Hipparcos数据集上，Top-1准确率93.4%，Top-3准确率97.8%。在资源受限的COTS硬件上推理延迟仅18.4ms。
AI.conclusion: Star-Fusion在保证高精度的同时具备高计算效率，满足下一代卫星星座实时星载部署的需求，为解决天球拓扑问题提供了新思路。

title: Select to Think: Unlocking SLM Potential with Local Sufficiency
summary: Small language models (SLMs) offer computational efficiency for scalable deployment, yet they often fall short of the reasoning power exhibited by their larger counterparts (LLMs). To mitigate this gap, current approaches invoke an LLM to generate tokens at points of reasoning divergence, but these external calls introduce substantial latency and costs. Alternatively, standard distillation is often hindered by the capacity limitation, as SLMs struggle to accurately mimic the LLM's complex generative distribution. We address this dilemma by identifying local sufficiency: at divergence points, the LLM's preferred token consistently resides within the SLM's top-K next-token predictions, even when failing to emerge as the SLM top-1 choice. We therefore propose SELECT TO THINK (S2T), which reframes the LLM's role from open-ended generation to selection among the SLM's proposals, simplifying the supervision signal to discrete candidate rankings. Leveraging this, we introduce S2T-LOCAL, which distills the selection logic into the SLM, empowering it to perform autonomous re-ranking without inference-time LLM dependency. Empirically, we demonstrate that a 1.5B SLM's top-8 candidates capture the 32B LLM's choice with 95% hit rate. Translating this potential into performance, S2T-LOCAL improves greedy decoding by 24.1% on average across benchmarks, effectively matching the efficacy of 8-path self-consistency while operating with single-trajectory efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SELECT TO THINK（S2T）方法，通过让大语言模型（LLM）在小语言模型（SLM）的top-K候选中选择而非自由生成，简化了蒸馏信号；进而提出S2T-LOCAL将选择逻辑蒸馏进SLM，使其能自主重排，无需推理时依赖LLM。实验表明1.5B SLM的top-8候选以95%命中率覆盖32B LLM的选择，S2T-LOCAL将贪心解码平均提升24.1%，媲美8路自一致性但仅需单轨迹效率。
AI.motivation: 小语言模型（SLM）推理能力弱于大语言模型（LLM），现有方法要么依赖LLM在线生成token（引入高延迟和成本），要么直接蒸馏但因SLM容量有限难以拟合LLM的复杂生成分布。
AI.method: 提出S2T方法：在推理分歧点，让LLM从SLM的top-K候选中选择而非自由生成，将监督信号简化为离散排序；进一步提出S2T-LOCAL，将这种选择逻辑蒸馏到SLM中，使其可以自主重排候选token，推理时不再依赖LLM。
AI.result: 1.5B SLM的top-8候选以95%命中率覆盖32B LLM的选择；S2T-LOCAL将贪心解码平均提升24.1%，性能媲美8路自一致性方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过将LLM的角色从"生成者"转变为"选择者"，S2T有效降低了蒸馏难度并提升了SLM的推理能力，实现了高效且自主的推理增强。

title: FunFace: Feature Utility and Norm Estimation for Face Recognition
summary: Face Recognition (FR) is used in a variety of application domains, from entertainment and banking to security and surveillance. Such applications rely on the FR model to be robust and perform well in a variety of settings. To achieve this, state-of-the-art FR models typically use expressive adaptive margin loss functions, which tie the feature norm to concepts related to sample quality, such as recognizability and perceptual image quality. Recently, through the development of Face Image Quality Assessment (FIQA) techniques, biometric utility has become the preferred measure of face-image quality and has been shown to be a better predictor of the usefulness of samples for face recognition compared to more human-centric aspects, such as resolution, blur, and lighting, tied to general image quality. While image quality expressed through feature norms exhibits a certain level of correlation with biometric utility, it does not fully encapsulate all aspects of utility. To address this point, we propose a new adaptive margin loss, FunFace (Face Recognition Through Utility and Norm Estimation), which incorporates biometric utility, estimated by the Certainty Ratio, into the adaptive margin, taking inspiration from AdaFace. We show that FunFace (when used to train a face recognition model) achieves competitive results to other state-of-the-art FR models on benchmarks containing high-quality samples, while surpassing them on low quality benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出FunFace自适应边界损失函数，通过融合生物特征效用（Certainty Ratio）来改进人脸识别，在低质量基准上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有自适应边界损失函数使用特征范数关联样本质量，但特征范数与生物特征效用（biometric utility）的相关性不完整，无法全面捕捉样本的实用性。
AI.method: 提出FunFace损失函数，在AdaFace启发下，将基于Certainty Ratio的生物特征效用融入自适应边界（adaptive margin）中。
AI.result: 在高质量样本基准上达到与SOTA相当的性能，在低质量基准上超越现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 将生物特征效用直接融入边界损失设计是提升人脸识别模型鲁棒性的有效途径，尤其对低质量场景更有优势。

title: Turning the TIDE: Cross-Architecture Distillation for Diffusion Large Language Models
summary: Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) offer parallel decoding and bidirectional context, but state-of-the-art dLLMs require billions of parameters for competitive performance. While existing distillation methods for dLLMs reduce inference steps within a single architecture, none address cross-architecture knowledge transfer, in which the teacher and student differ in architecture, attention mechanism, and tokenizer. We present TIDE, the first framework for cross-architecture dLLM distillation, comprising three modular components: (1) TIDAL, which jointly modulates distillation strength across training progress and diffusion timestep to account for the teacher's noise-dependent reliability; (2) CompDemo, which enriches the teacher's context via complementary mask splitting to improve predictions under heavy masking; and (3) Reverse CALM, a cross-tokenizer objective that inverts chunk-level likelihood matching, yielding bounded gradients and dual-end noise filtering. Distilling 8B dense and 16B MoE teachers into a 0.6B student via two heterogeneous pipelines outperforms the baseline by an average of 1.53 points across eight benchmarks, yielding notable gains in code generation, where HumanEval scores reach 48.78 compared to 32.3 for the AR baseline.

AI.tldr: 提出了TIDE框架，首个支持跨架构的扩散大语言模型（dLLM）蒸馏方法，包含三个模块（TIDAL、CompDemo、Reverse CALM），能将8B密集和16B MoE教师模型的知识迁移到0.6B学生模型，在8个基准测试上平均提升1.53分，HumanEval代码生成达48.78。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散大语言模型（dLLM）需要数十亿参数才能达到竞争性性能，而现有的蒸馏方法仅限于同架构知识迁移（教师和学生架构、注意力机制、分词器相同），无法实现跨架构知识迁移，限制了小模型从大模型中获益的能力。
AI.method: 提出TIDE框架，包含三个模块：(1) TIDAL——根据训练进度和扩散时间步联合调节蒸馏强度，考虑教师模型噪声依赖的可靠性；(2) CompDemo——通过互补掩码分割丰富教师上下文，改善高掩盖情况下的预测；(3) Reverse CALM——跨分词器目标函数，反转块级似然匹配，提供有界梯度和双端噪声过滤。
AI.result: 将8B密集和16B MoE教师模型蒸馏至0.6B学生模型，在8个基准测试上平均超过基线1.53分；HumanEval代码生成得分达48.78，而自回归基线为32.3。
AI.conclusion: TIDE框架首次实现了扩散大语言模型的跨架构知识蒸馏，通过三个模块协同工作，有效将大模型知识迁移至小模型，显著提升小模型性能，尤其在代码生成任务上表现突出。

title: State Beyond Appearance: Diagnosing and Improving State Consistency in Dial-Based Measurement Reading
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have achieved impressive progress on general multimodal tasks, yet they remain brittle on dial-based measurement reading. In this paper, we study this problem through controlled benchmarks and feature-space probing, and show that current MLLMs not only achieve unsatisfactory accuracy on dial-based readout, but also suffer sharp performance drops under viewpoint and illumination changes even when the underlying dial state remains fixed. Our probing analysis further reveals that same-state samples under appearance variation are not consistently clustered, while neighboring states fail to preserve the local structure implied by continuous dial values. These findings suggest that existing MLLMs largely ignore the intrinsic state geometry of dial measurement tasks and instead rely on superficial appearance cues. Motivated by this diagnosis, we propose TriSCA, a tri-level state-consistent alignment framework for dial-based measurement reading. Specifically, TriSCA consists of state-distance-aware representation alignment, metadata-grounded observation-to-state supervision, and state-aware objective alignment. Extensive ablation studies and evaluation experiments on controlled clock and gauge benchmarks, together with evaluation on an external real-world benchmark, demonstrate the effectiveness of our method.

AI.tldr: 本文针对多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在表盘读数任务上的脆弱性进行研究，发现现有模型过度依赖外观线索而忽略状态几何结构，并提出三层次状态一致性对齐框架（TriSCA）来提升鲁棒性和准确性。
AI.motivation: 当前MLLMs在通用多模态任务上表现优异，但在表盘读数任务上准确率低，且对视角和光照变化极其敏感，表明模型并未真正理解表盘的连续状态几何结构，而是依赖表面视觉线索。
AI.method: 提出TriSCA（三层次状态一致性对齐框架），包括：(1) 状态距离感知的表征对齐；(2) 基于元数据的观测到状态监督；(3) 状态感知的目标对齐。
AI.result: 在可控的时钟和仪表基准测试以及外部真实世界基准上，TriSCA均显著优于现有MLLMs，消融实验验证了各组件的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 现有MLLMs在表盘读数任务上存在根本性缺陷，即忽视状态的内在几何结构；通过显式建模状态一致性，可以大幅提升模型在该任务上的鲁棒性和准确性。

title: SnapPose3D: Diffusion-Based Single-Frame 2D-to-3D Lifting of Human Poses
summary: Depth ambiguity and joint uncertainty are the two main obstacles in obtaining accurate human pose predictions by 2D-to-3D lifting methods proposed in the literature. In particular, these issues are caused by 2D joint locations that can be mapped to multiple 3D positions, inducing multiple possible final poses. Following these considerations, we propose leveraging diffusion-based models generation capability to predict multiple hypotheses and aggregate them in a final accurate pose. Therefore, we introduce SnapPose3D, a pose-lifting framework trained deterministically to denoise 3D poses conditioned on both visual context and 2D pose features. SnapPose3D adopts a probabilistic approach during inference, generating multiple hypotheses through random sampling from a unit Gaussian distribution. Unlike most previous methods that address pose ambiguity by processing temporal sequences, SnapPose3D uses single frames as input, avoiding tracking and limiting computational cost, data acquisition complexity, and the need for online, real-time applications. We extensively evaluate SnapPose3D on well-known benchmarks for the 3D human pose estimation task showing its ability to generate and aggregate accurate hypotheses that lead to state-of-the-art results.

AI.tldr: SnapPose3D是一种基于扩散模型的单帧3D人体姿态提升框架，通过去噪过程生成多个姿态假设并聚合为最终精确预测，在多个基准上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有2D-to-3D姿态提升方法存在深度歧义性和关节不确定性，同一2D位置可能对应多个3D位置导致预测不准，且多数方法依赖时序序列处理，计算成本高、数据采集复杂。
AI.method: 提出SnapPose3D框架：训练阶段以确定性方式学习去噪3D姿态，同时利用视觉上下文和2D姿态特征作为条件；推理阶段从单位高斯分布随机采样生成多个假设，再聚合得到最终精确姿态。仅使用单帧输入，无需时序信息。
AI.result: 在多个公开3D人体姿态估计基准上达到了最先进的性能，验证了多假设生成与聚合策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SnapPose3D通过扩散模型的多假设生成能力有效解决了深度歧义和关节不确定性问题，且单帧输入的设计降低了计算复杂度、数据获取难度和实时应用门槛。

title: SynSur: An end-to-end generative pipeline for synthetic industrial surface defect generation and detection
summary: The bottleneck in learning-based industrial defect detection is often limited not by model capacity, but by the scarcity of labeled defect data: defects are rare, annotations are expensive, and collecting balanced training sets is slow. We present an end-to-end pipeline for synthetic defect generation and annotation, combining Vision-Language-Model-based prompts, LoRA-adapted diffusion, mask-guided inpainting, and sample filtering with automatic label derivation, and demonstrates the potential of real data with realistic synthetic samples to overcome data scarcity. The evaluation is conducted on, a challenging dataset of pitting defects on ball screw drives, and then on a subset of the Mobile phone screen surface defect segmentation dataset (MSD) dataset to test cross-domain transfer. Beyond downstream detector performance, we analyze key stages of the pipeline, including prompt construction, LoRA selection, and sample filtering with DreamSim and CLIPScore, to understand which synthetic samples are both realistic and useful. Experiments with YOLOv26, YOLOX, and LW-DETR show that synthetic-only training does not replace real data. When combined with real data, synthetic defects can preserve performance and yield modest gains in selected BSData training regimes. The MSD transfer study shows that the overall pipeline structure carries over to a second industrial inspection domain, while also highlighting the importance of domain-specific adaptation and annotation-quality control. Overall, the paper provides an end-to-end assessment of diffusion-based industrial defect synthesis and shows that its strongest value lies in strengthening scarce real datasets rather than substituting for them.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一套端到端的合成缺陷生成与标注流水线，结合VLM提示、LoRA扩散模型、掩码引导修复和样本过滤，在滚珠丝杠点蚀缺陷和手机屏幕缺陷数据集上验证了合成数据增强真实数据而非替代真实数据的效果。
AI.motivation: 工业缺陷检测中标注数据稀缺（缺陷罕见、标注昂贵、平衡数据集构建缓慢），模型容量不再是主要瓶颈，需解决数据匮乏问题。
AI.method: 提出端到端流水线：VLM提示构建、LoRA适配扩散模型、掩码引导修复生成缺陷、DreamSim/CLIPScore样本过滤与自动标签推导，结合YOLOv26/YOLOX/LW-DETR检测器评估。
AI.result: 纯合成数据训练无法替代真实数据；合成数据与真实数据结合可保持性能并在部分训练方案中带来微小提升；流水线可迁移至其他工业检测领域，但需领域特定适配与标注质量控制。
AI.conclusion: 扩散模型合成缺陷的最大价值在于增强稀缺的真实数据集，而非替代真实数据。

title: Hearing the Room Through the Shape of the Drum: Modal-Guided Sound Recovery from Multi-Point Surface Vibrations
comment: Oral presentation at The IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2026
summary: Optical vibration sensing enables recovering the scene sound directly from the surface vibration of nearby objects, turning everyday objects into ``visual microphones''. However, most prior methods had focused on capturing the vibrations of specific objects with highly favorable vibration responses. These include objects where the surface vibrations are generated by the object itself (e.g., speaker membrane or guitar body) or objects consisting of a thin membrane which is highly reactive to sound (e.g., a chip bag or the leaf of a plant). In this paper, we tackle sound recovery for a more challenging class of solid objects whose vibration responses are poor or highly resonant. We simultaneously capture vibrations for multiple surface points on the object using a speckle-based vibrometry imaging system. Then, we derive a novel physics-guided vibration formation model that relates the scene sound source to the captured multi-point multi-axis vibrations via the object's vibrational modes. The model is then used to reverse the resonant transfer function of the vibrating object, fusing multiple vibration signals to estimate the original sound source in the scene. We evaluate our approach by recovering sound from a variety of everyday objects, demonstrating that it significantly outperforms traditional single-point speckle vibrometry in challenging scenarios and other signal-processing-based methods for multi-signal fusing.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于散斑振动测量的多点声学振动感知方法，通过物理引导的振动形成模型，从具有较差或高谐振响应的固体物体表面恢复场景声音，显著优于传统单点方法。
AI.motivation: 现有光学振动感知方法多依赖于振动响应良好的物体（如扬声器膜、薄叶片等），而对振动响应差或高谐振的固体物体声音恢复效果不佳。本文旨在突破这一限制，实现对更广泛日常物体的声音恢复。
AI.method: 使用散斑振动成像系统同时捕捉物体表面上多个点的多点多轴振动；提出一种物理引导的振动形成模型，将场景声源与捕捉到的振动通过物体的振动模态联系起来；利用该模型逆向求解物体的谐振传递函数，融合多路振动信号以估计原始声源。
AI.result: 在多种日常物体上的实验表明，该方法在挑战性场景下显著优于传统单点散斑振动测量及其他基于信号处理的多信号融合方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过多点感知与物理模型引导的信号融合，可以有效克服固体物体振动响应差或高谐振的限制，实现更鲁棒的视觉声音恢复。
